name: MAAT Specialty Coffee
excerpt_short: Historic market reborn as a serene, community-focused specialty coffee sanctuary.
excerpt_long: Hanyang Supermarket reborn: a bright, serene coffee sanctuary blending history, community warmth, and meticulously crafted, accessible specialty brews.
summary: From supermarket to serene sanctuary, this roastery blends history with modern design, offering meticulously crafted coffee and a warm community hub. A bright, inviting gem in an isolated alley.
flavour_profile: Heritage reborn, meticulous filter, community, modern serenity.
about:
From Supermarket to Sanctuary: A Specialty Coffee Gem

Stepping into this specialty coffee haven, you're immediately enveloped by a unique blend of history and modern serenity. Transformed from the beloved Hanyang Supermarket, it retains a cherished "reception room" feel, warmly embracing local elderly residents. Its bright mustard yellow exterior, a beacon in an otherwise isolated alley, draws you in, while frameless folding doors and an open terrace flood the space with abundant natural light.

Inside, a thoughtful design harmonizes past and present, featuring seating crafted from old materials and traditional red bricks reinterpreted with modern glass blocks. Wavy wooden panels evoke a Japanese aesthetic, contributing to a truly serene and inviting atmosphere.

Beyond the captivating aesthetics, this cafe is a testament to exceptional coffee quality. The owner's unwavering dedication shines through, personally tasting up to eight cups daily to ensure every brew is perfect. This meticulous approach results in meticulously brewed and exceptional filter coffees, a true highlight for connoisseurs. Yet, specialty coffee remains wonderfully accessible here, with competitively priced morning Americanos and Lattes at just 3,500 won, fostering a vibrant community hub. Even the royal blue velvet curtains at the restroom and staff entrances hint at a "secret space," adding an intriguing layer to this truly special neighborhood gem.

name: Flick On Coffee
excerpt_short: Sinchon's blue oasis: unique coffee, warm conversations, hidden gem.
excerpt_long: Discover Sinchon's hidden blue coffee oasis. Unique design, intimate vibes, and innovative coffee, personally crafted by a passionate owner.
summary: Sinchon's hidden blue oasis: a specialty coffee haven with a serene blue interior, friendly owner, and unique Creme Citron. Escape the bustle for intimate coffee & conversation.
flavour_profile: Creme Citron, blue interior, owner's tales, hidden gem.
about:
Sinchon's Hidden Gem: A Blue Oasis of Coffee & Conversation

Tucked away on a quieter back street of Sinchon, a true "hidden secret" awaits discovery. This specialty coffee haven immediately captivates with its distinctive architectural design: a crisp white storefront that offers a striking contrast to the surprising, serene blue interior within. It’s an ambiance that feels both intimate and inviting, a perfect escape from the bustling main thoroughfare, promising a unique experience for those who seek it out.

The soul of this charming café is undoubtedly its friendly owner, who single-handedly manages the space and elevates every visit into a personal encounter. Known for engaging customers in delightful conversations about his favorite coffees and whiskies, he imbues the spot with a genuine warmth and character.

A must-try is the unique "Creme Citron," an Einspanner-style coffee elevated with aromatic lemon oil, showcasing the innovative spirit that defines this truly special place.

name: Perception Coffee
excerpt_short: Perception: Empathy-driven, precise roasting of rare, moving varietals.
excerpt_long: Perception Coffee: Roasting rare, experimental beans with digital precision to craft empathy and emotional connections in every cup.
summary: Perception Coffee meticulously roasts rare, experimental varietals, using a digital log to maximize their unique charm. We craft emotional connections, delivering transformative moments that move you.
flavour_profile: Emotional roasting, rare varietals, Geisha, aesthetic taste, terroir.
about:
Perception Coffee: Crafting Empathy, One Extraordinary Roast at a Time

At Perception, coffee transcends mere sensory experience, aiming to evoke profound empathy and deliver transformative moments. Their core philosophy, "Beyond senses, Into empathy," drives their dedication to "Roasting That Moves You," believing their greatest contribution lies in creating emotional connections through their craft. This commitment is underpinned by an advanced methodology, utilizing a "Digital Roasting Log" to meticulously record temperature, time, and humidity.

This precise approach adapts to the unique characteristics of green beans annually, maximizing each varietal's inherent charm rather than pursuing a uniform profile.Perception's curated selection reflects this passion, featuring rare and experimental varietals like the Colombia Huila Anaya Ombligon TS-Washed "Strawberry and Roses" with its double anaerobic fermentation, and the Colombia El Paraiso Castillo T/S Washed "Lychee-peach."

For the connoisseur, they offer exquisite Panama Geishas, including the Panama Bambito Verde Tierra Geisha Washed, celebrated as "a cup of aesthetic taste" with noble floral notes, and the Lamastus Elida Vuelta Geisha, a "glass of terroir" revealing jasmine, peach, and black tea. Their "Be with Me, Always" subscription service brings this exceptional experience into daily life.

name: Felt Coffee (Gwanghwamun Branch)
excerpt_short: Felt: Balanced roasts unveil origin's true flavor, shared globally.
excerpt_long: Felt crafts balanced, medium-light roasted single-origin coffees, revealing unique flavors from around the globe for every coffee lover.
summary: Felt masters balanced, medium-light roasting to highlight each single-origin's unique, nuanced flavors. Discover global excellence, transparently sourced and shipped worldwide.
flavour_profile: Balanced, medium-light, specific origins, diverse, global.
about:
Felt: Where Balance Brews Global Excellence

At Felt, the pursuit of exceptional coffee is rooted in a profound philosophy: "good coffee finds its standard in balance." This guiding principle shapes their meticulous approach, particularly evident in their consistent "MEDIUM LIGHT" roasting level for most single-origin offerings. This choice is deliberate, designed to unveil and celebrate the inherent, nuanced flavors of each bean.

Their dedication to transparency and origin shines through a curated selection of single-origin coffees, featuring detailed information on specific farms, varietals, and processing methods. From the unique Costa Rica Corazon de Jesus Finca Los Toños Milenio Lavado-LEO to the vibrant Ethiopia Sidamo Arbegona Heirloom Natural, each coffee tells a distinct story, carefully brought to life by representative Song Dae-woong and his team.Felt's commitment extends beyond the roast, offering a comprehensive coffee experience. Their diverse portfolio includes not only whole roasted beans but also convenient cold brew, innovative capsule coffee, and single-origin drip bags, all thoughtfully presented in various gift box options.

This versatility caters to every coffee lover's preference. Furthermore, their robust "PARTNERSHIP with FELT" wholesale program, offering personalized consultations and sample applications, underscores a dedication to fostering quality coffee throughout the industry. With an impressive global shipping network, Felt ensures that their balanced, specialty coffee reaches enthusiasts worldwide, sharing their passion for exquisite, origin-focused brews.

name: Bunker Company (Apgujeong Branch)
excerpt_short: Precision roasting, innovative processing, champion barista's art.
excerpt_long: Award-winning Q-grader Park Seung-kyu crafts complex, balanced coffee artistry with precision and passion.
summary: Bunker Company: Award-winning Q-grader Park Seung-kyu infuses every roast with precision, passion, and innovative artistry, crafting complex, balanced blends with a touch of swagger.
flavour_profile: Award-winning barista, advanced processing, precise brewing, unique blends.
about:
Bunker Company: Precision, Passion, and Award-Winning Coffee Artistry

Step into the world of Bunker Company, where coffee isn't just a beverage, but an art form perfected with "a bit of swagger." At its heart is CEO Park Seung-kyu, a certified Q-grader whose expertise extends to a popular YouTube channel discussing the coffee business and brewing. His impressive accolades include winning the 2011 Espresso Thrown Down and the 2012 Barista Association of Korea's Barista Championship, cementing his status as a true master of the craft.

This philosophy of mastering fundamentals before showcasing advanced skills defines Bunker Company's unique character and commitment to excellence.Bunker Company's dedication shines through its meticulously curated coffee portfolio. They feature innovative processing methods like anaerobic fermentation, exemplified by their Costa Rica Cordillera de Fuego, boasting a bold profile with notes of cinnamon, cacao nibs, and a wine-like aroma.

Water quality is paramount, with sodium ion exchange resin filters ensuring precise flavor profiles. Their Hanam store functions as a roastery, while the Apgujeong showroom invites exploration, featuring a Marco SP9 automated pour-over with a specialized filter for choosing sweet or acidic profiles. Park Seung-kyu takes pride in crafting complex, balanced blends, believing they elevate the coffee experience beyond single-origin offerings.

name: Low Key Coffee (Seongsu Branch)
excerpt_short: Lowkey Coffee: Seoul's roastery, where each bean's true story unfolds.
excerpt_long: Lowkey Coffee: Seoul's specialty roastery since 2010. We let the coffee speak, unfolding each bean's true story through expert roasting.
summary: Lowkey Coffee, Seoul's specialty roastery, passionately crafts exceptional coffee since 2010. We let the bean's true story unfold, championing its inherent character through expert roasting and sensory education.
flavour_profile: Seoul specialty, sensory education, coffee speaks.
about:
Lowkey Coffee: Where the Bean's True Story Unfolds

Lowkey Coffee, a distinguished specialty coffee roastery rooted in the vibrant city of Seoul, Korea, has been passionately crafting exceptional coffee since its inception in 2010. With a decade and a half of expertise, they've cultivated a unique presence, now operating six inviting coffee shops across the city.

Their philosophy, "The coffee speaks for itself," isn't just a motto; it's the very soul of their operation, reflecting a deep commitment to quality and the inherent character of each bean, allowing its true essence to shine through.Beyond their expertly roasted beans and welcoming cafes, Lowkey Coffee extends its passion for the craft through comprehensive sensory classes.

These educational experiences, including an intensive weekend course, are designed for both budding enthusiasts eager to master cupping techniques and those seeking a systematic understanding of coffee. This dedication to education and the pure expression of coffee flavor truly defines the Lowkey Coffee experience, inviting everyone to discover the nuanced stories held within each meticulously prepared cup.

name: Identity Coffee Lab
excerpt_short: Rare varietals, precise roasting, clean, clear essence for an unforgettable coffee.
excerpt_long: Discover coffee's true art. We meticulously roast rare varietals, from spiced eucalyptus Sidra to minty El Puente, for a 'Clean, Clear, Essence' in every cup.
summary: Discover coffee as art. This roastery masters rare, experimental varietals like Washed Ecuador Alaska Del Sur Sidra, revealing unique notes of spiced eucalyptus, mint, and pistachio. Their 'Clean, Clear, Essence' philosophy elevates every cup.
flavour_profile: Rare varietals, precise craft, distinctive profiles, refined brewing.
about:
The Essence of Extraordinary Coffee

Step into a world where coffee is an art form, meticulously crafted to reveal its purest expression. This specialty coffee haven is renowned for its commitment to rare and experimental varietals, such as the captivating Washed Ecuador Alaska Del Sur Sidra, celebrated for its complex notes of spiced eucalyptus and herbs. Their portfolio also features highly distinctive profiles like the Washed Honduras El Puente, offering unique "green tones," a refreshing "minty quality," and a rare "pistachio" finish.

At its heart lies a philosophy of "Clean, Clear, Essence," guiding every precise process to ensure consistent results and unwavering value in each cup.This dedication extends beyond sourcing, with a profound commitment to optimizing coffee presentation. Through specific brewing adjustments—whether it's a V60, April brewer, or Chemex with precise temperature and extraction tweaks—they expertly manage and highlight nuanced flavor characteristics, balancing "developed qualities" to perfection.

Their coffee descriptions paint a picture of sophisticated palates, from blends boasting "restrained acidity," "sweet caramel," "luxurious nuts," and "toast aroma," to others with "clean and refreshing" or even "smoky" aftertastes, showcasing a truly diverse and refined roasting approach that elevates every sip into an unforgettable experience.

name: Center Coffee (Seoul Forest Branch)
excerpt_short: Seoul's hidden gem: master barista's sensory science, rare Geishas, unique lattes.
excerpt_long: Seoul's hidden gem by UK champ Sang-ho Park. Experience rare Geishas & unique lattes in a sensory sanctuary with Seoul Forest views.
summary: Seoul Forest's hidden gem, led by UK champion Sang-ho Park, offers rare Geishas & unique lattes. A sensory sanctuary where scientific artistry meets open roasting & serene forest views.
flavour_profile: Rare Geisha, sensory mastery, hidden gem, unique lattes.
about:
Seoul's Hidden Gem: A Master Barista's Sensory Sanctuary

Founded by the illustrious Sang-ho Park, a double UK champion in Brewers Cup (2013) and Coffee in Good Spirits (2015), this specialty coffee haven is a testament to his profound expertise. Formerly Head of Quality at East-London's Square Mile Coffee Roasters, Park, armed with a Master's in Sensory Science, meticulously curates a selection of high-end, rare coffee varieties.

His vision focuses on offering exquisite Geishas from origins like Colombia and Costa Rica, embodying a scientific pursuit of unparalleled flavor and quality.Tucked away in a converted residential building in Seoul Forest, its "hidden gem" allure is amplified by the absence of a visible sign. Inside, the first floor buzzes with the craft of roasting and brewing, openly inviting observation. Each cup is accompanied by a detailed sheet, fostering customer education, while home brewers benefit from comprehensive online recipes.

Distinctive signature lattes, like the traditional Korean Mugwort (Ssuk) and an indulgent Iced Peanut Butter, complement the experience. The second floor's bar seating and rooftop offer serene views of Seoul Forest, completing a truly immersive coffee journey.

name: Coffee Libre (Yeonnam Branch)
excerpt_short: Pioneering Korea's Third Wave with a free spirit, direct trade & impact.
excerpt_long: Coffee Libre: Korea's 3rd wave pioneer. Direct trade, sustainable, high-quality coffee, roasted with a free spirit and passion for impact.
summary: Coffee Libre: Korea's pioneering roastery, led by its first Q Grader. We embody a free spirit, fighting for exceptional, direct-trade coffee & empowering producers globally.
flavour_profile: Q Grader founder, direct trade, global impact, public cupping.
about:
Coffee Libre: Pioneering Korea's Third Wave with a Free Spirit

Coffee Libre, founded in 2009 by South Korea's first Q Grader, Pil Hoon Seu, stands as a beacon of the nation's third-wave coffee movement. More than just a roastery, it embodies a unique spirit of determination, reflected in its iconic Lucha Libre mask logo—a nod to fighting for a dream and the freedom "libre" represents. Pil Hoon Seu's journey from academia to coffee pioneer is fueled by an unwavering passion, meticulously cultivating direct trade relationships with over 150 farms across 18 countries.

This commitment ensures a diverse portfolio of high-quality, sustainable coffees, roasted to perfection across a wide spectrum to suit every palate.Coffee Libre's soul lies in its dedication to being a "messenger of great coffee," prioritizing impact over mere profit. Pil Hoon Seu's hands-on approach extends to spending months at origin, fostering genuine connections and even establishing a roastery in Guatemala to empower local producers.

This pioneering spirit is evident in their commitment to education, historically offering free tastings and currently hosting public cuppings every Wednesday at 6:30 p.m. at their YeonNam branch. Coffee Libre doesn't just serve coffee; it shares a philosophy, inviting enthusiasts to explore the depths of specialty coffee culture.

name: Namusairo Coffee
excerpt_short: Namusairo: Seoul's soulful roastery, natural coffee, rare processes, crafted with soul.
excerpt_long: Namusairo, since 2002, crafts natural specialty coffee with soul. Their "thinking hands" explore rare origins & experimental roasts for unparalleled sensory joy.
summary: Namusairo, since 2002, crafts natural specialty coffee with soul. Their "thinking hands" philosophy, direct farmer ties, and experimental roasts reveal each bean's unique charm, fostering joy in every cup.
flavour_profile: Direct Sourcing, Precise Roasting, Rare Processes, Natural.
about:
Namusairo: Crafting Natural Specialty Coffee with Soul Since 2002

Since its establishment in Seoul in 2002, Namusairo has cultivated a distinctive presence in the specialty coffee world. Their journey is rooted in a profound commitment to "material aesthetics," valuing coffee that is inherently "natural" rather than merely "special." This philosophy drives their continuous visits to coffee origins, fostering direct communication with farmers and producers to secure exceptional ingredients.

Back in their roastery, a meticulous approach to "logical roasting" combined with thorough quality control ensures that the diverse charms of each coffee bean are perfectly highlighted, delivering an unparalleled sensory experience.Namusairo's dedication extends to their "thinking hands" philosophy, a testament to their pursuit of continuous improvement through thoughtful craftsmanship and small, impactful changes.

This innovative spirit is evident in their curated coffee portfolio, which frequently features rare and experimental processing methods, such as the intriguing "Uragga Anaerobic" and "Shakisso Carbonic" from Ethiopia. Beyond the cup, Namusairo embodies "the joy of being together," fostering an organic harmony between work and daily life, built on mutual help and shared effort, creating a truly unique and soulful coffee destination.

name: Elixir Bunn Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Riyadh's Deco Temple: Saudi tradition, Third Wave coffee, unique spiced blends.
excerpt_long: Elixir Bunn: Riyadh's "Deco Temple" blends Islamic heritage with modern design, offering unique Saudi coffee blends and global third-wave excellence.
summary: Riyadh's Elixir Bunn, a 'Deco Temple,' masterfully roasts global and spiced Saudi specialty coffees. It's where traditional rituals meet the third wave, offering an unparalleled coffee journey.
flavour_profile: Deco Temple, Saudi blends, micro-lots, coffee education
about:
Elixir Bunn: Riyadh's Deco Temple of Coffee, Bridging Tradition and Third Wave

Step into Elixir Bunn's Riyadh café, an architectural marvel dubbed the "Deco Temple," where Azaz Architects' award-winning design seamlessly blends traditional Islamic heritage with minimalist modernity. This unique space is the culmination of a journey that began with a transformative espresso experience in Tokyo, inspiring its founders to depart from corporate careers and introduce unparalleled specialty coffee to Saudi Arabia.

More than just a roastery, Elixir Bunn acts as a vital cultural bridge, fostering appreciation for the global "third wave" movement while honoring traditional Saudi coffee rituals, all underpinned by a deep commitment to customer education.At the heart of their craft lies a high-end German drum roaster, ensuring precise and consistent profiles for meticulously sourced single-origin, micro-lot, and organic beans from premier regions worldwide.

A true testament to their unique vision are the hyper-local Saudi coffee blends, like the Southern Region Blend, artfully infused with traditional spices such as cardamom, cloves, saffron, and ginger. This dedication to quality and authenticity fueled an impressive 220% organic growth, proving that exceptional coffee, shared with passion and knowledge, truly resonates with a discerning community.
address: 7157 Salem Bin Maaqil Al Nakheel Dist 4133، An Nakheel, Riyadh 12392, Saudi Arabia

name: % Arabica Coffee
excerpt_short: % Arabica: Global minimalist roastery, meticulous extraction, world-class latte art.
excerpt_long: Born from a global vision, % Arabica blends minimalist design with world-class coffee, inviting you to See the World Through Coffee.
summary: Experience % Arabica: A global journey of minimalist design and unparalleled coffee. From Kyoto's serene influence to custom Slayer machines, we invite you to 'See the World Through Coffee'.
flavour_profile: Kyoto minimalism, custom Slayer, champion latte art, global.
about:
% Arabica: A Global Journey Through Minimalist Coffee Excellence

Born from a profound personal journey, % Arabica was founded by Kenneth Shoji, whose experience after the 2011 Tōhoku earthquake inspired him to purchase a coffee farm in Hawaii. This pivotal moment ignited a passion that blossomed into a global brand, driven by the motto "See the World Through Coffee," reflecting Shoji's love for travel and design.

Elevating their craft, Shoji famously persuaded world latte art champion Junichi Yamaguchi to join as head barista, ensuring every cup is a testament to unparalleled skill and dedication.The soul of % Arabica is deeply rooted in its minimalist aesthetic, drawing heavily from Japanese principles of simple beauty and the serene influence of its global flagship in Kyoto.

Each location is a unique architectural collaboration, designed to create an immersive experience. At the heart of their operation are custom-made Slayer espresso machines, renowned for their patented needle-valve technology, allowing for meticulous flow rate control and exceptional coffee extraction. Further demonstrating their commitment, % Arabica is actively pursuing a sustainability initiative, transitioning to biodegradable paper cups and phasing out all plastic containers.
address: Al Takhassousi, Al Mohammadiyyah, Riyadh 11564, Saudi Arabia

name: OVER UNDER
excerpt_short: Over Under: London's unpretentious, high-energy coffee & mocktail bar, now in Riyadh.
excerpt_long: Over Under: London's unpretentious coffee vibe, now in Riyadh. High-energy, friendly, flips to a mocktail bar. Exceptional quality, no fuss.
summary: Over Under: London's unpretentious coffee culture, now in Riyadh. High-energy, friendly, and transforms into a vibrant mocktail bar. Enjoy exceptional quality, direct-sourced beans, and a hospitality-first experience.
flavour_profile: NYC energy, Kiwi-Brit spirit, coffee by day, mocktails by night.
about:
Over Under: London's Unpretentious Coffee Vibe, Now in Riyadh

Born from founder Ed Barry's New York City nanny days, Over Under rejects the pretentious coffee scene, instead cultivating a high-energy, friendly atmosphere. The name itself is a playful nod to his Kiwi mother ("Down Under") and British father ("Over"), embodying a unique heritage.

This specialty coffee haven is dedicated to delivering exceptional quality without the fuss, aiming to brighten each customer's day with a positive and welcoming experience.Beyond its daytime charm, Over Under uniquely "flips" into a vibrant mocktail bar after hours, offering a dynamic evening ambiance.

Their commitment to quality is evident in their collaborative roasting partnership with London's renowned Assembly Coffee, ensuring distinctive and high-standard flavor profiles. Further enhancing their unique offerings, they maintain a direct sourcing relationship with progressive coffee producer Mio. Originally a beloved independent chain in London, Over Under brings its distinctive hospitality-first approach and fun-loving coffee culture to Riyadh as a new franchise.
address: 2941 طريق مكة المكرمة الفرعي، Al Hada, Riyadh 12912, Saudi Arabia

name: Coyard Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Coyard: Saudi Arabia's artistic roastery, innovative brews, culturally rich.
excerpt_long: Coyard: Saudi Arabia's specialty coffee soul. Visionary roasting, artistic ambiance, and innovative brews redefine your coffee journey.
summary: Coyard: Saudi Arabia's visionary specialty roastery. Experience meticulously roasted global beans, innovative blends like Iced Roselle & Apricot, and an artistic, culturally rich coffee journey.
flavour_profile: Signature blends, global beans, education, artistic vibe.
about:
Coyard: A Journey into Saudi Arabia's Specialty Coffee Soul

Coyard, established in 2018, has rapidly ascended to become one of Saudi Arabia's most influential specialty coffee roasteries, guided by the visionary Ghanem Al-Youssef, a recognized figure in the Saudi coffee community. Their commitment extends beyond exceptional coffee to a passion for education, sharing knowledge about diverse beans and preparation methods to deepen customer appreciation.

With an artistic ambiance, particularly at their AlJadidah Arts District location, Coyard cultivates a unique and culturally integrated experience, reflecting a vibrant and creative spirit.At the heart of Coyard's offerings are globally sourced beans from esteemed regions like Ethiopia and Uganda, meticulously roasted in-house. They celebrate the nuances of each origin through diverse artisanal brewing methods, including V60, Chemex, and Aeropress.

Beyond classic preparations, Coyard distinguishes itself with innovative beverage creations, such as their signature "Iced Roselle and Apricot Blend Ice Drip," showcasing a creative spirit and dedication to flavor exploration that truly sets them apart in the specialty coffee scene.
address: King Saud Rd, As Sulimaniyah, Riyadh 12621, Saudi Arabia

name: PEAKS DC
excerpt_short: Upstate camp vibe roastery: mental health, direct trade, community.
excerpt_long: Upstate NY camp vibe roastery. Crafting community & mental wellness through direct-trade, sustainable coffee. Embrace life's peaks & valleys.
summary: More than coffee, it's an Upstate camp-vibe haven brewing mental wellness and community. Savor direct-trade beans in a rustic escape, where every cup connects and inspires resilience.
flavour_profile: Mental wellness, direct trade, Upstate vibe, sustainable, community.
about:
Upstate Soul, Global Beans: Crafting a Community

More than just a coffee roastery, this unique establishment brews with a profound mission rooted in mental health advocacy, inspired by the founder's personal journey through anxiety and the philosophy of embracing life's "peaks and valleys." What began unconventionally – roasting beans on a cast-iron skillet during a snowstorm – has blossomed into a haven with an intentionally curated "Upstate New York camp vibe."

This distinctive aesthetic creates an atmosphere that feels both rustic and inviting, a true escape where every sip tells a story of resilience and connection.Their commitment to quality is evident in every roast, collaborating with a professional consultant to ensure consistency and excellence. This dedication extends to their sourcing, establishing direct trade relationships with esteemed coffee producers in Colombia through a partnership with Campesino Specialty Coffee.

Beyond the bean, sustainability is paramount, with all coffee packaged in 100% recyclable materials. Ultimately, this roastery was founded with the explicit goal of fostering a safe and welcoming space, inviting people from all walks of life to connect, build community, and find solace in a shared love for exceptional coffee.
address: PJRM+RW7, An Nakheel, Riyadh 12382, Saudi Arabia

name: Atmosphere Specialty Coffee
excerpt_short: Riyadh's soulful brew: exceptional single-origin coffee, warm community hub.
excerpt_long: Riyadh's specialty coffee haven: minimalist design meets warm community, exceptional single-origin brews, unique treats, and soulful vibes.
summary: Riyadh's specialty coffee haven: minimalist design meets warm community, offering meticulously curated single-origin pour-overs, unique treats, and a vibrant social hub. Experience exceptional taste and spirit.
flavour_profile: Curated single-origins, skilled baristas, unique treats, community hub.
about:
Riyadh's Soulful Brew: Where Community Thrives

Step into a specialty coffee haven that masterfully blends minimalist design with inviting warmth, consciously sidestepping the sterile feel of some modern cafes. Bathed in natural light and adorned with leafy accents, this space transforms from a daytime sanctuary for freelancers and students into a lively evening social hub.

At its heart is a meticulously curated selection of single-origin pour-over beans, featuring exquisite Ethiopia Guji (jasmine, chocolate, honey) and El Salvador Emilio (Hershey's chocolate, caramel, honey). Their "coffee of the day" offers a delightful choice between these exceptional Ethiopian and Salvadorian profiles, expertly prepared by a skilled team.

Beyond the exceptional coffee, this Riyadh gem delights with unique sweet treats, from salted cookies and chocolate tarts to delightful coconut bites. Don't miss their signature hot chocolate, a comforting embrace served in a chocolate-rimmed cup, fragrant with cinnamon and nutmeg. Despite its bustling popularity, service remains remarkably efficient and friendly. With charming indoor and popular outdoor seating, and accessible pricing for the Riyadh specialty coffee scene, it’s a place that truly embodies community spirit and exceptional taste.
address: الأمير أحمد بن عبدالعزيز، حي، King Fahd, Riyadh 12272, Saudi Arabia

name: IDMI Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Exclusive gateway to coffee's rarest gems: Yemen, Geisha, Saudi specialty.
excerpt_long: A decade of expertise, meticulously roasting rare Yemen micro-lots & Panama Geisha. Discover coffee's extraordinary gems.
summary: Discover unparalleled coffee excellence since 2013. We specialize in rare Yemen micro-lots (Katba Jafar), Panama Geisha, and Saudi's Shada Al-Ala, meticulously roasted for an extraordinary cup.
flavour_profile: Rare microlots, Yemen, Saudi, Geisha, curated boxes.
about:
A Decade of Distinction: Unveiling Coffee's Rarest Gems

Step into a world where coffee is an art form, meticulously sourced and expertly roasted. With a rich heritage dating back to 2013, this roastery has cultivated a reputation for unparalleled excellence and a relentless pursuit of the extraordinary. Their soul is steeped in the thrill of discovery, offering an exclusive gateway to the "Best of Yemen" auction micro-lots, including the legendary Katba Jafar, Shameran XI, and Hameed Subaih.

This commitment extends to showcasing high-end, rare varietals like the exquisite Panama Geisha from Abu Coffee, promising a truly luxurious and unforgettable cup.Beyond these celebrated rarities, the roastery champions a diverse global tapestry of single-origin coffees, from the vibrant notes of Ethiopia and Colombia to the intriguing profiles of Papua New Guinea and Bolivia.

A unique dedication to local specialty coffee shines through their offering from Saudi Arabia's "Shada Al-Ala" region in Al Baha, reflecting a deep connection to origin. To further elevate the coffee journey, they curate specialized collections like the "Luxury Box" and "Travel Box," inviting enthusiasts to explore a spectrum of meticulously chosen tasting experiences.
address: شارع رقم 48، حي العليا،، Al Olaya, Riyadh 12212, Saudi Arabia

name: Breehant Coffee Roastery
excerpt_short: African soul, Saudi craft, freshly roasted, globally sourced coffee.
excerpt_long: Experience the vibrant fusion of African soul and Saudi coffee craft. Freshly roasted, globally sourced beans promise an unparalleled, holistic coffee journey.
summary: Where African soul meets Saudi coffee craft. Discover unparalleled freshness with on-site roasted, globally sourced beans, from vibrant Colombian varietals to traditional Ethiopian Saudi coffee. A holistic coffee journey awaits.
flavour_profile: African flair, fresh roasts, rare varietals, education, beyond coffee.
about:
Where African Soul Meets Saudi Coffee Craft

Step into a world where the vibrant soul of Africa beautifully intertwines with Saudi coffee craftsmanship. This distinctive roastery, with its unique African flair, invites you to experience coffee at its peak. With beans roasted on-site, the air is perpetually filled with intoxicating aromas, promising unparalleled freshness in every cup. A dedicated team of specialists meticulously sources and curates exceptional coffee crops from around the globe, ensuring only the most distinctive beans make it to your brew.

Their portfolio boasts exquisite, high-altitude Colombian varietals, including a Cauca bursting with notes of jasmine, grapefruit, mandarin, and plum, alongside a Huila Excelso offering green lemon, watermelon berry, and papaya. For a taste of tradition, their Ethiopian-sourced Saudi Coffee presents a light roast with subtle flavors, perfect for traditional brewing.

Beyond the cup, their commitment to coffee education shines through guides on grinding and cultivation. The experience extends to an extensive menu featuring specialty matcha, granola, and even a unique coffee-based body scrub, reflecting a truly holistic approach to coffee culture.
address: Olaya St, Alyasmin, Riyadh 13325، Olaya St, Alyasmin, Riyadh 14261, Saudi Arabia

name: Bossco Roastery
excerpt_short: Global beans, modern art, soft industrial design, and gourmet pairings.
excerpt_long: Bossco Roastery: where soft industrial design, global single-origin coffees, and striking art converge for an unforgettable sensory journey.
summary: Global single-origin coffees meet modern artistry in Bossco Roastery's soft industrial space. Striking murals, diverse brews, and gourmet desserts craft an unforgettable experience.
flavour_profile: Global single-origins, modern industrial, brew bar, gourmet desserts.
about:
Bossco Roastery: Where Global Flavors Meet Modern Artistry

Step into Bossco Roastery and discover a unique sanctuary where the art of coffee meets a distinctive "soft industrial" aesthetic. Clean white lines provide a minimalist backdrop, dramatically contrasted by a striking mural of a woman, rendered in mustard yellow, black, and white, that commands attention and infuses the space with modern artistry.

This thoughtful design creates an inviting and inspiring atmosphere, perfect for savoring exceptional coffee. It's a place where every detail, from the visual appeal to the aroma, contributes to an unforgettable experience.Bossco Roastery prides itself on a meticulously curated coffee portfolio, featuring single-origin beans from diverse regions like Uganda, Indonesia, El Salvador, Ethiopia, Costa Rica, and Colombia. Beyond a comprehensive espresso menu, their dedicated brew bar offers an exploration of manual methods, including exquisite filter coffees, refreshing cold drips, and invigorating cold brews.

For those seeking to extend the experience, Bossco’s own house blends, complete with detailed flavor notes, are available for purchase. Complementing these world-class coffees are gourmet dessert pairings, such as the perfectly spiced date cake with cardamom and the unique kenafah cheesecake, elevating every visit into a culinary journey.
address: Olaya St, Al Olaya, Riyadh 12222, Saudi Arabia

name: Camel Step Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Camel Step: Saudi's pioneering roastery, heritage, education, and award-winning coffee.
excerpt_long: Camel Step pioneered Saudi specialty coffee, blending award-winning design with local heritage and a knowledge-first approach to exceptional brews.
summary: Pioneering Saudi specialty coffee since 2013, Camel Step blends award-winning architectural heritage with a knowledge-first approach, offering diverse, uniquely processed coffees and fostering local talent.
flavour_profile: Saudi pioneer, heritage design, rare origins, unique processing.
about:
Camel Step: Pioneering Saudi Specialty Coffee with Soul and Heritage

Camel Step Roastery isn't just a coffee shop; it's a movement that pioneered the specialty coffee market in Saudi Arabia since 2013, driven by a vision to elevate coffee quality and knowledge in the region. Their "knowledge-first" approach is evident in their dedication to educating the community and fostering local talent, training Saudi youth in the intricate world of coffee sourcing and preparation.

Each café is a testament to their unique character, showcasing architecturally significant designs that weave in local heritage and materials—from traditional burnt clay bricks in Makkah to natural granite in Hail, and the indigenous atmosphere of Abha, crafted with Asir's Stone and Juniper trees.Beyond their stunning spaces, Camel Step's coffee portfolio is equally compelling, featuring a diverse range of origins and unique processing methods, such as an intriguing aerobic fermentation coffee from Mexico and a rare Bourion varietal from Brazil.

This commitment to excellence extends to their physical spaces, with one of their coffee shops proudly receiving an ArchDaily Building of the Year award in 2025. Camel Step embodies a blend of innovation, education, and deep respect for both coffee and local culture, creating an unparalleled experience for every visitor.
address: Abi Bakr As Siddiq Rd, حي التعاون، Abi Bakr As Siddiq Rd, حي التعاون،، Riyadh 12475, Saudi Arabia

name: Brew92
excerpt_short: Brew92: Saudi's visionary roastery. Exclusive, blind-tasted, award-winning coffee.
excerpt_long: Brew92: Saudi Arabia's visionary roastery, blending global specialty coffee excellence with award-winning design and a unique Saudi soul.
summary: Brew92: Saudi Arabia's visionary specialty coffee roastery. Meticulously sourced, globally acclaimed beans, blind-tasted for unparalleled consistency. Experience global standards with a distinctive Saudi soul.
flavour_profile: Q Grader, COE auctions, SCA trained, sustainable design
about:
Brew92: Saudi Arabia's Visionary Specialty Coffee Destination

Brew92, named for the ideal 92°C brewing temperature and founder Abdul Aziz Al-Musbahi's birth year, redefines Saudi Arabia's coffee landscape. Inspired by London's leisure coffee culture, Al-Musbahi created a modern alternative to traditional Arabic coffee places. Their commitment to quality is paramount: a Q Grader meticulously selects all green beans, and they actively source exclusive coffees through Cup of Excellence auctions.

Brew92 famously purchased Gori Gesha beans at the 2018 Gesha Village Coffee Estate auction for a then-record $105 per pound. All staff, from baristas to roasters, are professionally trained to Specialty Coffee Association (SCA) standards.The unique character of Brew92 extends to its award-winning interiors, crafted by British studio Liqui Design, recognized with accolades like the 2022 Luxury Lifestyle Award. Their cafes prioritize sustainability, utilizing sustainably sourced furniture and energy-efficient concepts.

An artistic touch in one Riyadh location is a carpet visually representing a coffee's flavor profile. To guarantee unparalleled consistency, all coffee roasts are tasted blind, preventing bias and ensuring an exceptional experience. Brew92 offers a curated journey into specialty coffee, blending global standards with a distinctive Saudi Arabian soul.
address: Uthman Ibn Affan Rd, Hai، Riyadh 13317, Saudi Arabia

name: The Roasting House
excerpt_short: Saudi pioneer: award-winning roastery, innovative flavors, fostering coffee culture.
excerpt_long: The Roasting House: Saudi Arabia's pioneering roaster, crafting award-winning, innovative coffees from funky blends to heritage beans.
summary: The Roasting House: Saudi Arabia's pioneering specialty coffee roaster. A decade of award-winning innovation, crafting unique "Funky Coffee" blends and heritage beans, meticulously roasted for exceptional flavor.
flavour_profile: Award-winning, innovative, funky, heritage, educational, Saudi.
about:
The Roasting House: A Decade of Pioneering Excellence and Flavor Innovation

Step into the world of The Roasting House, a true pioneer in Saudi Arabia's specialty coffee scene, boasting over a decade of experience and a relentless pursuit of coffee perfection. They were among the first to introduce specialty coffee capsules to the local market, setting a high bar for quality and accessibility. Their commitment to innovation was recently celebrated at the World of Coffee Dubai 2024, where their "Mini Mix Box" and "Roasting House My Cafe Box" — featuring six ready-to-make coffee envelopes — clinched the prestigious "Best New Coffee Product" award from the Specialty Coffee Association (SCA).

Beyond their award-winning products, The Roasting House is dedicated to fostering coffee culture through workshops and training, all while employing modern roasting techniques to meticulously highlight the natural flavors of each bean.Their coffee portfolio is a vibrant tapestry of unique creations and deeply rooted heritage. Explore their "Funky Coffee" line with unconventional delights like the "Bounty Oasis," a captivating blend of prominent coconut notes with hints of milk chocolate and cherries. For the purists, their single-origin offerings, such as the "Colombia Agustino" from the Coagustinos association, come with hyper-specific sourcing details, including altitude and varietal.

Discover heritage coffees like the "Java Estate Blawan," a significant Typica varietal, or indulge in creative espresso blends like the evocative "Tiramisu - Dark Roast" and the classic "Mocha Java." They even craft specialized Saudi coffee blends, "Al Sahbaa" and "Al Safraa," using heirloom varietals, and innovate beyond coffee with unique bottled beverages like the refreshing hibiscus-based "Ghjr."
address: King Abdulaziz Rd, Al Masif, almassif, الرياض 12465, Saudi Arabia

name: A Certain Café
excerpt_short: Art-infused filter coffee haven, showcasing European roasters & manual brews.
excerpt_long: Art-infused café by artists, exclusively serving expertly brewed filter coffee from top European roasters in a minimalist, creative space.
summary: Art-infused, filter-only coffee haven by artists, showcasing European roasters & diverse manual brews. Experience curated coffee, natural wines, and a unique aesthetic.
flavour_profile: Espresso-free, art-infused, multi-roaster, natural wine.
about:
Where Art Meets the Art of Filter Coffee

Step into a realm where creativity flows as freely as the expertly brewed coffee. Founded by artist Matias Romano and jewelry designer Agustina Fortunato, this unique café is a testament to their distinct aesthetic vision. Making a bold statement, it operates exclusively without an espresso machine, dedicating itself entirely to the nuanced world of filter coffee.

The coffee program is a meticulously curated multi-roaster showcase, featuring exceptional beans from esteemed European roasters like Amsterdam's Dak Coffee Roasters and Spain's Hola Coffee Roasters, promising a diverse and evolving tasting journey for every visit.The interior reflects its founders' artistic spirit: a bright, uncluttered space with high ceilings, minimalistic décor, and striking accents of art, sculptures, and retro glassware.

Here, the craft of filter coffee is celebrated through a wide range of manual brewing methods, including AeroPress, Kalita, V60, and a Moccamaster for batch brews. Specialty coffee drinkers particularly laud their expertly prepared V60. To elevate the drip-only experience, the menu offers creative coffee descriptions and multiple portion sizes. Beyond coffee, a thoughtful selection of natural wines and ciders completes this truly distinctive establishment.
address: R. do Morgado de Mateus 107, 4000-334 Porto

name: Kuji Coffee and Community
excerpt_short: Kuji: Porto's tranquil haven, brewing community, culture, and exceptional coffee.
excerpt_long: Kuji: A tranquil Porto haven where exceptional coffee, minimalist design, and a vibrant community blend to uplift your mind.
summary: Kuji: A tranquil specialty coffee haven where community brews with every mindful sip. Enjoy exceptional coffee, curated delights, and enriching cultural events in a minimalist space designed to gently uplift your spirit.
flavour_profile: Community hub, minimalist design, specialty coffee, remote work.
about:
Kuji: Where Community Brews with Tranquility

Step into Kuji, a specialty coffee haven born from the shared vision of barista Kirill Eremenko and writer/cultural producer Francis Espíndola. More than just a café, Kuji embodies a philosophy of simplicity and honesty, designed to gently uplift your state of mind with every visit. Its minimalist interior, adorned with light earth tones, fosters a tranquil and harmonious atmosphere, a deliberate choice to avoid overstimulation and align with a mindful coffee experience.

This pet-friendly establishment thrives as a vibrant community hub, featuring a shared library and regularly hosting enriching cultural events, from poetry readings to plant swaps.Kuji proudly sources its specialty coffee beans from Prolog Coffee Roasters, with patrons consistently praising their exceptional double espresso as a standout offering. The food menu is thoughtfully concise, presenting a rotating selection of homemade international dishes crafted to perfectly complement their coffee.

A delightful "cake of the day" changes frequently, showcasing a variety of recipes including honey, cheesecake, and carrot cake. Recognized as a prime location for remote work in Porto, Kuji offers a unique blend of quality coffee, curated culinary delights, and a welcoming, inspiring environment.
address: R. do Dr. Carlos Pires de Lima 75, 4200-156 Porto

name: My Coffee Porto
excerpt_short: Porto's coffee craft pinnacle: fresh roasts, inventive drinks, stunning Douro views.
excerpt_long: Porto's coffee pinnacle: expert roasts, inventive drinks, and breathtaking Douro views from an artistic haven. Freshness guaranteed.
summary: Porto's coffee pinnacle: expert roasts by Senzu's master, fresh to order. Enjoy inventive drinks & breathtaking Douro views from our historic, "Instagrammable" terrace.
flavour_profile: Expert roasts, inventive sips, iconic Porto views, creative hub
about:
Porto's Pinnacle of Coffee Craft and Panoramic Views

This specialty coffee haven in Porto offers an unparalleled experience, deeply rooted in expert craftsmanship. Their exceptional coffee comes from local Senzu Coffee Roasters, whose founder is not only a university-level coffee roasting instructor but also a co-founder and instructor at abcoffee, Porto's first Specialty Coffee Association (SCA) approved coffee school.

Every espresso and filter coffee is roasted to order, guaranteeing peak freshness. Beyond classic preparations, discover inventive signature drinks like the refreshing "Orange Cold Brew" and "Espresso Tonic," alongside meticulous pour-over service using V60 and Chemex brewers for manual brewing aficionados.Despite its intimate size, this establishment is celebrated as one of Porto's top specialty coffee shops, boasting a prime location on the historic Escadas do Codeçal.

Its highly scenic and "Instagrammable" terrace provides iconic, breathtaking views of the Douro River and the vibrant city. The connection to Senzu, integrated within an artistic co-working space, further imbues the spot with Porto's creative and artisanal spirit, offering a unique blend of world-class coffee and an unforgettable atmosphere.

name: Early
excerpt_short: Porto's vintage gem: espresso, seasonal fare, Vernazza roasts, larder, dinner.
excerpt_long: Porto's vintage gem: espresso, seasonal fare, and soul. Featuring local Vernazza beans, house-made delights, and weekend dinners.
summary: Porto's vintage gem: exquisite espresso from local Vernazza Roasters, paired with seasonal, scratch-made delights. Explore our larder or enjoy cozy weekend dinners.
flavour_profile: Timeless espresso, single origin, seasonal eats, larder, dinner.
about:
Porto's Vintage Gem: Espresso, Seasonal Fare, and Soul

Step into a bygone era at this enchanting Porto coffee haven, where warm wood paneling and vintage-inspired design transport you to a simpler time. This isn't just a café; it's an experience, meticulously crafted to evoke nostalgic charm. Here, the art of coffee is celebrated through an exclusive dedication to espresso-based drinks, a deliberate choice highlighting the purity and intensity of each cup.

They proudly partner with local artisans, sourcing exceptional single-origin beans from Porto's own Vernazza Coffee Roasters, ensuring every shot is a testament to quality and local collaboration.Beyond the exquisite coffee, a vibrant food program awaits, built on the philosophy of seasonal ingredients and scratch-made delights. From breakfast pastries to hearty lunches, every item reflects a commitment to fresh, wholesome fare.

Adding to its distinctive character, the establishment features a charming larder, inviting patrons to take a piece of the experience home with a selection of house-made goods. This unique spot transcends the typical café model, transforming into a cozy dinner destination on weekends, offering a truly immersive culinary journey from morning till night.

name: Booínga - Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Booínga: African heritage, community hub, unique blends & local treats.
excerpt_long: Booínga: Carlos Vieira's Angolan heritage infuses this community coffee hub, offering unique single-origin brews, artisanal bread, and delightful affogatos.
summary: Booínga: Carlos Vieira's Angolan heritage infuses this specialty coffee roastery, a vibrant community hub offering exquisite single-origin beans, local artisanal treats, and a warm, personalized experience.
flavour_profile: African heritage, curated single-origins, local treats, community.
about:
Booínga: A Taste of Heritage and Community in Every Cup

Step into Booínga, a specialty coffee haven where the deep-rooted passion of founder Carlos Vieira, born in Angola, infuses every aspect of the experience. His African heritage is not just a backstory; it's the soul of this unique café, fostering a personalized atmosphere where conversations with Carlos himself and explorations of specialty coffee magazines are part of the charm.

More than just a coffee shop, Booínga thrives as a vibrant community hub, proudly serving as a pickup point for local artisanal bread from Pão da Mó, truly connecting neighbors through shared appreciation for craft.Booínga's curated coffee portfolio reflects this global journey, featuring exquisite single-origin selections like Ethiopia Chelchele and Kenya Kirimahiga PB, alongside their signature "Two Continents Coffee Blend."

Beyond the beans, indulge in their unique affogato, a delightful creation made with artisanal ice cream from local Gelataria Portuense. Weekends bring an extra treat, with Saturdays showcasing a special menu of healthy, homemade cakes, ensuring there's always something fresh and comforting to complement your exceptional coffee experience.

name: Senzu Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Senzu: Masterful, origin-driven roasts & groundbreaking experimental flavors.
excerpt_long: Senzu masters origin-driven roasting and daring experimental flavors, ensuring peak freshness and full traceability from farm to cup.
summary: Senzu masters origin-driven roasting, pushing boundaries with experimental flavors like coconut co-ferments and lemon-infused beans. Freshly roasted, fully traceable, and uniquely delicious.
flavour_profile: Expert roaster, experimental ferments, traceable, roast-to-order.
about:
Senzu: The Art of Origin-Driven Roasting and Experimental Flavors

Senzu embodies the profound expertise of its founder and head roaster, Diogo, a respected figure who teaches university-level roasting and co-founded abcoffee, Porto's first SCA-approved coffee school. This deep knowledge underpins Senzu's philosophy: "roast according to the roots, not the rules," letting each coffee's origin dictate its perfect profile.

Their unwavering commitment to transparency means every bean is fully traceable, sourced directly from dedicated producers who share their finest cherries, ensuring unparalleled quality. For peak freshness, all coffees are roasted only after an order is placed.Innovation truly defines Senzu's captivating "Experimental Series." Here, traditional boundaries are pushed with groundbreaking processing methods, yielding truly distinctive flavor experiences.

Discover a Pink Bourbon varietal co-fermented with dehydrated coconut and coconut water, or a coffee anaerobically fermented for 144 hours, then sun-dried for 30 days with lemon peel for a vibrant citric finish. Direct relationships, like with Brayan from Finca Las Palmas in Colombia, leverage specialized facilities to craft these unique profiles, making each cup a journey of discovery.

name: Von&Vonnie Microroasters
excerpt_short: Porto's Bonfim roastery: unique origins, hedonistic experience, community hub.
excerpt_long: Porto's Bonfim roastery offers a hedonistic coffee journey, ethically sourcing unique beans and fostering a vibrant community.
summary: Porto's Bonfim hosts a unique roastery, born from global passion. Yvonne & Morgan craft a 'hedonistic' coffee experience, roasting rare beans from small co-ops and female producers, fostering community.
flavour_profile: Ethical roasts, unique origins, community hub, hedonistic coffee.
about:
A Journey of Passion: Porto's New Coffee Frontier

Born from a shared passion ignited while traveling Southeast Asia, Yvonne Spresny from Germany and Morgan von Mantripp from Wales have cultivated a unique specialty coffee experience in Porto's residential Bonfim neighborhood.

With academic roots in law and philosophy, and hands-on experience as baristas, their journey into coffee included visiting farms in Vietnam. Their commitment to fair pricing within the industry drove their decision to roast their own beans, transforming coffee from a mere beverage into a "hedonistic experience" that encourages deeper appreciation.

Utilizing a Stronghold S7 Pro for their in-house roasting, they meticulously craft their offerings, partnering with importers who champion smaller cooperatives and lesser-known origins.

This dedication is exemplified by their feature of a unique, single-varietal Kenyan Batian coffee, sourced entirely from female producer Gloria Gummerus. Beyond the café, they aspire to be a vibrant community hub, hosting educational courses, talks, and events, fostering a deeper connection to the world of specialty coffee.

name: Época Porto
excerpt_short: Porto's Nordic haven: international coffee, Michelin-honed vegetarian delights.
excerpt_long: Época Porto: A Nordic-inspired Porto sanctuary with exclusive international coffees, Michelin-level vegetarian cuisine, and legendary sourdough.
summary: Época Porto: A Nordic-inspired sanctuary in Porto's arts district, offering an exclusive international coffee program, Michelin-honed vegetarian cuisine, and legendary sourdough.
flavour_profile: International roasters, minimalist design, seasonal vegetarian, artisan sourdough.
about:
Época Porto: A Nordic-Inspired Culinary & Coffee Sanctuary in Porto's Arts District

Nestled in Porto's vibrant arts district, Época Porto stands as a testament to curated excellence, eschewing local roasting for an exclusive international program featuring renowned roasters like Denmark's La Cabra and Paris's Kawa.

This commitment to global quality is mirrored in the café's soul, shaped by co-owner Lily, whose culinary precision was honed in Copenhagen's Michelin-starred Relae. The minimalist, Nordic-inspired design, with its warm wood accents and iconic Jean Prouvé chairs, invites connection around a large communal table, while their dedication to the Kalita Wave brewer underscores a meticulous approach to every pour-over.

Beyond exceptional coffee, Época Porto captivates with a hyper-seasonal, strictly vegetarian, and organic menu, celebrating local produce with ever-changing dishes. Their in-house sourdough and pastry program is legendary, drawing locals solely for their acclaimed loaves. A must-try is their unique "Turkish Eggs"—poached eggs on dill-infused yogurt, perfectly paired with that famous house-made sourdough.

Época Porto isn't just a café; it's a cultural hub where world-class coffee, culinary artistry, and thoughtful design converge to create an unforgettable experience.

name: 7g Roaster
excerpt_short: Gaia's pioneer roastery: coffee tourism, apartments, and world-class beans.
excerpt_long: 7g Roaster pioneers Gaia's specialty coffee culture, blending a roastery, cafe, and apartments for a unique "bean to bedside" experience.
summary: Immerse in Gaia's coffee revolution at 7g Roaster. A unique "bean-to-bedside" destination blending a state-of-the-art roastery, café, and apartments for an unparalleled specialty coffee journey.
flavour_profile: Coffee tourism, WBrC, sensory sourcing, innovative processing
about:
Experience Coffee from Bean to Bedside: 7g Roaster's Unique Vision

Nestled in Gaia's historic Port wine district, 7g Roaster stands as a true pioneer, introducing a vibrant specialty coffee culture to the region. More than just a café, it's a unique "coffee tourism" destination, seamlessly blending a state-of-the-art roastery, a welcoming coffee shop, and seven modern apartments.

This holistic approach allows guests to fully immerse themselves in the world of coffee, from the meticulous roasting process to the perfect brew. At its heart is David Coelho, a distinguished 2017 World Barista Championship competitor, whose expertise guides their exceptional sourcing, roasting, and barista training.

7g Roaster's commitment to excellence is evident in their sourcing, driven by an "in-depth sensory experience" that uncovers unique profiles, often featuring innovative post-harvest processes. Their mission extends to democratizing specialty coffee, making traceable and ethically sourced beans accessible while educating consumers on coffee's profound impact. Guests staying in their apartments awaken to a thoughtful touch: a French press and pre-ground specialty coffee.

By challenging traditional Portuguese "bica" culture with lighter roasts and diverse methods, 7g Roaster is cultivating a deeper appreciation for coffee's nuanced soul and character.
address: R. de França 52, 4400-158 Vila Nova de Gaia

name: Fábrica Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Fabrica: Lisbon's pioneer, direct trade, on-site roasted, unique nautical vibe.
excerpt_long: Fabrica pioneered Lisbon's third-wave coffee, roasting unique beans on-site with a German Probat, transforming the local coffee scene.
summary: Fabrica pioneered Lisbon's third-wave coffee, roasting direct-trade beans on-site with a German Probat. From Nuremberg's inspiration, they introduced diverse brewing and a unique nautical vibe, transforming Portugal's coffee scene.
flavour_profile: Lisbon's 3rd Wave Pioneer, Direct Trade, Nautical Vibe, Probat Roasts
about:
From Nuremberg to Lisbon: Fabrica's Third-Wave Coffee Revolution

Fabrica stands as a true pioneer, igniting Lisbon's specialty coffee scene in 2015 when third-wave concepts were largely unknown. Founder Stanislav Benderski, inspired by Nuremberg's vibrant coffee culture, brought a revolutionary vision to Portugal. With a unique personal touch, his parents, Russian emigrants, run a restaurant in Lisbon, adding to the brand's rich narrative.

Fabrica wasn't just a coffee shop; it was an educational journey, introducing locals to a new world of coffee quality and diverse brewing methods. At its heart, Fabrica roasts all its beans on-site using a German Probat roaster, ensuring precise control over their distinctive profiles and a commitment to direct trade partnerships.

Beyond traditional espresso, they championed methods like V60, Aeropress, and Kalita, broadening the local palate. Their cafes boast a unique nautical-themed ambiance, a subtle nod to Portugal's seafaring heritage, creating a distinctive vibe. From innovative offerings like bottled cascara soda to earning the "People's Choice Best Coffee Shop" award, Fabrica has transformed from a local "strange animal" into Portugal's premier craft coffee destination, with locations now spanning Lisbon and Porto.

name: C'Alma Coffee Room
excerpt_short: C'alma: Porto's soulful brew bar, historic charm, mindful sips, Chemex mastery.
excerpt_long: Porto's C'alma Brew Bar offers a soulful, laptop-free retreat in a historic building, famed for Chemex and unique coffee flights.
summary: C'alma: Porto's soulful Brew Bar. A historic, laptop-free sanctuary where Chemex mastery, unique coffee flights, and piano melodies create a mindful escape. Experience genuine connection and exceptional brews.
flavour_profile: Historic Brew Bar, Calm, Unique Flights, Local Roasters
about:
C'alma: Porto's Soulful Brew Bar Experience

C'alma, a name cleverly blending "soul" (alma) and "calm" (calma), is a unique specialty coffee "Brew Bar" nestled within Porto's historic Ateneu Comercial building. Its captivating ambiance, with high ceilings, ornate windows, and traditional Portuguese tiles, immediately transports visitors.

To foster a serene environment, C'alma implements a "laptop-free" policy at designated tables, encouraging mindful enjoyment. The frequent melodies from a piano further enhance this tranquil retreat, creating a sanctuary for genuine connection and coffee appreciation.

At its core, C'alma features a prominent long wooden counter, exclusively dedicated to alternative brewing methods like V60, Chemex, and Aeropress. They are particularly renowned for their exceptional Chemex skill, highly rated by enthusiasts. Their coffee portfolio includes a house espresso blend, crafted with 7g.roasters, and a rotating selection of single-origin coffees from roasters like Underdog and Vernazzza.

Guests can explore unique "Brew Flights" and "Coffee Flights" for unparalleled tasting journeys. C'alma also actively fosters the local coffee community, organizing friendly barista battles.

name: SO Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Porto's SO Coffee Roasters: unique origins, micro-roasted, purpose-driven, distinct flavors.
excerpt_long: SO Coffee Roasters: Porto's micro-roastery, blending unique origins with a passion for social good, crafted by a symphony of diverse talents.
summary: SO Coffee Roasters: Porto's heart, where Law, Ballet & Music blend to micro-roast unique single-origin coffees. More than a brew, it's a social instrument for good, rooted in Portuguese heritage.
flavour_profile: Sudoeste micro-roasts, rare origins, social mission.
about:
SO Coffee Roasters: A Symphony of Flavor and Purpose from Porto

Born from an unexpected harmony of Law, Ballet, and Music, SO Coffee Roasters embodies a unique spirit, founded by Lisa, Pedro, and João. Their journey into specialty coffee is as captivating as the brews they craft, infusing a distinct character into every cup.

The name "SO," short for "Sudoeste" or Southwest, proudly anchors their Portuguese identity, reflecting a brand deeply rooted in its heritage and passionate about sharing it with the world.At their heart, SO Coffee Roasters micro-roasts all their exceptional beans in their dedicated facility in Porto, Portugal, ensuring unparalleled freshness and quality. Beyond the exquisite taste, their philosophy shines through: using coffee as a "social instrument to make some good."

This commitment extends to improving the lives of coffee farmers and enriching the local community. Their curated portfolio features specific single-origin coffees, including intriguing and less common varietals like the Ethiopia Kawo Kamina, offering a truly distinctive tasting experience for every discerning palate.
address: R. de Sá de Noronha 119, 4050-528 Porto

name: Combi Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Porto's pioneering roastery: visible craft, ethical sourcing, exquisite blends.
excerpt_long: Experience Porto's coffee heart: witness ethical, in-house roasting through a glass wall, savoring meticulously crafted blends and rare varietals.
summary: Porto's coffee heart, born from a van, now a vibrant roastery where you witness ethical bean magic. Meticulously crafted blends and rare varietals, rested to perfection.
flavour_profile: Ethical sourcing, rare varietals, transparent roasting, unique spaces.
about:
The Heart of Porto's Coffee Scene: A Roasting Revelation

Brothers Gonçalo and Francisco Cardoso ignited Porto's specialty coffee scene in 2014, starting their journey from an old Mercedes van, serving exceptional brews at festivals and markets for two years.

Their original café, a beautifully converted old garage designed by architects Alexandre Gamelas and Catarina Santos, exudes a bright, comfortable vibe. Here, the magic of coffee comes alive every Monday, as customers witness the entire in-house roasting process through a captivating glass wall, connecting them directly to the craft. Their commitment extends to ethical sourcing, working closely with cooperatives and producers to ensure fair prices for farmers.

The soul of their offering lies in their meticulously crafted house blend, featuring exquisite Arabica beans from Brazil, Colombia, and Guatemala. Once roasted, these precious beans are carefully rested for three days, allowing their complex flavors to fully develop before being served or packaged. Beyond their signature blend, they delight connoisseurs with rare coffee varietals, including an exceptional Caturra Chiroso from Colombia.

This dedication to quality and transparency culminated in their June 2024 expansion, opening a new, larger roastery and café near Park Serralves, continuing their remarkable coffee journey.
address: R. do Morgado de Mateus 29, 4000-334 Porto

name: Shift Espresso Bar | Green Point
excerpt_short: Shift: Cape Town's indie roastery for bold brews & connected souls.
excerpt_long: Shift Coffee: Cape Town's hub for transformation. Savor curated blends, bold signature drinks, and connect in an unconventional, inspiring space.
summary: Shift Coffee: Cape Town's indie hub for transformative brews & human connection. Experience unique blends, playful signature drinks, and an "anything-goes" vibe designed for inspiring moments.
flavour_profile: Dark indie, unique blends, creative drinks, connectivity hub.
about:
Shift: Cape Town's Hub for Unconventional Brews and Connected Souls

Shift Coffee isn't just a café; it's a testament to transformation, born from founder Luigi Vigliotti's family's significant life change in Cape Town. A former dancer with Italian roots, Luigi personally scoured 50 roasters to curate Shift's exceptional coffee, embodying the brand's mission to inspire human connectivity and challenge the café status quo.

The interior reflects this ethos with a dark-toned indie aesthetic, industrial elements like zigzagging copper light fittings, and metal piping shelves, creating an "anything-goes" ambiance designed for work, study, or simply connecting.At Shift, the coffee portfolio boasts two distinct house blends: a rich Italian and a full-bodied African, known for its thick crema and notes of chocolate and caramel. Beyond the classics, prepare for an adventure with unconventional signature drinks like "The Hashtag," "The Rebellion," and "The Italian Plumber," featuring playful ingredients such as condensed milk, Oreos, gelato, and Nutella.

This commitment to unique experiences extends to the space itself, offering free Wi-Fi, laptop plug points, and cell phone charging stations, ensuring every visit to Shift is as comfortable and inspiring as it is delicious.
address: 45 Main Rd, Green Point, Cape Town, 8005, South Africa

name: Stellski Coffee Bar
excerpt_short: Stellski: Cape Town's vibrant, kooky roastery with African-sourced Arabica.
excerpt_long: Stellski Coffee: Cape Town's vibrant, kaleidoscopic roastery. Ethically sourced African Arabica fuels joy, unique blends, and an unsinkable vibe.
summary: Stellski Coffee: Cape Town's vibrant, kaleidoscopic roastery, where ethically sourced African Arabica blends meet a joyful, unique atmosphere.
flavour_profile: African beans, Salisbury blend, kooky vibe, pet-friendly.
about:
Stellski Coffee: A Kaleidoscope of Flavor and Soul in Cape Town

Stellski Coffee, the brainchild of proprietor Megan Kritzinger, offers a vibrant and "kooky, kaleidoscopic" escape from the ordinary, challenging the conventional moody aesthetic of coffee shops with its joyful and colourful ambiance. With two locations in Cape Town, including the original in Loop Street and a café in Woodstock, Stellski cultivates an "unsinkable vibe" that celebrates good coffee, delicious food, and genuine human connection, all inspired by a beloved Staffordshire Bull Terrier named Stella.

The minimalist design, often featuring an inviting indoor courtyard with art deco elements, creates a cozy and inspiring haven, perfect for unwinding or working.At the heart of Stellski's offering are their exclusive coffee blends, crafted from 100% Arabica beans ethically sourced and direct fair trade from African producers in Ethiopia, Burundi, and Tanzania. Their renowned Salisbury Street blend, for instance, delivers a smooth dark chocolate taste with hints of toasted hazelnut and a subtle citrus overtone.

Beyond exceptional coffee, Stellski boasts an enticing all-day breakfast menu, featuring signature delights like the "Chicken Bagel" and "Fluffy Pancakes." Other popular offerings include smoked trout bagels, halloumi salads, and a variety of pastries and savoury pies, all served by friendly staff in an atmosphere praised for its outstanding service and surprisingly affordable prices.
address: 50 Long St, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town, 8000, South Africa

name: Naked Coffee
excerpt_short: Naked Coffee: Pure coffee, stripped bare. Meticulously roasted, minimalist.
excerpt_long: Naked Coffee: where fashion meets artisan coffee. Minimalist design, naked portafilters, and meticulously sourced beans reveal coffee's pure essence.
summary: Naked Coffee strips everything bare, revealing the raw beauty and inherent quality of meticulously sourced, small-batch roasted beans in minimalist, Scandinavian-inspired spaces.
flavour_profile: Naked coffee, curated design, global deli, artisan roasts.
about:
Stripped Bare: Naked Coffee's Pure Pursuit of Perfection

Born from the vision of founders who also helm a high-end clothing group, Naked Coffee emerged after an inspiring trip to Amsterdam, fusing the worlds of fashion and artisan coffee. Their philosophy is simple yet profound: to strip everything bare, focusing solely on the raw beauty and inherent quality of the coffee itself. This ethos is beautifully reflected in their Scandinavian-inspired, minimalist cafés, with one location boasting a custom interior by Studio A, featuring exquisite handmade forest green tiles and elegant leather and brass light fittings.

A nod to their name, they exclusively use naked portafilters on their Nuova Simonelli espresso machines, allowing for a truly nuanced and transparent espresso extraction. Naked Coffee's commitment to quality extends to their meticulously sourced beans, including a vibrant single-origin from El Salvador and a rich blend of Brazil and Uganda. These are roasted in small batches by a dedicated micro-roaster in Cape Town, ensuring each bean achieves a specific, pre-selected taste profile.

Beyond exceptional coffee, the brand has expanded its culinary horizons with the "Naked Kitchen & Coffee Bar," a gourmet deli bringing global food trends to Johannesburg. Their seasonal menu, curated to reflect international tastes, features unique signature dishes like "dirty eggs" and hot honey halloumi toast, cementing Naked Coffee's place as a vibrant hub for both coffee aficionados and food lovers, further enhanced by hosting events with esteemed barista champions.
address: 2 Wisbeach Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town, 8060, South Africa

name: Pauline's
excerpt_short: Pauline's: SA's first stand-up, sisal-clad coffee bar for a unique sensory journey.
excerpt_long: Pauline's: SA's first stand-up coffee bar. Experience unique single-origin coffees in a warm, sisal-clad sensory haven.
summary: Pauline's: South Africa's first stand-up coffee bar. Experience a unique sensory journey in a warm, sisal-clad space, savoring meticulously curated single-origin coffees from Rosetta.
flavour_profile: Sisal-clad stand-up bar, specialty single-origins, community.
about:
Pauline's: South Africa's First Stand-Up Coffee Bar, A Unique Sensory Experience

Pauline's, Cape Town's pioneering stand-up coffee bar, introduces a concept beloved in cities like Rome and Melbourne to South Africa. Founded by Jon-Paul (JP) Bolus, the visionary behind the renowned Loading Bay, this establishment is a heartfelt tribute to his grandmother, Pauline. It stands as a sister venture to SANS, an ethical grocer, embodying a broader vision to connect patrons with product origins and enrich the local community.

Master Studio's minimalist interior, almost entirely clad in sisal, creates a uniquely warm, tactile, and inviting atmosphere within its narrow space. This distinctive design, featuring a slanted, sisal-wrapped central counter, subtly shifts the focus from décor to the exceptional coffee experience.The heart of Pauline's lies in its meticulously curated coffee selection, supplied by Woodstock's specialty roaster, Rosetta. Patrons can explore a rotating array of single-origin coffees, each chosen for its distinct character.

Highlights include the vibrant Kenyan Ndaro-ini, celebrated for its red grape acidity; the Ethiopian Beloya OCR, offering delicate citrus and jasmine notes; and the intriguing Javanese Frinsa Collective, with its unique herbal and spice profile. This dedication to quality and a unique sensory journey defines Pauline's, making it a must-visit for discerning coffee enthusiasts.
address: 277 Main Rd, Sea Point, Cape Town, 8005, South Africa

name: Loading Bay
excerpt_short: Espresso Labs: Regenerative coffee, conscious living, ancestral nourishment.
excerpt_long: Espresso Labs: A unique sanctuary blending regenerative specialty coffee with high-end conscious living and ancestral nourishment.
summary: Espresso Labs: A sanctuary where regenerative specialty coffee meets conscious living. Explore curated high-end retail, ancestral nourishment, and a circular economy for a truly unique experience.
flavour_profile: Regenerative, ethical, ancestral, circular, curated, lab-grade.
about:
Espresso Labs: A Sanctuary of Regenerative Coffee & Conscious Living

Step into a unique concept where specialty coffee transcends the ordinary, nestled within a high-end retail space featuring curated apparel from Norse Projects and Margaret Howell, alongside personal care from Aēsop and Perfumer H. This establishment is founded on a holistic ethical and regenerative model, passionately pursuing what is meaningful and responsible across apparel and food.

It's a destination where every detail reflects a commitment to conscious living, creating a distinctive soul and character that invites mindful exploration. At its heart lies "Espresso Labs," a coffee program distinguished by its dedication to regenerative and organic sourcing. All eatery produce, including ingredients influencing the coffee experience, is ethically sourced from farms practicing regenerative organic agriculture, going beyond typical sustainability.

This commitment extends to a circular economy, returning organic waste to farm suppliers for compost, directly aiding topsoil regeneration. Guided by an "ancestral nourishment" philosophy, the café embraces nutrient-dense foods, cooking exclusively with grass-fed butter and tallow, rejecting modern conveniences like seed oils, ensuring a truly wholesome and unique offering.
address: 30 Hudson St, De Waterkant, Cape Town, 8001, South Africa

name: Ground Art Caffe
excerpt_short: Fourth-wave roastery: mindful coffee, art, and sustainable micro-roasted beans.
excerpt_long: Mindful, fourth-wave roastery. Organic, micro-roasted coffee, art, and sustainability converge. Enjoy wood-fire pastries & an evolving menu.
summary: A fourth-wave micro-roastery and art gallery, we craft mindful coffee from organic, fair-trade beans, micro-roasted for peak flavor. Enjoy sustainable sips, blissful food, and rotating local art in an immersive space.
flavour_profile: Mindful coffee, local art, sustainable, wood-fire pastries
about:
The Art of Mindful Coffee: A Fourth Wave Experience

Founded by husband-and-wife team Lisa and Ross, this unique establishment embodies their "trifecta of awesomeness": mindful coffee, blissful food, and approachable art. Positioning itself as a "fourth wave" pioneer, the café is deeply committed to sustainability and social consciousness, evident in its plastic-free policy, bamboo straws, biodegradable cups, and the "Keep-Cup" initiative offering a 10% discount.

Step into a vibrant "micro gallery" where coffee, food, and rotating local art exhibitions are celebrated as equal art forms, creating a truly immersive and thoughtful experience.At the heart of their offering is a signature medium-roast blend, meticulously sourced from a local, family-run Italian roasting company. This blend features organic, fair-trade Arabica beans from Brazil and Ethiopia, micro-roasted in small 5–20kg batches.

This precise method allows the beans to caramelize naturally, ensuring peak freshness and an intensely enhanced flavor profile. With a dedicated head barista perfecting every pour, the coffee experience is unparalleled. Complementing the exceptional brews are distinct wood-fire baked pastries and an ever-evolving experimental menu that changes weekly, promising new delights with every visit.
address: 160 Strand St, De Waterkant, Cape Town, 8001, South Africa

name: Espressolab De Waterkant
excerpt_short: Cape Town's lab for pure, single varietal coffee. Light roasts, precise, transparent.
excerpt_long: Cape Town's lab-like roastery masters Scandinavian light roasts, celebrating single varietal purity with extreme precision and no milk.
summary: Cape Town's minimalist roastery champions single varietal, light-roasted coffees. Master roaster Renato Correia meticulously crafts pure flavors, celebrating each bean's true essence with extreme precision.
flavour_profile: Scandinavian light roasts, single varietals, meticulous, minimalist.
about:
The Art of Purity: Cape Town's Single Varietal Coffee Lab

Nestled within the vibrant Old Biscuit Mill in Woodstock, Cape Town, this specialty roastery offers a truly unique coffee experience. Heavily influenced by the Scandinavian trend of light roasting, their philosophy is to illuminate the inherent origin characteristics and delicate flavor attributes of each bean. Co-founder Renato Correia, a recognized master of roasting, treats every batch as a work of art, meticulously crafting profiles that celebrate the coffee's true essence.
