OKO Cafe’s reputation for excellence has made it a must-visit for locals and travelers alike seeking Melbourne’s best specialty brews in an environment where craft and connection take center stage.

name: Rosso Coffee Experience
excerpt_short: Melbourne's immersive coffee playground. Roast, brew, and savor specialty coffee. Community-focused.
excerpt_long: Rosso: Melbourne's immersive coffee playground. Roastery, bar, and masterclasses. Witness the roast, craft your brew, and savor award-worthy food.
summary: Rosso Coffee Experience: Melbourne's immersive specialty coffee playground. Roastery, bar, and masterclasses. Witness the roasting process, learn, and savor award-worthy food.
flavour_profile: Immersive coffee playground, roastery, DIY bar, workshops
about:
Rosso Coffee Experience: Melbourne’s Immersive Specialty Coffee Playground

Tucked in the heart of North Melbourne, Rosso Coffee Experience redefines what a specialty café can be. Founded by Ramez Abdulnour, a genuine coffee visionary, Rosso’s flagship hub brings an interactive, community-focused approach to coffee culture. The concept blends a working roastery, a make-your-own coffee bar, and hands-on brewing masterclasses in a beautifully transformed warehouse, inviting visitors to witness and participate in the roasting process firsthand. With 18 years of roasting expertise, Rosso showcases three signature espresso blends—The Commuter, The Governor, and The Bohemian—accompanied by single origin options. Free public cupping sessions and approachable workshops deepen the connection between customers and the art of coffee, making learning part of the café’s vibrant DNA.

Chef Michael Bernerger Kevin, whose culinary chops were honed under Neil Perry, leads the food program with a menu celebrating everything from chorizo chilli folded eggs and hot buttered lobster rolls to banana flour pancakes and Middle Eastern fritters—each dish crafted with inclusivity in mind, offering vegan and gluten-free delights. The industrial-chic space is complemented by a dynamic LED-lit ceiling, enhancing the atmosphere whether you’re there for a casual brunch or a deeper coffee dive. For those chasing Melbourne’s next great coffee experience—where making your own brew, learning from roasters, and sampling award-worthy food feel like second nature—Rosso Coffee Experience is unmissable.

name: Poolhouse Coffee
excerpt_short: Melbourne's gem. Specialty coffee, community vibes, inside historic City Baths. Fuel your day!
excerpt_long: Poolhouse Coffee: Melbourne's gem inside City Baths. Community vibes meet specialty coffee. Fuel your day with expertly crafted brews and good company.
summary: Poolhouse Coffee: Melbourne's community gem inside the City Baths. Fuel your day with expertly crafted coffee, sourced blends, and a welcoming vibe.
flavour_profile: Melbourne City Baths, community hub, quality coffee, local gem
about:
Poolhouse Coffee: Melbourne’s Community Gem Inside the City Baths

Step inside Poolhouse Coffee, tucked neatly within the historic Melbourne City Baths, and you’re greeted by a space humming with the vitality of the city’s morning rituals. Open weekdays from 7am to 4:30pm, Poolhouse Coffee isn’t just a pitstop for caffeine—it’s where Melbourne’s diverse crowd, from early swimmers to bustling office groups, gather to fuel their day. The ambiance is down-to-earth and welcoming, echoing the vibrant communal soul of the Baths themselves. Whether you’re here for a pre-office hours meeting or a relaxed pause post-swim, the atmosphere buzzes with conversations and the comforting aroma of expertly crafted coffee.

At Poolhouse, quality is the guiding principle. Baristas serve up top-notch espresso and filter options, ensuring that each cup exemplifies Melbourne’s reputation for specialty coffee. Their menu features carefully sourced blends and single origins, prepared with precision for both purists and the curious alike. Complementing the coffee are select pastries and light cafe fare, perfect for a quick refuel or a leisurely sip. While Poolhouse Coffee may not boast international coffee trophies just yet, its steady presence and consistent acclaim from locals highlight its status as a beloved staple in Melbourne’s ever-evolving café scene. Pro tip: arrive early to soak in the unhurried energy, and don’t miss the chance to chat with the passionate team behind the bar—they’re a wellspring of coffee knowledge and genuine hospitality.
hours_weekday: Mon - Thu: 7:00 AM - 3:00 PM, Fri: 7:00 AM - 2:00 PM

name: Aunty Peg's
excerpt_short: Black coffee sanctuary. Single-origin, meticulously brewed. Experience coffee's purest form.
excerpt_long: Black coffee sanctuary. Experience coffee in its purest form. Single-origin beans, expertly brewed. A heartfelt encounter with Melbourne's finest.
summary: Aunty Peg's: Melbourne's black coffee sanctuary. Experience coffee in its purest form. Single-origin beans, expertly brewed, and passionate baristas await.
flavour_profile: Black coffee sanctuary, specialty beans, immersive experience
about:
Aunty Peg’s: Melbourne’s Black Coffee Sanctuary

Step inside Aunty Peg’s and you’ll find a world where coffee is celebrated in its purest, most soulful form. Conceived by Nolan Hirte—visionary founder of Proud Mary Coffee Roasters and renowned figure in Australia’s specialty coffee scene—Aunty Peg’s serves as a “cellar door” experience, opening up the world of exceptional coffee to true aficionados and curious newcomers alike. The space, inspired by Hirte’s own grandmother’s warmth and hospitality, feels like a welcoming clubhouse: here, every guest is invited to connect intimately with the complexities of single-origin beans and micro-lots, guided by passionate, one-on-one baristas.

Coffee takes center stage at Aunty Peg’s. Only black coffee is served—think meticulously brewed filters, espresso, and an outstanding nitro cold brew—ensuring every origin and roast can shine without distraction. Their regular community cuppings spotlight everything from rare Geisha varietals to innovative seasonal blends. As the public face of Proud Mary’s award-winning portfolio, Aunty Peg’s stands out for its focus, transparency, and immersive, educational approach. Whether you’re diving into a community cupping or taking home freshly roasted beans and top-tier brew gear, expect a heartfelt encounter with some of Melbourne’s—and the world’s—finest coffee.

name: Manta Ray Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Melbourne's hidden gem. Meticulous roasting, award-winning coffee, and a community of purists.
excerpt_long: Manta Ray: Melbourne's hidden gem. Specialty coffee, meticulously roasted. Award-winning blends & single origins. Quality, care, and community.
summary: Manta Ray: Melbourne's hidden gem. Minimalist space, relentless pursuit of coffee perfection. Award-winning blends & single origins. Quality, care, community.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, global origins, industrial-chic, coffee mastery
about:
Manta Ray Coffee Roasters: Melbourne’s Hidden Gem for Coffee Purists

Tucked away on Beech Street in Nunawading, Manta Ray Coffee Roasters has swiftly become a pilgrimage site for Melbourne’s specialty coffee devotees. Far from the city’s hustle, this minimalist, industrial-chic space hums with quiet confidence and a relentless pursuit of coffee perfection. The aroma of just-roasted beans draws you in, while the knowledgeable staff and open roasting bar invite conversation about origin, process, and craft. After more than eight years of meticulous preparation before opening their flagship roastery, Manta Ray’s approach is equal parts precision and artistry, demonstrated in every cup they serve.

The coffee portfolio is a showcase of international acclaim: award-winning blends like Outsider (with Guatemalan, Ethiopian, and Brazilian origins) deliver notes ranging from chocolate and citrus to nutty sweetness. Expect a rotating cast of five single origins on filter and two house blends on espresso, with adventurous options like koji-processed and washed Geisha coffees making regular appearances. Celebrated with accolades such as the Roasters Smackdown 2019 Industry and Public Judges’ Choice and the ASCA 2023 Single Origin & Blend Choice awards, Manta Ray stands out among local roasters. Beyond coffee, you’ll find a tempting spread of cakes and savoury pastries—perfect fuel for deeper exploration into Melbourne’s vibrant coffee scene. For those seeking more than just a caffeine fix, Manta Ray offers an experience where quality, care, and community are always on the menu.

name: Path Melbourne
excerpt_short: Black coffee speaks volumes. Minimalist brew bar. Single origins & global blends.
excerpt_long: North Melbourne's Path: minimalist brew bar. Black coffee speaks volumes. Single origins & blends, globally sourced, expertly brewed.
summary: Path Melbourne: A North Melbourne haven for black coffee purists. Minimalist, intimate, and focused on global single origins and blends. Experience nuanced flavors and passionate baristas.
flavour_profile: Specialty black coffee, global flavors, minimalist vibe
about:
Path Melbourne: Where Black Coffee Speaks Volumes

Path Melbourne stands as a North Melbourne icon for purists and adventurers alike, embracing a minimalist soul that puts specialty black coffee front and center. Nestled on Victoria Street, this intimate brew bar has cultivated a cult following for its uncompromising focus: here, milk-based drinks are skipped in favor of pour overs and espresso that celebrate nuanced flavors from around the globe. The compact interior—wooden and ceramic, seating just 15—encourages close encounters with passionate baristas who serve as guides to an evolving lineup of single origins and blends. With a focus on both their own roasted beans and partnerships with acclaimed international roasters, Path’s coffee flights spotlight everything from citrus-bright Kenyan SL28s to Panama's velvety Geishas, all grouped by approachable flavor profiles like berry, floral, citrus, and chocolate.

The experience is deeply curated: Path’s menu is stripped back, yet carefully crafted—think guest singles from legends like Tim Wendelboe (Honduras, Colombia) and Manhattan (Panama), alongside their own seasonal blends. There’s no brunch, but a petite, rotating selection of house-made pastries and toasties offers the perfect companion to each pour. Coffee service is transparent, with baristas eager to explain the origin and process behind each cup, fostering a sense of discovery in every visit. Whether you’re a specialty coffee devotee or a curious newcomer, Path Melbourne’s dedication to nuance, education, and hospitality makes every visit memorable. Just arrive early—this hidden gem fills up fast.
hours_weekday: Mon - Tue, Thu - Fri: 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM

name: Vacation Coffee CBD
excerpt_short: Melbourne's vibrant specialty coffee haven. Quality beans, bold flavors, and a sunlit space.
excerpt_long: Vacation Coffee: Melbourne's CBD haven. Sunlit space, specialty beans roasted in Brunswick. Expect clarity, sweetness, and bold, fruity flavors.
summary: Vacation Coffee: Melbourne's sunlit CBD gem. Specialty roasters since 2016, known for vibrant, fruity coffees. Explore single origins and expressive blends.
flavour_profile: Specialty roasts, vibrant atmosphere, fruity profiles, CBD gem
about:
Vacation Coffee: Melbourne’s CBD Gem for Specialty Coffee Lovers

Step inside Vacation Coffee and you’ll instantly feel the vibrant soul that makes this place a standout in Melbourne’s iconic coffee scene. Set at the base of a historic Flinders St building, Vacation’s CBD espresso bar is a sun-lit, inviting space where design and hospitality merge seamlessly. The founders—Jimmy, Matt, and Kael—are seasoned veterans in Australian specialty coffee, known for their commitment to quality and innovation. Since 2016, they’ve transformed Vacation from a humble unnamed roastery into a beloved local brand, now roasting in Brunswick on a Diedrich IR12, giving them the freedom to meticulously craft every batch.

Vacation’s menu celebrates naturally processed coffees, with a portfolio spanning juicy single origins and expressive blends, roasted to bring out clarity, sweetness, and complexity. Regularly praised by both home brewers and pros, their beans delight with bold flavors—think creamy, fruity profiles that shine in both espresso and filter. While they haven’t landed a high-profile award just yet, Vacation consistently draws rave reviews and earned a spot at #71 in Concrete Playground’s prestigious Top 100 Coffee Shops in the World for 2025. Pair your coffee with their selection of refined pastries or brunch fare, and don’t skip the house espresso—a fan favorite. For a true taste adventure, ask the baristas about the latest single origin on pour-over. Vacation is where Melbourne’s coffee passion truly comes to life.

name: Project Zero Coffee
excerpt_short: Data-driven coffee. Innovative roasts. Exceptional service. Your perfect cup awaits.
excerpt_long: Melbourne's Project Zero: Data-driven coffee. Small-batch roasts, innovative flavors like Berry Soda & Strawberry Cheesecake. Exceptional service, every cup.
summary: Melbourne's Project Zero: Data-driven coffee. Small-batch roasts, innovative flavors like Berry Soda & Strawberry Cheesecake. Expect a welcoming, seamless experience.
flavour_profile: Innovative, data-driven, specialty blends, welcoming atmosphere
about:
Project Zero Coffee: Melbourne’s Data-Driven Coffee Haven

Project Zero Coffee stands out in Melbourne’s CBD for its innovative approach to specialty coffee, led by founder Kirk Pearson—a well-known figure in the coffee community and host of the "It’s Just Coffee" podcast. Kirk’s vision blends technology with hospitality, collecting data from advanced machinery to hone consistency and flavor while prioritizing exceptional customer service. Rather than relying solely on veteran baristas, Project Zero empowers approachable staff to deliver a welcoming and seamless coffee experience, making every visit feel both personal and polished.

The coffee menu is a rotating showcase of creativity and quality, featuring in-house roasted, small-batch offerings that change with the seasons. Standouts include adventurous blends like Berry Soda, Pina Colada (for filter), Lamington, and the signature Strawberry Cheesecake—a playful, co-fermented milk-based coffee brimming with dessert-like notes. Guests can expect a mix of milk-based classics and vibrant filter options, all roasted for peak flavor. Project Zero’s unique co-fermented coffees and a reputation as one of Melbourne’s top coffee destinations have earned it glowing reviews and a loyal following. For a full experience, pair your cup with their curated selection of pastries and don’t miss the chance to chat with staff about their latest coffee experiments or recommendations for specialty brews.

name: MAKER Richmond
excerpt_short: Richmond's coffee haven. Since 2015, crafting award-worthy brews with passion and transparency.
excerpt_long: Richmond's coffee haven since 2015. Maker Coffee: quality, transparency, and variety. Award-worthy brews, passionate service, and world-class origins.
summary: Discover Maker Coffee Richmond: Melbourne's haven for award-winning specialty coffee. Since 2015, we've championed quality, transparency, and a passion for the perfect brew.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, expert baristas, cozy ambiance, global beans
about:
Maker Coffee Richmond: Melbourne’s Epicenter of Coffee Craft

Step into Maker Coffee Richmond and you’ll discover why this specialty roaster has become a cornerstone of Melbourne’s vibrant coffee community since 2015. Tucked away on North Street, Maker’s soul is rooted in a devotion to quality, transparency, and variety. From the moment you walk in, the focus is clear—genuine hospitality, passionate knowledge-sharing, and a curated showcase of the world’s finest coffee origins. The Richmond team is lauded for their expertise and approachability, eager to discuss new beans, brewing techniques, or simply share some coffee banter while crafting pour-overs with meticulous attention. The airy, light-filled space may offer a modest food selection—think tempting pastries and cakes—but here, every detail is designed to spotlight the coffee itself.

Maker’s portfolio is as impressive as it is thoughtful. Highlights include single origins and blends such as The Maven (Colombia, with blackberry and toffee notes), The Smith (Brazil, featuring apricot and milk chocolate), and signature filter offerings like Costa Rica’s Oscar & Francisca Chaćon or Kenya’s Kirimahiga AA. Maker’s dedication extends to sustainability and ethical sourcing, with coffees like Edson Luiz Ignacio’s Catucai from Brazil’s Serra da Canastra region, celebrated for vibrant, terroir-driven flavors. Whether you’re a seasoned aficionado or a curious newcomer, Maker Coffee Richmond is a haven for those seeking authentic, award-worthy brews and stellar service in an intimate, passionate setting.

name: Criteria Coffee
excerpt_short: Melbourne's coffee haven. Award-winning roasts, crafted with passion. Experience coffee excellence.
excerpt_long: Criteria Coffee: Port Melbourne's heart. Award-winning roaster Craig Simon crafts exceptional coffee, from bean to cup. Community, knowledge, and flavor.
summary: Criteria Coffee: Port Melbourne's heart of specialty coffee. Led by award-winning Craig Simon, experience expertly roasted beans and a community-driven vibe.
flavour_profile: Specialty roasts, expert craftsmanship, vibrant flavors, hub
about:
Criteria Coffee: Elevating Melbourne’s Coffee Craft

Tucked away in Port Melbourne, Criteria Coffee pulses with the rhythm of Australia’s specialty coffee scene. The soul of Criteria is Craig Simon, a multi-award-winning barista and coffee roaster whose passion spans the entire coffee journey—from farmer to final cup. Craig’s credentials speak for themselves: he’s represented Australia on the World Barista Championship stage multiple times and became the country’s first Q-Grade Instructor in 2015. Founding Criteria Coffee in 2018, Craig built more than a roastery—he established a hub for coffee knowledge, welcoming both professionals and enthusiasts into an expertly guided, state-of-the-art roasting facility.

Criteria’s curated portfolio showcases both blends and standout single origins. Recent favorites include an exceptional natural-processed coffee from Papua New Guinea’s Jikawa Province, with notes of strawberry, cream, and chocolate—a vibrant, fruit-forward espresso experience. The co-roastery model means you might encounter a rotating lineup of beans, all meticulously roasted to highlight their origin characteristics. While the focus is uncompromising coffee, visitors can expect thoughtful offerings and a warm, community-driven vibe. For the best experience, ask the knowledgeable team for their recommendations and don’t miss the chance to try one of their award-winning brews crafted under Craig’s thoughtful guidance.

name: Thieves Coffee
excerpt_short: Melbourne's specialty coffee soul. Curated roasters, fresh discoveries, and a vibrant coffee community.
excerpt_long: Discover Australia's best specialty coffee. Thieves Coffee curates award-winning roasters, delivering unique beans monthly. Experience fresh flavors and brewing guides.
summary: Discover Melbourne's specialty coffee scene. Thieves Coffee curates award-winning, small-batch roasters monthly. Experience unique flavors, ethical sourcing, and a vibrant coffee community.
flavour_profile: Curated specialty, small-batch, rotating roasters, discovery
about:
The Curated Soul of Thieves Coffee: Where Melbourne’s Specialty Scene Shines

Step into Thieves Coffee and you step straight into Melbourne’s dynamic specialty coffee culture. Born from the passion of local coffee devotees, Thieves Coffee goes far beyond the standard café or roaster—their model is built on curating Australia’s best small-batch, award-winning coffees and delivering them right to your door or workspace. Every month reveals a new roaster, thoughtfully handpicked to showcase unique stories and regional profiles, ensuring every cup is a fresh discovery. Rooted in collaboration, Thieves partners with pioneers like Mecca Coffee and standout newcomers like Elementary Coffee, bringing subscribers beans roasted with integrity and vision. Regular features include espresso and filter options, decaf, brewing guides, and deep dives into each roaster’s process, turning home brewing into a true specialty experience. The team—led by founders such as Athan Didaskalou—embodies Melbourne’s creative, ever-evolving coffee energy, supporting a community of passionate producers and drinkers alike.

Thieves Coffee isn’t just renowned for curation; it’s a gateway to Australia’s most celebrated roasters, many of whom have taken home top prizes at events like the Australasia Golden Bean Awards. Expect a portfolio that spans fruity, experimental single origins and balanced, crowd-pleasing blends, all ethically sourced and roasted to highlight origin character. The rotating selection means there’s always something new, including exclusive seasonal releases and tip-top brewing advice for espresso, filter, and even cold brew. Subscribers rave about the excitement of discovering new flavors monthly and the care Thieves invests in every delivery—complete with insider stories, variety, and a sense of belonging to the thriving Aussie specialty scene. For those seeking more than just a caffeine fix, Thieves Coffee is Melbourne’s go-to for soulful discovery and genuine coffee connection.

name: ACOFFEE
excerpt_short: Minimalist coffee sanctuary. Freshly roasted, small-batch beans. Experience the soul of coffee.
excerpt_long: Minimalist coffee sanctuary in Collingwood. Freshly roasted, premium beans. Experience the soul of coffee, expertly brewed.
summary: ACOFFEE: Collingwood's minimalist coffee sanctuary. Experience specialty coffee in a serene, sunlit space. Small-batch roasted, transparent, and soulful.
flavour_profile: Minimalist sanctuary, artisanal roasts, sensory journey
about:
ACOFFEE: Collingwood’s Minimalist Coffee Sanctuary

Tucked away on Sackville Street in Collingwood, ACOFFEE is a boutique specialty coffee roastery and showroom that has captivated Melbourne’s coffee faithful since 2017. Renowned for its sleek minimalist aesthetic and calming white interiors, ACOFFEE is more than a café—it’s a sensory experience where the gentle aroma of freshly roasted beans fills the air as sunlight dances across the serene space. This sanctuary is helmed by a passionate team dedicated to sourcing premium, seasonal green beans and roasting each batch with precision, aiming to reveal the natural clarity and distinctive profiles of each origin. Their philosophy is grounded in transparency and respect for the bean, with a focus on small-batch roasting to preserve every coffee’s unique soul.

ACOFFEE’s ever-evolving portfolio features single origins and blends showcased through various brewing methods, from expertly crafted pour-overs to their famed signature filter drip bags and capsule-friendly roasts. The “Season’s Best” collection highlights rare and exceptional coffees for true aficionados, while their in-house filter bar lets guests enjoy a meticulously prepared cup at professional standards. Alongside coffee, the minimal food offerings—like thoughtfully chosen pastries—complement rather than compete. For those eager to explore coffee further, their showroom doubles as an education hub with guides and brewing gear for home enthusiasts. Whether you're new to specialty coffee or an experienced taster, ACOFFEE promises a memorable journey into Melbourne’s vibrant coffee culture.

name: Rumble Coffee Roasters - Thompson St Roastery (Retail bean sales only)
excerpt_short: Ethical beans, bold flavors. Melbourne's transparent coffee roasters, supporting sustainable supply chains.
excerpt_long: Ethically sourced, knockout blends. Rumble Coffee Roasters: Melbourne's transparent coffee powerhouse, roasting with soul since 2014. Taste the difference.
summary: Melbourne's transparent coffee powerhouse. Ethical sourcing meets knockout blends and world-class single origins. Taste the passion, support sustainability.
flavour_profile: Ethical sourcing, specialty blends, transparency, B-Corp
about:
Rumble Coffee Roasters: Melbourne’s Transparent Coffee Powerhouse

Tucked away on Thompson Street in Kensington, Rumble Coffee Roasters crackles with the kind of soul you only find in a place founded by passionate industry insiders. Established in 2014 by Matt and Joe—coffee veterans who set out to shake up Melbourne’s scene—Rumble exists to deliver knock-out blends, world-class single origins, and an unwavering commitment to ethical sourcing. Certified as a B-Corporation and a proud 1% for the Planet member, Rumble is known for radical transparency, publishing exactly what they pay farmers and ensuring every cup supports sustainable, community-focused supply chains.

Rumble’s portfolio is a playground for specialty coffee lovers: bold espressos, flavour-packed filter roasts, signature blends, and single origins sourced with integrity. Whether you’re brewing at home or visiting one of their partner cafes, you’ll taste the meticulous attention to quality that’s earned them a fiercely loyal following and glowing customer reviews. While the roastery itself is focused on retail bean sales—without café eats or pastries—insiders know to grab a bag of their best-selling blends for the ultimate home espresso. If you’re after coffee with a conscience and incredible flavour, Rumble Coffee Roasters is a must-visit for the true Melbourne coffee enthusiast.

name: Bearded Brothers Espresso - Coffee
excerpt_short: Craft coffee, community, and joy. Melbourne's Bearded Brothers: where every sip connects.
excerpt_long: Craft coffee, community, and connection. Bearded Brothers Espresso: Melbourne's haven for coffee lovers, serving joy in every cup.
summary: Bearded Brothers: Melbourne's coffee haven. Crafting connection through specialty blends & single origins. Warm, inviting, and a daily ritual for coffee lovers.
flavour_profile: Artisanal coffee, community hub, specialty blends, craft focus
about:
Bearded Brothers Espresso: Where Craft Meets Community

Bearded Brothers Espresso stands out in Melbourne’s specialty coffee scene as a haven for true coffee lovers. The soul of the place is defined by its warm, thoughtful approach—every detail, from their inviting space to the creative menu, is crafted to foster a sense of connection among enthusiasts. Their coffee portfolio is impressive, showcasing both specialty blends and single-origin coffees, carefully sourced for distinct flavor profiles. The baristas here are dedicated artisans, serving up everything from perfectly dialed-in espressos to creative immunity-boosting juices, offering an experience that’s both energizing and satisfying. They’ve become a respected daily ritual for many locals, thanks to their consistency in quality and genuine hospitality.

Beyond the cup, Bearded Brothers Espresso infuses each offering with enthusiasm for vitality and joy. Their menu highlights not just high-grade coffee, but also a curated selection of goods and treats, making it an ideal stop for everything from a morning caffeine hit to a leisurely brunch with artisanal pastries. While the founders may not be celebrity names in the international scene, their commitment to improvement and craft is palpable in the atmosphere and every sip served. Whether you’re sampling their rotating single origins or savoring a house specialty, you’ll find Bearded Brothers Espresso leaves a memorable mark on Melbourne’s vibrant café culture.
address: Bearded Brothers Espresso - Coffee, 342 Little Collins St, Melbourne VIC 3000

name: Patricia Coffee Brewers
excerpt_short: Melbourne's hidden gem. Locally roasted, exceptional coffee. Pure, unpretentious, and utterly delicious.
excerpt_long: Melbourne's hidden gem. Patricia: locally roasted, exceptional coffee. Espresso & filter perfection. Unpretentious, pure coffee excellence.
summary: Melbourne's hidden gem. Patricia Coffee Brewers: locally roasted beans, espresso & filter perfection. Fast service, passionate baristas, and pure coffee excellence.
flavour_profile: Melbourne gem, specialty coffee, minimalist, expert baristas
about:
Patricia Coffee Brewers: Melbourne’s Hidden Gem for Coffee Purists

Tucked away at the rear of 493-495 Little Bourke Street, Patricia Coffee Brewers embodies the soul of Melbourne’s specialty coffee scene. Despite its minimalist, standing-room-only interior, Patricia has achieved near-legend status among coffee aficionados—consistently ranked among the city’s top coffee bars and honored with the prestigious Travelers' Choice award for placing in the top 10% of venues globally. The constant morning queue of office workers and coffee lovers is a testament to its cult following and unwavering standards. You’ll find fast, friendly service, a welcoming staff ready to talk shop, and an atmosphere that pulses with authenticity and understated charm.

Patricia roasts their own beans locally, offering both espresso and filter profiles renowned for their depth and clarity. Their portfolio spans vibrant seasonal blends and carefully sourced single origins, all ground and brewed with obsessive attention to quality. While the coffee is undoubtedly the hero, the rotating selection of small-batch pastries provides perfect, unpretentious accompaniments. For a true Patricia experience, opt for their house espresso or filter of the day, and don’t hesitate to ask the team for recommendations—these baristas are as passionate as they are skilled. Patricia Coffee Brewers is specialty coffee, distilled: no frills, just excellence in every cup.
address: Rear of, 493-495 Little Bourke St, Melbourne VIC 3000

name: Industry Beans Lt. Collins
excerpt_short: Melbourne's urban coffee oasis. Specialty roastery, innovative brews, and a welcoming escape.
excerpt_long: Melbourne's urban coffee oasis. Industry Beans Lt. Collins: quality, innovation, and community. Explore espresso, single origins, and the iconic Bubble Coffee.
summary: Melbourne's urban coffee oasis. Industry Beans Lt. Collins: quality, innovation, and community. Explore espresso, single origins, and the cult Bubble Coffee.
flavour_profile: Specialty roasts, innovative brews, urban oasis, Melbourne vibe
about:
Industry Beans Lt. Collins: Melbourne’s Urban Coffee Oasis

Step into Industry Beans Lt. Collins and experience the pulse of Melbourne’s specialty coffee movement in the heart of the CBD. Founded by the visionary Simmons brothers, Trevor and Steve, Industry Beans has become Australia’s largest independent specialty roaster, celebrated for its commitment to quality, innovation, and community. The Lt. Collins venue is a showcase of sleek, minimal design and state-of-the-art coffee equipment, offering a fast-paced yet welcoming escape for city dwellers. Here, every detail—from the architecture to the attentive baristas—reinforces their dedication to making specialty coffee accessible and unforgettable.

The menu is a playground for coffee lovers. Sip on espresso classics, explore rotating single origins, or try their award-winning iced brews and the cult-favorite Bubble Coffee—cold brew with coffee-soaked tapioca pearls and house-made consoy. There’s an express brunch menu for those on the go, alongside daily muffins and grab-and-go bites. With a portfolio featuring signature blends like Smooth and Extra Strong, plus ever-evolving seasonal origins, there’s always something new to discover. For the perfect first visit: ask for their latest single origin on filter, and don’t miss the Bubble Coffee—a true Industry Beans specialty.

name: Code Black Coffee North Melbourne
excerpt_short: Industrial chic roastery. Specialty coffee, award-winning beans, and soulful vibes.
excerpt_long: Industrial chic roastery in North Melbourne. Specialty coffee haven, honoring the bean-to-cup journey. Award-winning coffee, vibrant atmosphere.
summary: Industrial chic meets coffee soul. Code Black North Melbourne: specialty beans, expertly roasted, served in a vibrant, welcoming space. Experience coffee excellence.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, industrial chic, specialty brews, vibrant brunch
about:
Code Black Coffee North Melbourne: Where Roastery Soul Meets Industrial Chic

Nestled in the heart of North Melbourne, Code Black Coffee’s Howard Street outpost radiates an industrial chic charm, thoughtfully preserved from its days as a mechanics warehouse. This is more than just a café—it’s a haven for specialty coffee devotees, where every detail honors the journey from bean to cup. The space buzzes with energy and warmth, offering cozy corners for lingering or communal tables for lively brunch gatherings, all beneath the subtle hum of coffee machines and conversation. With espresso and batch brew featuring front and center, the café’s vibrant atmosphere invites you to settle in and savor the craft that has earned Code Black a revered place in Melbourne’s discerning coffee scene.

Founded in 2012 by Joseph Haddad and the renowned Cafenatics team, Code Black Coffee has established itself as an industry leader, celebrated for meticulous sourcing and roasting of both single origins and signature blends. Their North Melbourne café delights with a rotating line-up of specialty coffees—look for limited releases and award-winning offerings that showcase transparency and respect for growers. The inspired brunch menu is served daily, pairing beautifully with house favorites like expertly brewed filter coffee or a luxurious flat white. Whether you’re a seasoned coffee aficionado or simply seeking Melbourne’s best brunch, Code Black’s soulful blend of culinary and coffee excellence promises an experience that lingers long after your cup is empty.

name: ONA Coffee Melbourne | Cafe Brunswick
excerpt_short: Award-winning coffee, sustainable soul. Brunswick's ONA: where craft meets community.
excerpt_long: Brunswick's ONA: Award-winning coffee, sustainable soul. Champion baristas craft exceptional brews in a carbon-neutral space.
summary: Brunswick's ONA: Award-winning coffee, sustainable soul. Champion baristas craft exceptional brews in a carbon-neutral space. Ethical, delicious, and community-focused.
flavour_profile: Award-winning, sustainable, specialty coffee, innovative brunch
about:
ONA Coffee Melbourne: Where Award-Winning Coffee Meets Sustainable Soul in Brunswick

ONA Coffee Melbourne stands as a beacon of specialty coffee excellence in the heart of Brunswick, blending world-class barista craftsmanship with a welcoming, community-driven atmosphere. Founded by 2015 World Barista Champion Saša Sestic and home to champions like Hugh Kelly, Matthew Lewin, Devin Loong, and Victor Vu, ONA’s legacy is steeped in accolades—multiple Australian Barista Championships, World Brewers Cup placements, and commendations for sustainable architecture. The café itself is a model of ethical operation, housed in a beautifully understated, carbon-neutral warehouse conversion that has earned prestigious design awards and sets the tone for conscious, responsible hospitality. Every element, from solar-powered roasting to a focus on local producers, reflects a deep commitment to quality and sustainability.

ONA’s coffee portfolio is nothing short of remarkable: expect an ever-evolving “coffee menu like a wine list,” offering single origins and blends sourced through Project Origin’s direct trade relationships, ensuring both ethical impact and exceptional flavor. Each cup showcases meticulous roasting, with legendary offerings such as competition-winning espressos and filter coffees. The brunch menu is as inventive as it is soulful, featuring playful twists on Melbourne icons and standout signature dishes that seamlessly weave in ONA’s coffee expertise. Whether you’re here for world-class brews, a creative brunch, or simply to soak up the warm, inviting vibe, ONA Coffee Melbourne is a must-visit destination for coffee lovers seeking both heart and craft.

name: ST. ALi Coffee Roasters - South Melbourne
excerpt_short: Melbourne's coffee soul. Direct trade, in-house roasted, expert brewing. A true coffee adventure.
excerpt_long: Melbourne's coffee soul. ST. ALi: Direct trade, in-house roasting, and expert brewing. A laneway haven for coffee pilgrims.
summary: Melbourne's coffee soul. ST. ALi: a laneway haven. Direct trade, in-house roasting, and expert brewing. A global coffee laboratory.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, innovative brews, warehouse chic, coffee mecca
about:
ST. ALi: Melbourne’s Trailblazer of Specialty Coffee

Tucked deep in a South Melbourne laneway, ST. ALi is more than a café—it’s the spiritual epicenter of Melbourne’s specialty coffee revolution. Since opening in 2005, ST. ALi has been at the forefront, championing direct trade with farmers, pioneering in-house roasting, and setting the bar for expert brewing. Founded by Mark Dundon and later helmed by visionary Salvatore Malatesta, ST. ALi played a pivotal role in defining Melbourne’s third wave coffee scene. The venue’s energy is palpable; think warehouse-chic meets global coffee laboratory, busy with regulars, foodies, and caffeine pilgrims alike. Their passionate team includes world-class baristas such as Matt Perger, winner of the World Brewer’s Cup and decorated in multiple international championships, and Jae Kim, the 2022 ASCA Southern Region Latte Art Champion.

ST. ALi’s coffee portfolio runs deep, featuring lauded blends like Orthodox and Wide Awake alongside single origins sourced ethically from across the globe. Their methods range from meticulous espresso to filter and cold brew, always spotlighting flavor clarity and innovation. The café’s food menu is a local legend, earning “Best Food Cafe” in Melbourne; expect inventive brunches, gourmet pastries, and house specialties that pair perfectly with your cup. Sustainability is woven into their DNA, with Climate Active certification reflecting their eco-conscious ethos. For a true taste of Melbourne’s coffee soul, ST. ALi remains unrivaled—a place where every visit is both a ritual and an adventure.

name: Seven Seeds Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Melbourne's coffee soul. Seven Seeds: Transparency, sustainability, and coffee excellence.
excerpt_long: Melbourne's coffee soul. Seven Seeds: transparency, sustainability, and coffee excellence. From farm to cup, experience the legacy.
summary: Experience Melbourne's coffee soul at Seven Seeds. Pioneers since 2007, they offer exceptional beans, transparency, and a community hub. Taste the legacy!
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, farm-to-cup, industrial chic, coffee pioneers
about:
Seven Seeds: Melbourne’s Coffee Pioneers with Soul

Step into Seven Seeds in Carlton and you’ll experience the heart of Melbourne’s specialty coffee scene. Founded in 2007 by Bridget Amor and Mark Dundon—visionaries behind some of the city’s earliest espresso bars—Seven Seeds is more than just a café; it’s an institution defined by transparency, sustainability, and a relentless pursuit of coffee excellence. The transformed inner-city warehouse buzzes with an industrial charm, acting as both a light-filled community hub and a working roastery dedicated to showcasing the journey from farm to cup. Every detail here speaks to their passion, from relationships with exceptional producers to a transparent, educational atmosphere that directly connects you to the origins of your brew.

Seven Seeds is celebrated for its diverse coffee portfolio. Discover the nuanced Seven Seeds Espresso Blend, bursting with hints of fruit, or savor the caramel-rich Golden Gate Blend—both available year-round alongside a rotating roster of outstanding single origins and micro-lot coffees. Filter, espresso, and cold filter casks are all expertly handled. The all-day food menu includes standout treats like espresso-infused French toast and caters generously to vegetarian and vegan diners. Visit for a coffee experience steeped in Melbourne’s third wave legacy, and don’t leave without a bag of beans or a specialty pastry—these pioneers are setting the standard, cup after cup.

name: Proud Mary Coffee
excerpt_short: Melbourne's cult coffee roaster. Exceptional beans, award-winning baristas, unforgettable experience.
excerpt_long: Melbourne's Proud Mary: Cult-favorite roaster. Exceptional coffee, award-winning baristas, and a soulful, unforgettable experience.
summary: Melbourne's Proud Mary: Cult-favorite roaster. Exceptional coffee, from rare Geisha to rich blends. Award-winning baristas, unforgettable experience.
flavour_profile: Melbourne coffee, specialty roasts, innovative brews, culinary flair
about:
Proud Mary Coffee: Melbourne’s Cult-Favorite Roaster Brewing Global Acclaim

Proud Mary Coffee, nestled in the heart of Collingwood, Melbourne, stands as a cornerstone of Australia’s specialty coffee landscape. Founded in 2009 by Nolan and Shari Hirte, Proud Mary channels Melbourne’s innovative coffee spirit into every cup, earning a stellar reputation both locally and abroad. The café recently secured the coveted fourth spot in the 2025 World’s 100 Best Coffee Shops, recognized for its exceptional quality, barista expertise, cutting-edge sustainability, and unforgettable ambience. Proud Mary isn’t just a café—it's a cradle of coffee culture and a training ground for award-winning baristas, with a holistic approach that values both the origin story behind each bean and the local, sustainable ingredients on every plate.

The coffee portfolio here is as adventurous as it is refined, ranging from rich blends to meticulously sourced single origins—think natural Ethiopian Kurume and washed Rachia heirlooms, alongside limited-release micro-lots and rare Geisha varietals. Brew methods include everything from classic espresso and pour-over to innovative filter experiences. The all-day menu is just as alluring, featuring hearty breakfasts and lunches, house-made pastries, and signature pancakes with a local twist. With a founder as passionately detail-focused as Nolan Hirte and a team committed to “nerding out” on every aspect of the coffee journey, Proud Mary crafts a soulful, world-class experience that’s impossible to forget—or replicate.

name: Market Lane Coffee - Queen Victoria Market
excerpt_short: Melbourne's coffee soul. Ethically sourced, expertly roasted, and brewed with passion.
excerpt_long: Market Lane Coffee: Melbourne's specialty coffee soul. Authentic, ethically sourced, and expertly brewed. Experience the vibrant coffee spirit.
summary: Melbourne's coffee soul lives here. Market Lane Coffee, at Queen Victoria Market, offers ethically sourced, seasonal delights. Experience the craft.
flavour_profile: Melbourne specialty coffee, market charm, ethical sourcing
about:
Market Lane Coffee at Queen Victoria Market: Melbourne’s Specialty Coffee Heartbeat

Nestled in the historic Queen Victoria Market, Market Lane Coffee captures Melbourne’s vibrant coffee spirit with unmatched authenticity. Every detail—down to the rich red and blue hues inspired by the market’s heritage—reflects their commitment to craft and place. Inside their Victoria Street and Dairy Hall shops, you’ll find a welcoming, thoughtfully designed space where locals and visitors mingle at the coffee bar, savoring meticulously brewed espresso and filter coffees. The shop’s warm character is the result of collaborations with local designers like Sarah Trotter and artist Julia Stewart, ensuring that every visit feels like a blend of Melbourne’s past and its specialty coffee future.

Market Lane’s obsession is single-minded: delicious, high-quality coffee. As a certified B Corporation and proud carbon-neutral business, they’re lauded for ethical sourcing and transparent practice. Expect an ever-changing menu of seasonal single origins and blends—always roasted for clarity and distinction. Brewed via espresso or filter, each coffee is a showcase of their relationships with world-renowned growers. Pair your cup with a Wild Life Bakery pastry, a Söt by Mörk cinnamon bun, or a treat from Red Door Corner Store. Whether you’re picking up beans or exploring new brew gear, Market Lane Coffee is a must-visit for anyone serious about the soul of Melbourne’s coffee scene.

name: Fieldwork Coffee
excerpt_short: Melbourne's micro-roastery. Championing world's best coffees. Sweetness, balance, remarkable satisfaction.
excerpt_long: Melbourne's micro-roastery gem. Fieldwork Coffee: championing the world's best beans with passion, precision, and a community heart.
summary: Melbourne's micro-roastery gem. Fieldwork Coffee: championing the world's best beans. Conscientious sourcing, precise roasting, and community warmth in every cup.
flavour_profile: Micro-roastery, artisanal blends, vibrant atmosphere, coffee passion
about:
Fieldwork Coffee: Melbourne’s Micro-Roastery Gem

Tucked into Melbourne’s bustling laneways and the vibrant Fitzroy North, Fieldwork Coffee stands out as a modern Australian micro-roastery with an authentic soul. Founded in 2015 by Tim Williams—an influential name in Melbourne’s specialty coffee scene—Fieldwork is home to a small team of coffee obsessives, united by a passion to champion the world’s best coffees. Each cup is a showcase of conscientious sourcing, seasonal selection, and precise roasting, highlighted in their ever-evolving portfolio that celebrates sweetness, balance, and remarkable satisfaction. Both the Degraves Street espresso bar and the St Georges Road roastery invite visitors into the heart of Melbourne’s coffee culture, offering a front-row seat to the roasting process and the warmth of a community-driven café.

Fieldwork’s coffee program features a curated range of standout blends and single origins—think the rich, syrupy House Espresso, the bright and fruity James Fernandez, and the balanced, aromatic Sharbo Maro and William Andres Olivera offerings. Espresso and filter favorites are complemented by a selection of exceptional pastries from All Are Welcome, making each visit a sensory delight. Whether grabbing a quick city brew or exploring coffee at the roastery, Fieldwork’s commitment to quality and genuine hospitality shines through every cup, earning its reputation as a cherished destination for discerning coffee lovers.

name: Disciple Roasters
excerpt_short: Brunswick's coffee cellar door. Single-origin, black coffee purists. Exceptional, educational, boundary-pushing.
excerpt_long: Brunswick's coffee cellar door. Single-origin black coffees, roasted & brewed in-house. Experience the story behind each bean.
summary: Brunswick's coffee cellar door. Up to 15 single-origin black coffees. Minimal intervention, maximum flavor. Exceptional, educational, and boundary-pushing coffee.
flavour_profile: Specialty coffee, single-origin, micro-lots, direct trade, purist
about:
Disciple Roasters: Brunswick’s Coffee Cellar Door For Purists

Tucked away in Brunswick’s backstreets, Disciple Roasters delivers a no-compromises specialty coffee experience curated by Marwin Shaw, a key innovator behind Melbourne hotspots like Monk Bodhi Dharma and Admiral Cheng Ho. The “cellar door” concept means this intimate space is all about pure coffee: you’ll find up to 15 single-origin black coffees featured at once, with the roasting, brewing, and stories behind each bean coming alive in the same tiny room. Shaw and his team source seasonally and directly from growers worldwide, championing transparency and the craft of their partner farmers. Their approach is rooted in minimal intervention—letting the intrinsic quality of the beans and the producers’ methods shine through every cup.

Disciple’s ever-changing portfolio spans prized blends like Sakura and Chocho, alongside exclusive micro-lots that can reach legendary status—some cups fetch up to $300 and showcase experimental processing like fruit and yeast fermentation. The menu is strictly black coffee (espresso or filter), ideal for purists and the coffee-curious eager to learn from baristas who know the story of every lot. Food is limited but thoughtfully crafted: expect daily house-baked pastries, biscuits, and rolls. Alongside retail bags and unique ceramics, Disciple Roasters stands as a destination for those seeking exceptional, educational, and boundary-pushing coffee in Melbourne.

name: Klim Coffee Roasting Co
excerpt_short: Craft coffee sanctuary. Small-batch roasted, fresh weekly. Experience the passion.
excerpt_long: Experience Klim: Melbourne's specialty coffee haven. Witness the roast, savor the craft. Fresh beans, inviting space, and a passion for coffee.
summary: Experience Klim: Melbourne's specialty coffee haven. Witness the roast, savor the craft. Fresh beans, inviting space, and a passion for coffee.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasting, industrial-chic space, coffee education
about:
Klim Coffee Roasting Co: Where Craftsmanship and Coffee Culture Converge

Nestled in Mount Waverley’s energetic business precinct, Klim Coffee Roasting Co has swiftly become a beacon for Melbourne’s specialty coffee aficionados. Stepping inside their flagship space, guests are greeted by a striking “grid and box” design—crafted by acclaimed firm SuiL—that elevates the roastery’s industrial roots into a warm, contemporary sanctuary. The heart of the café, affectionately named “The Box,” is the visible roast room where the Loring machine hums, connecting patrons directly with the artistry behind every batch. Communal tables, panoramic glazing, and seamless transitions between indoor and outdoor seating create a mingling atmosphere where conversation and curiosity thrive amid the aroma of freshly roasted beans.

Klim Coffee Roasting Co takes pride in its meticulous roasting ethos, spotlighting clean, sweet profiles with beans sourced for both espresso and filter enthusiasts. Their portfolio features a curated selection of blends and single-origin coffees, all roasted in small batches and refreshed weekly to guarantee peak freshness. While the focus remains on exceptional coffee, the café’s bar seating and hand-crafted communal table invite guests to linger and learn from skilled baristas. Though food offerings are refined and considered, the real draw is experiencing the passion for transparency and connection—where each cup offers a glimpse into Melbourne’s evolving specialty coffee scene and Klim’s commitment to craft.
address: Unit 1/20-22 Hardner Rd, Mount Waverley VIC 3149

name: Beat Coffee HQ
excerpt_short: Reservoir's coffee heart. Joyful craft meets serious fun. Fresh roasts, inspiring stories.
excerpt_long: Reservoir's coffee heartbeat. Since 2014, serious fun coffee. Meticulous roasts, playful expertise, and a joyful community. Your northside essential.
summary: Reservoir's coffee heartbeat. Since 2014, serious fun coffee. Meticulously roasted, playful expertise. Nitro cold brew & community joy. Your northside essential.
flavour_profile: Playful expertise, nitro cold brew, community hub, flavor lab
about:
Beat Coffee HQ: Where Joyful Craft Meets Reservoir’s Coffee Heartbeat

Beat Coffee HQ in Reservoir is a tribute to Melbourne’s vibrant specialty coffee scene, blending technical expertise with a spirit of playfulness that’s rare among serious roasters. Since 2014, Beat Coffee has roasted and brewed “serious fun coffee,” infusing every batch with passion and precision honed by the founder’s engineering background. This isn’t coffee with a side of attitude—it’s about making specialty approachable, lively, and deeply satisfying. Step inside and you’ll discover their ever-evolving portfolio: meticulously developed single origins, inviting blends, and standout filter coffees. A particular point of pride is their nitro cold brew—a creamy, smooth signature ideal on its own or as the backbone of an unforgettable espresso martini. Their continual experimentation ensures the shelves are always stocked with fresh roasts, rich with tasting notes and stories to inspire your own brewing adventures.

Beat Coffee HQ is more than a roastery—it’s a warm, neighborhood hub championing “the endless search” for what inspires you, whether that’s the perfect cup or a creative pursuit beyond coffee. The vibe radiates joy and community, with a dedicated crew eager to share brewing tips or just chat about your day. Their space doubles as a local meeting spot and a launchpad for flavor, all tied together by a commitment to quality without pretension. If you’re seeking a specialty coffee experience layered with character, playful expertise, and a genuine sense of belonging, Beat Coffee HQ is your northside essential.

name: Strada Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Melbourne's boutique coffee gem. Hand-roasted, fresh daily. Quality, care, and character in every cup.
excerpt_long: Melbourne's boutique coffee gem. Small-batch, hand-roasted with passion. Freshly roasted daily, pre-ground for any brew. Quality, care, and character in every cup.
summary: Hand-roasted in Melbourne, Strada Coffee Roasters delivers a fresh, nuanced specialty coffee experience. Daily roasted, pre-ground options, and brew guides included.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, Melbourne charm, craft coffee experience
about:
Strada Coffee Roasters: Melbourne’s Boutique Coffee Gem

Strada Coffee Roasters is a small-batch, independent roastery nestled in Pascoe Vale, Melbourne, driven by a true passion for the art of coffee. Founded and led by Richard, a self-proclaimed coffee obsessive, Strada’s soul can be found in its unwavering dedication to quality and the craft of roasting. Every bean is sourced, mixed, and roasted in-house, ensuring a distinctive freshness that permeates every cup. The roastery curates a collection of signature blends, each crafted to deliver a rich, nuanced specialty coffee experience that reflects Melbourne’s renowned café culture.

What sets Strada apart is its customer-centric approach: beans are roasted and packed daily with the option to pre-grind for virtually any brewing method—be it espresso machine, French press, Aeropress, Moccamaster, or V60. Strada offers comprehensive brew guides, empowering both novices and aficionados to perfect their own brew at home. While the focus is firmly on coffee, Strada’s approachable vibe and local pride create a welcoming environment for every visitor. For those seeking to unlock the boutique Melbourne coffee experience, Strada delivers quality, care, and character with each hand-roasted batch.
address: Factory 4/39 Essex St, Pascoe Vale VIC 3044

name: Best Bean Best Cup Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Melbourne's artful coffee sanctuary. Vietnamese soul meets specialty craft.Finest beans, best cup.
excerpt_long: Melbourne meets Vietnam. Best Bean Best Cup: micro-roastery crafting specialty coffee with passion. Bold Vietnamese brews & curated blends await.
summary: Melbourne meets Vietnam. Best Bean Best Cup: micro-roastery crafting specialty coffee with passion. Explore unique blends, single origins, and Vietnamese phin.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, Vietnamese flair, cozy ambiance, expert baristas
about:
Best Bean Best Cup: Melbourne’s Artful Coffee Sanctuary

Stepping into Best Bean Best Cup Coffee Roasters in Keilor Park, you’re greeted by an energy that blends Melbourne’s passion for specialty coffee with the vibrant soul of Vietnamese coffee culture. This micro-roastery is anchored in a dedication to sourcing the finest coffee cherries, hand-picking each for quality and flavor. The space radiates warmth and authenticity, with baristas pouring skill and heart into every cup. The atmosphere’s inviting buzz is a result of their transparent devotion to craft and community, reflected in everything from their curated blends to engaging service.

Their portfolio is a journey across origins and taste profiles: the No.72 Bold highlights Vietnamese beans with butterscotch, milk chocolate, and tropical fruit notes, while their signature blends—No.23 Smooth, No.21 Juicy, and No.29 Balance—seamlessly combine Colombian, Brazilian, and Ethiopian coffees, each with unique flavor stories ranging from berries and honey to almond and dark chocolate. For the single-origin purist, options span Ethiopian Limu and Yirgacheffe, Colombian El Desarrollo, to Kenyan Ngurueri AA. House specialties include Vietnamese-style phin coffee, best enjoyed with one of their carefully sourced pastries. The passionate team, while not celebrity founders, are celebrated by locals for their expertise and welcoming spirit. For a genuine specialty coffee experience, tip: try their No.72 Bold Vietnamese brew and chat with the baristas—they’re as knowledgeable as they are friendly.
address: U 62/2 Thomsons Rd, Keilor Park VIC 3042

name: cowdog
excerpt_short: Unconventional coffee hideout. Laid-back, community-first. Quality coffee, matcha, bites. Fika set.
excerpt_long: Unconventional Vancouver coffee hideout. Laid-back, community-first, and fiercely independent. Enjoy quality coffee, matcha, and bites without pretense.
summary: Unconventional Vancouver coffee haven. Laid-back, community-first, and fiercely independent. Enjoy quality coffee, matcha, and bites without pretense.
flavour_profile: Laid-back vibe, living wage, Fika set menu, quality coffee
about:
cowdog: Vancouver’s Unconventional Specialty Coffee Hideout

Step into cowdog on Oak Street and you’ll instantly feel its singular spirit—laid-back, a little irreverent, and fiercely community-first. Here, the vibe is all about enjoyment without pretense. Known for its “no tipping, living wage” ethos, cowdog stands out by championing fair pay for staff and rejecting the typical coffeehouse trappings. The cafe operates as take-out only, but that doesn’t curb its popularity; locals praise the quality of its “pretty good coffee, matcha and bites” and the warmth of its welcoming atmosphere. The signature FIKA SET MENU draws inspiration from Sweden’s beloved coffee-and-cake tradition, inviting guests to slow down and savor a curated experience of connection—perfect for catching up with friends over expertly brewed coffee and delectable pastries.

Cowdog’s coffee portfolio features carefully sourced blends, crowd-pleasing classics, and seasonal specialties like the “mango madness,” reflecting a playful yet discerning approach to flavor. While industry awards and roaster details remain understated, the focus here is clear: quality, originality, and a sense of belonging. Unique merch like tumblers, totes, and tees let fans take a piece of cowdog home. Pro tip: Try the Fika set menu for a taste of why this spot has quickly become a cult favorite among Vancouver’s specialty coffee aficionados.

name: Agro Roasters
excerpt_short: Organic, ethically sourced coffee. Roasted fresh daily. Taste the difference at Agro Roasters.
excerpt_long: East Van's organic coffee haven. Family-run, ethically sourced, and bursting with flavor. Experience coffee with a conscience.
summary: Organic coffee, roasted with soul. Family-run, sourcing ethically. Taste the difference, support the impact. East Van's coffee haven.
flavour_profile: Organic, ethical, vibrant, community-focused, artisanal roasts
about:
Agro Roasters: East Vancouver’s Organic Coffee Haven

Agro Roasters stands as a vibrant hub in Vancouver’s Strathcona neighborhood, channeling a soulful commitment to exceptional, organic coffee. Founded by Marina—who grew up immersed in Brazil’s rich coffee culture—and Dusty, an industry veteran in organic sourcing, this family-run roastery has woven sustainability and ethical sourcing into its DNA. The couple’s direct work with smallholder farmers ensures every bean is certified organic and responsibly grown, making Agro a beacon for coffee lovers who care about both taste and impact. The roastery’s inviting, down-to-earth vibe makes it a true neighborhood fixture, where approachable specialty coffee sparks curiosity and community.

The coffee portfolio at Agro Roasters is a dynamic celebration of origins and craft. Their lineup, always organic and fairly traded, includes standout single-origin selections—like Sumatra processed via the wet-hulled method—alongside meticulously developed blends. For explorers, the Roaster’s Choice subscription offers rotating, freshly roasted surprises that never disappoint. Customers rave about the freshness and quality, often ranking Agro’s pours among the best in Canada. Beyond coffee, Agro delights with a selection of breakfast and lunch fare, pastries, single-serve steeped coffee packs, and essentials like the AeroPress. Visit for a taste, and leave inspired by a roastery where every cup tells a story.
hours_weekday: Mon - Thu: 8:00 AM - 3:00 PM, Fri: 8:00 AM - 12:00 PM

name: Oidé Coffee
excerpt_short: Japanese-inspired specialty coffee. Meticulously crafted. Bright, welcoming vibe. Vancouver's gem.
excerpt_long: Japanese-inspired Oidé Coffee: Vancouver's gem. Premium espresso, hand-crafted filters, and matcha creations. A unique, welcoming coffee experience.
summary: Experience Japanese-inspired specialty coffee at Oidé. Handcrafted espresso, filter brews, and matcha creations await. A bright, welcoming Vancouver gem.
flavour_profile: Japanese-inspired, specialty coffee, artisanal, minimalist chic
about:
Oidé Coffee: A Japanese-Inspired Specialty Coffee Gem in Vancouver

Nestled just outside Granville Island in Vancouver’s iconic Waterfall Building, Oidé Coffee is the creative vision of husband-and-wife duo Kento and Rika Kitayama. Drawing from their Japanese heritage, the Kitayamas infuse Oidé (which means “come here” in Japanese) with a sleek blend of fun and sophistication, earning them a devoted local following. Originally launched as Iktsuarpok in Gastown and later reimagined as Oidé, the café has grown into a destination for coffee enthusiasts seeking a uniquely curated experience.

Oidé Coffee is renowned for its unwavering focus on specialty coffee—offering only premium espresso-based drinks and hand-crafted filter options on weekends, while adding Japanese-inspired matcha creations on weekdays. Every cup is meticulously crafted, and guests are treated to thoughtful touches like an amaretti cookie alongside their coffee. The café’s minimalist aesthetic pairs perfectly with its artisanal pastries, often highlighted on their Instagram. While Oidé’s coffee portfolio rotates with carefully sourced origins and seasonal blends, the house specialties and signature style consistently deliver a bright, welcoming vibe that stands out in Vancouver’s coffee scene.
hours_weekday: Mon: 10:00 AM - 3:00 PM, Tue - Fri: 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM

name: Dismount Bike Shop
excerpt_short: Where cycling culture meets specialty coffee. A community hub for riders and coffee lovers.
excerpt_long: Where cycling meets coffee. Dismount Bike Shop: Toronto's hub for exceptional brews, community, and two-wheel adventures.
summary: Where cycling culture meets specialty coffee. Dismount Bike Shop: a Toronto hub for riders & coffee lovers. Exceptional brews, community vibes.
flavour_profile: Bike culture, specialty coffee, community hub, Toronto
about:
Dismount Bike Shop: Where Coffee Fuels Community

At Dismount Bike Shop, cycling culture and specialty coffee merge to create one of Toronto’s most unique café experiences. This St. Clair Avenue West gem isn’t your typical coffee spot—it’s a community hub where passionate riders and locals gather over carefully crafted cups before, during, or after hitting city trails. The in-house coffee bar serves a curated menu of espresso-based classics like cortados, flat whites, and macchiatos, alongside chai lattes, mochas, and a thoughtful selection of Pluck Teas, all blended and packaged locally in Toronto. Whether you crave the comfort of a drip coffee or the robust finish of an Americano, Dismount’s expert baristas deliver consistent quality and a welcoming atmosphere that keeps regulars coming back.

Coffee connoisseurs will appreciate the shop’s array of premium brewing gear, including everything from Aeropress to V60 pour-over kits, signifying a genuine love for the craft. Pair your cup with a fresh pastry before embarking on a group ride, or settle in for a friendly chat about bikes and beans—everyone is welcome. Dismount’s soulful blend of two-wheel adventure and coffee craftsmanship makes it a must-visit for those seeking both connection and an exceptional brew in Toronto’s west end.
address: 936 St Clair Ave W, Toronto, ON M6C 1C8

name: Roastery Modus, Broadway
excerpt_short: Vancouver's coffee soul. Micro-roasted, seasonal, and passionately crafted.
excerpt_long: Vancouver's coffee soul shines at Modus. Hyper-seasonal, micro-roasted beans, direct from farmers. Exceptional single-origin, crafted with passion.
summary: Vancouver's Modus Coffee: hyper-seasonal, micro-roasted, and fueled by direct farm relationships. Exceptional single-origins and a welcoming vibe for true coffee lovers.
flavour_profile: Micro-roasting, seasonal menu, direct trade, cozy vibe, expert baristas
about:
Modus Coffee Roasters: Where Vancouver’s Coffee Soul Shines

Tucked into the bustling Broadway strip, Modus Coffee Roasters brings a fresh pulse to Vancouver’s specialty coffee scene with its hyper-seasonal menu and meticulous micro-roasting. Founded by industry veterans Sharif and Jess—Sharif, a founding partner of Pallet Coffee Roasters, and Jess, a seasoned café manager—the shop exudes authenticity and passion. Their approach centers on direct relationships with farmers, resulting in a revolving selection of exceptional single-origin offerings. The bar is set high here, with regular standouts like “Dom” for espresso-based drinks and “Bare” for pour-overs, each roasted with a clean, nuanced profile that lets origin terroir shine.

The café’s vibe is easygoing and intimate, making it a destination for true coffee lovers and curious newcomers alike. The “Fancy Latte,” infused with cardamom and saffron syrup, exemplifies Modus’s spirit of thoughtful experimentation—rich, balanced, and memorable. Complementing the drinks are well-chosen baked goods and pastries, curated to enhance the coffee experience. Regulars praise Sharif and Jess for their warmth and encyclopedic coffee knowledge, always quick to chat about brew methods and origin stories. For specialty coffee seekers, Modus is a must-visit, delivering one of the city’s most distinctive and rewarding café experiences.

name: Sip Of Life
excerpt_short: Vancouver's coffee haven. Freshly roasted, crafted with soul. Slow down, savor the moment.
excerpt_long: Escape the city's rush at Sip of Life. Savor exceptional coffee, from espresso to unique house specials, in a tranquil, community-focused space.
summary: Escape the city at Sip of Life. Savor exceptional coffee, from espresso to unique lattes, in a tranquil, community-focused space. Fresh pastries and hearty eats await.
flavour_profile: Artisanal brews, cozy sanctuary, community hub, comfort food
about:
Sip of Life: Vancouver’s Oasis for Coffee Lovers

Step into Sip of Life, an inviting sanctuary nestled on West Broadway where the essence of nature meets the warmth of community. Here, the aroma of freshly brewed coffee merges with the soft chatter of guests, creating a tranquil refuge in the city’s bustle. Unlike the hurried energy of typical cafes, Sip of Life stands out for its soul—each cup is meticulously crafted as an invitation to slow down and savor genuine connections. The ethos is simple: to deliver exceptional coffee in a setting that feels both restorative and familiar, making every visit feel like a homecoming.

Sip of Life’s coffee bar is a celebration of variety and quality, featuring robust espresso classics, nuanced fresh brews, and inventive house specialties like the maple macchiato and golden latte. Their menu also caters to those seeking comfort with standout pastries: saffron pistachio muffins, chocolate croissants, and savory cheddar chive scones. The food selection extends to hearty sandwiches—think Persian veggie and turkey club—making it a go-to for brunch or midday escapes. While awards or formal certifications aren’t listed, Sip of Life’s acclaim shines through glowing local reviews and a loyal clientele, drawn by its thoughtful offerings and heartfelt hospitality.

name: Timbertrain Coffee Roasters - Depot
excerpt_short: World-class coffee, passion, and precision. Rustic charm meets modern elegance. A unique coffee experience.
excerpt_long: Experience coffee artistry at Timbertrain. Sourced globally, roasted with passion. Rustic charm meets modern elegance. Explore unique flavors.
summary: Experience coffee artistry at Timbertrain. Savor world-class beans, expertly brewed. Discover unique flavors in a railway-inspired space. A Vancouver coffee gem.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, railway charm, expert baristas, global beans
about:
All Aboard: Timbertrain Coffee Roasters’ Journey Through Vancouver’s Coffee Culture

Step into Timbertrain Coffee Roasters and you’re greeted by more than just the aroma of world-class coffee—you're welcomed into a space shaped by passion and precision. Founded in Gastown by Peter Kim, Jeff Shin, and Min Shin—three childhood friends united by a love for specialty coffee and a flair for daring entrepreneurship—Timbertrain has established itself as an anchor of Vancouver’s vibrant coffee scene. The shop’s interiors blend rustic railway-inspired charm with modern elegance, setting a warm, lively stage for coffee lovers and newcomers alike. At the heart of the experience are highly skilled baristas, eager to share their expertise and guide each customer through a voyage of flavors and brewing methods.

Timbertrain’s reputation is built on a relentless pursuit of quality, sourcing beans directly from celebrated coffee regions across the globe with a commitment to transparency and sustainability. Their offering is a rotating selection of seasonal single-origin coffees and house blends, each showcasing the unique character of the harvest and the farm. Espresso classics, hand-brewed filter coffees, and limited-edition releases like the “Sweet Thing” holiday blend highlight their ever-evolving menu. Don’t miss the Granja El Paraiso Pink Bourbon, a standout among their recent offerings. For food lovers, expect carefully curated pastries that elevate the coffee experience. To deepen your appreciation, Timbertrain hosts popular home espresso and latte art classes. Whether you’re a curious novice or a seasoned aficionado, Timbertrain promises a uniquely memorable stop on Vancouver’s specialty coffee map.

name: JJ Bean Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Vancouver's coffee legacy. Small-batch roasted, specialty coffee. Tradition meets innovation.
excerpt_long: Vancouver's coffee legacy lives here. JJ Bean: small-batch roasted specialty coffee, honoring a century of expertise. Taste the difference.
summary: Vancouver's coffee legacy lives here. JJ Bean: where tradition meets innovation. Sourcing the finest beans, small-batch roasted daily for peak flavor. Experience the difference.
flavour_profile: Vancouver coffee legacy, artisan roasting, specialty beans, welcoming cafes
about:
JJ Bean Coffee Roasters: Where Vancouver's Coffee Legacy Thrives

Step inside JJ Bean Coffee Roasters and you immediately sense a blend of tradition and innovation—the vibrant pulse of Vancouver’s specialty coffee scene. Founded by fourth-generation coffee roaster John Neate Jr. in 1996, JJ Bean is built on nearly a century of coffee expertise, honoring the Neate family’s deep roots dating back to the 1920s. This independent, family-run chain has earned its stellar reputation through unwavering dedication to people, products, and place—garnering continuous recognition as one of Vancouver’s best coffee chains and earning founder Neate a place in the BC Restaurant Hall of Fame, Coffee category. With a distinct approach, JJ Bean sources the world’s finest specialty coffees, paying well above Fair Trade prices, and roasts in small batches daily to preserve peak flavor and complexity.

Expect a coffee portfolio that marries heritage with discovery: house blends like the signature “JJ,” plus rotating single-origin offerings such as Peru El Morito and Rwanda Ngoma, each expressing unique terroir. JJ Bean’s brewing method is meticulous, now blending before roast—a nod to their Italian merger with Torrefazione Coloiera. The cafés are celebrated for their design, welcoming “third place” vibe, and outstanding food menu, including fresh pastries crafted in-house. If you visit, don’t miss the Railtown blend or a seasonal single origin pour-over, and pair it with a signature pastry for a truly local specialty coffee experience.

name: 49th Parallel Café & Lucky's Doughnuts - Main Street
excerpt_short: Vancouver's coffee & doughnut haven. Direct trade coffee meets artisan, fresh-made Lucky's doughnuts.
excerpt_long: Vancouver's heart of coffee & doughnuts. 49th Parallel: Direct trade coffee, Epic Espresso, & Lucky's Doughnuts. A perfect, delicious pairing.
summary: Vancouver's 49th Parallel: Specialty coffee meets Lucky's Doughnuts. Direct trade beans, expertly roasted. Hand-crafted doughnuts, fresh daily. A perfect pairing.
flavour_profile: Artisan coffee, gourmet doughnuts, vibrant atmosphere
about:
49th Parallel Café & Lucky’s Doughnuts: Where Coffee Craft Meets Doughnut Artistry

Step into 49th Parallel Café & Lucky’s Doughnuts on Main Street and you’ll find the beating heart of Vancouver’s specialty coffee and artisan doughnut scene. Founded by Vince and Michael Piccolo—pioneers in Canadian coffee and former Caffe Artigiano owners—49th Parallel is more than a café; it’s a destination for those who crave transparency, sustainability, and exceptional flavors. The café’s direct trade ethos shines through their diverse coffee portfolio, featuring celebrated blends like Epic Espresso, lauded for its creamy aftertaste, fruity citrus notes, and excellent crema. The seasonal coffee menu spotlights carefully sourced single origins, each roasted to highlight distinct profiles. For those seeking a true specialty experience, espresso drinks and pour-overs are meticulously prepared, showcasing both classic blends and innovative seasonal offerings.

What sets this café apart is its seamless fusion of craft coffee with decadent, hand-crafted doughnuts. Lucky’s Doughnuts are made fresh on-site daily, the menu brimming with inventive creations: from vanilla-glazed classics to the famed brioche Bismarck filled with chocolate pastry cream, or a sour doughnut leavened without commercial yeasts. Guests rave about the ever-evolving selection, including vegan and gluten-friendly options, and the playful flavor twists—like apple bacon maple or Earl Grey blueberry lavender. The café’s inviting, vibrant vibe, paired with a shared dedication to culinary excellence, makes it the perfect spot to dive into Vancouver’s specialty coffee culture—one velvety shot and pillowy doughnut at a time.

name: Pallet Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Vancouver's specialty coffee haven. Innovation, community, and craft. Exceptional coffee, expertly roasted.
excerpt_long: Vancouver's Pallet Coffee: Where craft meets community. Sourced globally, roasted locally. Experience exceptional coffee, expertly brewed.
summary: Experience Vancouver's coffee excellence. Pallet Coffee Roasters: innovation, community, and craft. Sourced globally, roasted in-house. A must-visit for coffee lovers.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, cupping lab, community hub, craft excellence
about:
Pallet Coffee Roasters: Vancouver’s Hub of Specialty Coffee Excellence

Step into Pallet Coffee Roasters and you’ll sense a unique blend of innovation, community, and dedication to craft. Founded in 2014 by a group of friends with a shared passion for exceptional coffee, Pallet has rapidly become a cornerstone of Vancouver’s specialty coffee scene. Their Railtown flagship—a sprawling 7,000-square-foot haven—houses a state-of-the-art roastery, a public cupping lab, and a stunning retail bar outfitted with top-end espresso gear. Led by Director of Coffee Ben Rugg, Pallet has garnered impressive accolades, including recognition as the number one coffee roaster in Vancouver at the 2017 Snobby Awards and a top-30 spot among North American bean roasters, as judged by the Golden Bean Awards.

Pallet’s coffee portfolio highlights meticulously sourced beans from the world’s most respected growing regions, carefully roasted in-house for optimal flavor and balance. Their offerings span both thoughtfully crafted blends and standout single origins, always promising a diverse, seasonally evolving menu. House specialties shine thanks to their skilled baristas and top-tier brewing equipment, while a curated food and pastry selection perfectly complements each cup. Cupping sessions, training opportunities, and a strong emphasis on education truly set Pallet apart, inviting both coffee nerds and newcomers into their passionate community. For those seeking an authentic Vancouver specialty coffee experience, Pallet is a must-visit destination where craft and hospitality meet.

name: Revolver
excerpt_short: Gastown's coffee lab. Revolver: Crafting exceptional coffee, community-focused, and soulful.
excerpt_long: Gastown's coffee sanctuary. Revolver: where craft meets community. Experience progressive coffee, expertly brewed, with soul.
summary: Gastown's coffee lab. Revolver Coffee: where craft meets community. Experience progressive coffee, brewed with passion, in a warm, inviting space.
flavour_profile: Artisanal coffee, precise brewing, cozy ambiance, local charm
about:
Revolver Coffee: Gastown’s Coffee Lab and Community Anchor

Revolver Coffee, nestled on Gastown’s iconic Cambie Street, is where the art of specialty coffee meets an unmistakable soul. Founded by the Giannakos family and inspired by world-renowned cafés spanning Tokyo to Montreal, Revolver delivers a coffee experience that is both progressive and refreshingly simple. Every detail here is intentional, from the minimalist yet warm design—think reclaimed B.C. fir and an open brewing “laboratory” bar—to the obsessive weekly blind tastings that determine which seasonal beans make the cut. The focus is uncompromising: each cup is brewed only after you order, using your preferred method, with an ever-changing selection from top North American roasters. Customers become part of the process, watching every precise pour-over, espresso, or macchiato come to life in full view.

Revolver’s reputation extends well beyond Vancouver, earning accolades like “Best Coffeehouse” at the Vancouver Magazine Restaurant Awards and spots on Vancouver’s best coffee shop lists. Its menu, though intentionally short, features masterful pour-overs, velvety macchiatos, and rotating single origins—including rare offerings like DAK’s Panama Geisha. The service is elevated by passionate, knowledgeable baristas and a cozy ambiance known for its rustic charm and warm vibes. For the perfect pairing, indulge in pastries sourced from local artisanal bakers—don’t miss the acclaimed coffee cake or the power muffin. Whether you’re a traveling coffee geek or a neighborhood regular, Revolver is a must-visit destination, where coffee is both a craft and a communal experience.

name: Ottawa Bike Cafe
excerpt_short: Specialty coffee, cycling, and community. A vibrant hub on Sparks Street.
excerpt_long: Ottawa Bike Café: Where specialty coffee meets cycling culture. Community hub with local eats, events, and a passion for quality. Pedal-powered delight!
