name: Mixed Grounds Coffee
excerpt_short: Culture, craft, community brew at Mixed Grounds. Specialty coffee, creative hub, and vibrant flavors.
excerpt_long: Mixed Grounds: San Diego's vibrant hub. Specialty coffee, micro-roastery, and community space. Culture, craft, and exceptional brews.
summary: Mixed Grounds: San Diego's vibrant hub. Specialty coffee, micro-roastery, and a multicultural space. Freshly roasted beans, inventive drinks, and community spirit.
flavour_profile: Vibrant fusion, craft roasts, cultural hub, innovative drinks
about:
Mixed Grounds Coffee: Where Culture, Craft, and Community Brew

Step into Mixed Grounds Coffee and discover a space that pulses with creative energy, rooted in San Diego’s vibrant Vietnamese community. Since opening its doors in 2020, Mixed Grounds has carved out a unique identity—not just as a specialty café and micro-roastery, but as a welcoming, multicultural hub where art, hip-hop, and craft coffee intersect. With two locations in North Park and Logan Heights, their mission centers on elevating voices from underserved origins, often sourcing beans directly from farms that don’t always get the industry spotlight. Roasted in small batches, their portfolio features carefully curated specialty coffees from around the world, each cup reflecting dedication to freshness, quality, and sustainability.

Beyond the meticulously roasted single-origins and blends, what truly sets Mixed Grounds apart is its inventive menu: don’t miss their house specialty, the Buko Pandan Special—an iced treat blending housemade pandan syrup, coconut cream, coco jelly, and espresso. The café also offers an array of high-quality pastries and breakfast burritos, making it a true community gathering spot from morning through late night on weekends. Founded and operated by a diverse, passionate team, Mixed Grounds stands as a testament to what happens when culture, craft, and community come together in every cup.

name: Communal Coffee
excerpt_short: San Diego's heart brews here. Craft coffee, community, and creative vibes.
excerpt_long: San Diego's Communal Coffee: Craft coffee meets community. Inspiring space, fresh flavors, and a welcoming vibe. A true third place.
summary: San Diego's Communal Coffee: Craft coffee meets community. Inspiring space, fresh brews, and local eats. A welcoming third place for all.
flavour_profile: Craft coffee, community hub, floral-inspired, local vibe
about:
Communal Coffee: Where Craft Meets Community in San Diego

Step inside Communal Coffee in North Park and you immediately sense the soul of San Diego’s creative community. Founded by visionary Jen Byard in 2016, this specialty café isn’t just about coffee—it’s about fostering inspiration and a sense of belonging. Every inch of the space radiates warmth, from its signature “Coffee and Flowers” sign to sunlit interiors often shared with stunning florals courtesy of Native Poppy. Communal Coffee’s setting is Instagram-famous for a reason, blending beautiful design, thoughtfully curated goods, and a spirit of inclusivity that welcomes all. Whether you’re after a moment of calm or a lively catch-up, the ambiance is both uplifting and comforting, creating a true third place for locals and visitors alike.

The coffee portfolio at Communal showcases a dedication to craft and freshness. Their menu highlights house blends like the Haven Blend, expertly prepared espresso drinks, and seasonal pour-over selections, with a keen focus on quality and unique flavor profiles. Awarded Tripadvisor’s Travelers’ Choice—marking it among the top 10% of establishments—Communal’s acclaim is built not just on drinks but on experience. The food menu champions local, fresh, and inclusive offerings: from vegan egg frittata sandwiches to Turkish eggs and an appealing range of gluten-free pastries. Insider tip: don’t miss the floral-inspired lattes and creative breakfast choices. For a specialty coffee stop that’s truly rooted in community and craft, Communal Coffee is a must-sip destination.
hours_weekday: Mon - Thu: 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM, Fri: 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM

name: Mostra Coffee
excerpt_short: Award-winning roastery. Global flavors. Community hub. Purpose-driven craft. Experience Mostra.
excerpt_long: Mostra Coffee: Award-winning roastery. Global flavors, community-driven. Passionate founders, exceptional coffee, and a vibrant experience.
summary: Mostra Coffee: Award-winning roastery, community hub. Global flavors, purpose-driven craft. Experience artistry, passion, and positive change in every cup.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, global flavors, community hub, vibrant vibe
about:
Mostra Coffee: Purpose-Driven Craft and Global Flavors in Every Cup

Mostra Coffee stands out in San Diego’s specialty coffee scene as both an award-winning roastery and a vibrant community hub, founded by four friends driven by a mission to uplift coffee farmers and elevate human connection. With roots that began in a humble garage, Mostra is now celebrated internationally, having received Roast Magazine’s coveted 2020 Micro Roaster of the Year award. Co-founders Jelynn Malone—a dynamic entrepreneur and actor—and Beverly Magtanong—a classically trained opera singer—infuse the brand with artistry, passion, and a commitment to creating positive change. Their pursuit of greatness is reflected in every aspect of the Mostra experience, from meticulous sourcing of beans (including highly acclaimed lots from the Philippines) to the soulful, eclectic décor and genuine hospitality that greet each guest.

Mostra’s coffee portfolio dazzles with both single origins and expertly crafted blends, showcasing beans from the Philippines, Latin America, and Africa, each roasted to accentuate terroir and complexity. The cafe’s lineup features signature drinks like the crème brûlée latte and campfire mocha, alongside award-winning espresso and hand-brewed coffees. Food offerings include thoughtfully sourced pastries and light bites that complement the nuanced profiles of their beverages. Sustainability efforts shine in their compostable packaging and commitment to inclusivity. Whether savoring a slow pour at the communal table or grabbing a to-go treat, visitors find Mostra’s vibrant energy, dedication to craft, and community-focused ethos make every visit a memorable performance.
address: 12045 Carmel Mountain Rd UNIT 302, San Diego, CA 92128

name: Moniker Coffee Co
excerpt_short: San Diego soul in every cup. Specialty coffee, community, and connection.
excerpt_long: San Diego soul in every cup. Moniker Coffee Co.: a hub for connection, craft coffee, and community. Experience the vibrant vibe.
summary: San Diego soul in every cup. Moniker Coffee Co. is a hub for connection, with expertly crafted coffee, ethical beans, and a welcoming vibe.
flavour_profile: San Diego soul, craft coffee, community hub, creative vibe
about:
Moniker Coffee Co.: A Gathering Place with San Diego Soul

Moniker Coffee Co. infuses every cup with the spirit of San Diego’s creative community. Set within the inviting spaces of Liberty Station and North Park, this specialty coffee haven is more than just a cafe—it’s a vibrant hub for connection, reflection, and discovery. The open, airy interiors blend modern design with laid-back California warmth, while every detail, from the art-filled walls to the friendly baristas, creates a welcoming vibe where everyone feels at home. Moniker is part of Moniker General, an innovative collective uniting craft coffee, curated retail, a cocktail bar, and lively community events, all under one roof. This synergy amplifies the brand’s mission: to enrich daily rituals and foster genuine human connection.

The coffee program at Moniker Coffee Co. is a showcase of quality and intentionality, with a menu highlighting expertly crafted espresso drinks, pour-overs, and signature house blends. Beans are carefully sourced to ensure both ethical origins and distinctive flavor profiles, with rotating single-origin selections for adventurous palates. The toast bar features creative, satisfying pairings—think smashed avocado or berry ricotta—while local pastries provide the perfect pairing for your cup. While Moniker is woven into the fabric of San Diego’s artisan scene, it’s their commitment to craft, their community-first ethos, and their seamless blend of great coffee and memorable experiences that make every visit a standout. For a local tip: don’t miss their expertly balanced cortado or the house specialty toasts, best enjoyed while soaking up the buzz of Liberty Station’s arts district.
hours_weekday: Mon - Wed: 7:00 AM - 1:00 PM, Thu - Fri: 7:00 AM - 5:00 PM

name: Bird Rock Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: San Diego's coffee heart. Direct trade, award-winning roasts, and soulful vibes. Experience coffee excellence.
excerpt_long: Bird Rock: San Diego's coffee heart. Direct trade, award-winning beans, and soulful vibes. Experience the best espresso and pour-overs.
summary: San Diego's coffee heart. Bird Rock: direct trade, award-winning roasts, and soulful vibes. Experience exceptional espresso and single-origin delights.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, direct trade, cupping, specialty coffee mecca
about:
Bird Rock Coffee Roasters: The Beating Heart of San Diego’s Specialty Coffee Scene

Bird Rock Coffee Roasters, nestled in the vibrant neighborhood of La Jolla, is a cornerstone of San Diego’s specialty coffee culture. Founded by Chuck Patton in 2006, after a passion-driven home-roasting journey, Bird Rock quickly made waves by championing direct trade and building meaningful relationships with coffee farmers worldwide. This ethos has earned them national acclaim, including the prestigious Micro Roaster of the Year award from Roast Magazine in 2012 and multiple Good Food Awards. Their coffees consistently score above 90 points on Coffee Review, with highlights such as securing the #1 spot in 2016. This legacy of excellence permeates every cup served, and their knowledgeable staff are sought after globally for judging and consulting on experimental coffees.

Stepping into Bird Rock is an experience infused with soulful energy and West Coast hospitality. The café boasts handcrafted espresso drinks, meticulously brewed pour-overs, and seasonal single-origin offerings from celebrated regions like Kenya and Colombia. Signature blends such as the crowd-pleasing “Nice” and their award-winning espressos headline a rotating portfolio that reflects both innovation and respect for tradition. Weekly public cuppings invite guests behind the scenes, while a thoughtful selection of locally sourced pastries complements the coffee program. For the best experience, don’t miss their expertly pulled espresso or a pour-over featuring a current micro-lot—each cup is a testament to their relentless pursuit of quality and genuine love for coffee.

name: Pacandé Kaffeerösterei
excerpt_short: Colombian soul in Munich. Direct trade, ethical beans. Taste the story, savor the flavor.
excerpt_long: Discover the soul of Colombian coffee at Pacandé. Direct trade, sustainable practices, and exquisite beans roasted in Munich. Experience the difference.
summary: Discover the soul of Colombian coffee in Munich. Pacandé Kaffeerösterei: Direct trade, ethical sourcing, and vibrant flavors. Experience the best of Colombian beans.
flavour_profile: Colombian specialty, direct trade, eco-roasting, diverse origins
about:
Pacandé Kaffeerösterei: The Soul of Colombian Coffee in Munich

Nestled in Munich’s Westend, Pacandé Kaffeerösterei radiates authenticity and purpose—a specialty coffee oasis devoted solely to the vibrant world of Colombian beans. The heart of Pacandé beats with direct relationships: every lot is sourced straight from Colombian farmers, fostering transparency and paying fair, sustainable prices. Their deep focus on traceability and ethical trade infuses each cup with meaning, celebrating the expertise and stories of the producers behind their beans. The roastery’s eco-driven approach shines through their use of a Loring roaster, which minimizes CO₂ output while unlocking the finest flavors from each batch.

Pacandé’s menu is a love letter to Colombian coffee diversity. Expect standout single-origin offerings and microlots—each tracing back to a unique farm and microclimate. The portfolio showcases classic varieties like Red Bourbon and Caturra, with flavor profiles ranging from juicy ripe fruit and honey sweetness to nutty depth, particularly in their signature espresso blend from Huila. The café’s welcoming space is complemented by handpicked pastries and warm, knowledgeable service. For those seeking a true specialty coffee journey, Pacandé’s commitment and expertise make every visit both an education and a treat.
hours_weekday: Mon - Fri: 9:00 AM - 1:00 PM, 2:00 PM - 6:00 PM

name: Poppi Farmer - Specialty Coffee and Organic Food
excerpt_short: Munich's soulful haven. Specialty coffee, organic living, and community spirit.
excerpt_long: Munich's soulful haven. Specialty coffee, organic living, and community spirit. Locally roasted beans, nourishing food, and sun-drenched terrace.
summary: Munich's soulful haven. Specialty coffee, organic living. Locally roasted beans, vibrant dishes, and a sun-drenched terrace. Slow down, connect, savor.
flavour_profile: Specialty coffee, organic, sustainable, community, vibrant cuisine
about:
Poppi Farmer: Munich’s Soulful Haven for Specialty Coffee & Organic Living

Poppi Farmer is more than just a specialty coffee spot—it's a celebration of conscious living and community nestled in the heart of Munich’s Au district. Inspired by the founders’ family roots and their grandfather’s love for the rolling Bavarian hills, this café stands as a living tribute to respect for nature, people, and connection. Poppi Farmer’s values shine through in every aspect: from their carbon-neutral operations and use of renewable energy, to sourcing exclusively organic, local produce. Every cup tells a story, featuring locally roasted specialty coffees grown by small cooperatives and often including limited drops of standout origins like their soon-to-be-released Costa Rican beans, lauded during recent cuppings for their exceptional character. You’ll also find an evolving portfolio of blends and single origins, expertly prepared by passionate baristas.

The soul of Poppi Farmer extends beyond the cup. Their all-day breakfast and lunch menus merge vibrant Australian culinary influences with Munich’s regional bounty—expect nourishing, wholesome dishes and a rainbow of homemade, vegan-friendly treats. Signature food offerings are paired with fresh juices, homemade lemonades, natural wines, and even espresso martinis, all savored best on their sun-drenched terrace. Poppi Farmer is a sanctuary for families, friends, and travelers alike, inviting everyone to slow down, connect, and savor life’s simple, sustainable pleasures. For those passionate about exceptional coffee, regenerative food, and genuine community spirit, there’s no place quite like Poppi Farmer.

name: Lost Weekend
excerpt_short: Munich's creative heart. Specialty coffee, vegan treats, and vibrant arts meet. Your urban escape.
excerpt_long: Munich's creative heart brews here. Lost Weekend: specialty coffee, vegan delights, and a vibrant cultural hub near the university.
summary: Munich's Lost Weekend: a creative hub near the university. Specialty coffee, vegan treats, and vibrant events fuel a unique urban escape.
flavour_profile: Specialty coffee, vegan menu, creative hub, urban oasis
about:
Lost Weekend: Munich’s Creative Pulse Brews in Every Cup

Tucked just steps from Munich’s Ludwig-Maximilians-University, Lost Weekend is more than a specialty café—it’s a thriving hub for students, artists, and coffee lovers seeking a vibrant urban escape. Step into the spacious, plant-filled interior and you’ll immediately sense the venue’s unique soul, where minimalist design meets the buzz of creative conversation. The all-vegan menu complements the specialty coffee ethos: expect meticulously crafted espresso drinks, inventive seasonal specials, and plant-based alternatives like homemade chai lattes and matcha—all served with a focus on sustainability and modern taste. Daytime visitors find the perfect spot for work or study, while evenings come alive with open mic poetry, comedy nights, and live music, making Lost Weekend a genuine cultural meeting place.

While the café has not received notable coffee roasting awards, its reputation as a specialty coffee pioneer in Munich is well-earned. The coffee portfolio spans classic espresso-based drinks, rich filter coffee, and standout specialties like vegan vanilla milk lattes and coconut matcha cake—a must-try treat among regulars. The selection of fresh cakes, pastries, and savory vegan comfort food perfectly rounds out the experience. With no reservations required and a welcoming, laptop-friendly vibe, Lost Weekend is the city’s go-to destination for anyone craving excellent coffee and authentic creative energy.

name: Café Fräulein
excerpt_short: Munich's cozy sweetheart. Artisanal coffee, cakes, and a soulful embrace.
excerpt_long: Munich's cozy sweetheart! Café Fräulein, near Viktualienmarkt, offers artisanal treats, specialty coffee, and a warm, whimsical vibe. A must-visit!
summary: Café Fräulein: Munich's cozy haven. Artisanal cakes, specialty coffee, and a whimsical charm. A soulful embrace in the heart of the city.
flavour_profile: Cozy charm, artisanal pastries, local gem, Munich café culture
about:
Café Fräulein: Munich’s Cozy Sweetheart with Soul

Step into Café Fräulein, nestled just off Munich’s iconic Viktualienmarkt, and you’ll immediately sense its unique charm. This petite, floral-adorned café radiates a cozy, whimsical energy—a haven where tradition meets modern delight. Run for over 12 years by the passionate duo Alex & Peter, Café Fräulein is renowned for artisanal cakes and pastries crafted on-site with regional, natural ingredients. The atmosphere is intimate yet lively, accented by gentle classical music and bursts of laughter from loyal regulars and new visitors alike. Café Fräulein holds a coveted Tripadvisor Travelers’ Choice award, ranking it among Munich’s top coffee destinations and a must-visit spot in the city’s café culture.

The coffee menu blends expertly pulled espresso drinks with specialty filter options, complemented by a thoughtful selection of plant milks and house-made syrups. At the heart of the menu is the legendary cinnamon roll—fluffy, aromatic, and sometimes paired with vanilla sauce, these buns enjoy almost cult status among locals. Alongside, discover vegan treats, luscious cakes, savory sandwiches, and hearty breakfast and brunch options. Café Fräulein’s commitment to quality and community shines in every detail, from their handmade pastries to their warm, attentive service. Whether you’re seeking the perfect afternoon treat or a memorable slice of Munich life, this café delivers both soulful coffee and a welcoming embrace.

name: Man Versus Machine Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Munich's specialty coffee soul.House-roasted, vibrant flavors. A must-visit coffee hub.
excerpt_long: Munich's specialty coffee soul. Founded in 2014, Man Versus Machine roasts 100% specialty grade beans, highlighting natural flavors. A must-visit.
summary: Munich's specialty coffee soul. Man Versus Machine: quality & authenticity. House-roasted, highlighting coffee's natural flavors. A must-visit for pure coffee experiences.
flavour_profile: Specialty roasts, vibrant flavors, minimalist vibe, craft focus
about:
Man Versus Machine: Munich’s Specialty Coffee Soul

Step into Man Versus Machine and discover the heartbeat of Munich’s specialty coffee scene. Founded in 2014 by Marco and Cornelia Mehrwald, this fiercely independent roaster champions quality and authenticity above all else. Their Müllerstrasse flagship blends raw textures with minimalist modern flair, creating a cozy, luminous space where every detail—from the playful interiors to the inviting bar—reflects their dedication to craft. Man Versus Machine is no ordinary café; it has caught the eye of Michelin-starred chefs and renowned bars, earning a reputation as one of Germany’s most exciting and progressive coffee destinations. The shop’s vibe is warm and unpretentious, with a knowledgeable team eager to guide everyone from newcomers to aficionados through the world of specialty coffee.

The coffee portfolio is a testament to their ethos: 100% specialty grade, never Robusta, always focused on clarity and flavor. Signature offerings include their “Nudist Blend” espresso, vibrant single origins like the Indonesian Toarco A, and indulgent Nitro Cold Brew. Filter and espresso fans alike will find meticulous options, while creative specials like espresso tonic offer a refreshing twist. Though the food selection leans simple—with vegetarian and vegan-friendly options—the real star is the cup you hold. House-roasted on-site by Marco himself, each batch spotlights coffee’s natural fruit character, roasted to highlight nuance rather than mask it. For those who want to dive deeper, MVSM also hosts home-brewing classes, making this a must-visit hub for anyone seeking Munich’s purest coffee experience.

name: Suuapinga - Specialty Coffee
excerpt_short: Munich's coffee heartbeat. Specialty roastery, global beans, expertly crafted.
excerpt_long: Munich's specialty coffee haven. Founded in 2019, Suuapinga blends history with third-wave culture. Experience global origins, artisanal craft, and award-worthy coffee.
summary: Suuapinga: Munich's specialty coffee heartbeat. Founded in 2019, we blend history with third-wave culture. Experience global origins, artisanal craft, and award-worthy coffee.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, global origins, innovative blends, cozy vibe
about:
Suuapinga: Munich’s Heartbeat for Specialty Coffee

Step into Suuapinga and you’ll discover more than just coffee—this is a place where Munich’s rich history and the vibrant pulse of third wave coffee culture intertwine. Founded in 2019 by Pete, Emanuel, and Lucas—friends with backgrounds in gastronomy, architecture, mathematics, and politics—Suuapinga stands out as a hub of innovation and passion. Their journey began with a mission to transform Munich’s traditionally Italian-influenced coffee scene, sourcing 100% Arabica beans from trusted partners and roasting with meticulous care to unlock every nuanced flavor. From their flagship café to collaborations like the Suuapinga x La Marzocco showroom, their three locations have quickly become must-visit destinations for coffee aficionados.

Suuapinga’s coffee portfolio is a celebration of global origins and artisanal craft. Their signature blend marries Brazil’s Samambaia and Ethiopia’s Bombé, while single-origin offerings span Papua New Guinea, Colombia, Kenya, and more. Espresso, filter, and creative seasonal specialties—such as their much-loved iced Matcha Latte—shine alongside expertly steamed plant-based or dairy milk cappuccinos. The in-house bakery delights with cinnamon buns and fresh pastries, making each visit a full sensory experience. Whether you’re seeking brewing advice, a barista course, or an award-worthy cup, Suuapinga’s atmosphere and expertise invite you to linger and savor coffee at its finest.

name: Henry hat Hunger
excerpt_short: Munich's cozy soul. Specialty coffee, homey vibes, and community. Quality in every cup.
excerpt_long: Munich's cozy soul. Henry hat Hunger: specialty coffee, homey vibes, and community in every cup. A local gem.
summary: Munich's cozy soul for specialty coffee. Henry hat Hunger: community, quality, and warmth in every cup. A local gem.
flavour_profile: Cozy neighborhood gem, specialty coffee, homemade treats
about:
Henry hat Hunger: Munich’s Cozy Soul for Specialty Coffee Seekers

Tucked away in Munich’s vibrant Au district, Henry hat Hunger radiates the unmistakable warmth and character of a true neighborhood gem. With its homey atmosphere and thoughtfully curated interior, this café draws regulars and newcomers alike seeking not just caffeine, but a genuine sense of community. The team’s passion for quality is evident in every cup, from meticulously prepared espresso drinks to creamy cappuccinos and aromatic chai lattes. The coffee program focuses on specialty-grade beans, expertly brewed to highlight nuanced flavor profiles. Though specific awards or famed roasters are not listed, the consistently high ratings—from a glowing 4.6 on Restaurant Guru to near-perfect TripAdvisor reviews—speak volumes about its local acclaim and beloved status among Munich’s coffee aficionados.

Henry hat Hunger’s menu extends far beyond the cup, offering a tempting array of thickly layered sandwiches, tramezzini, fresh panini, buttery croissants, and homemade cakes that make each visit memorable. The efficient, welcoming staff add to the welcoming vibe, ensuring every guest feels at home. While there’s no mention of famous founders or global coffee accolades, the café’s stellar reputation rests firmly on its commitment to quality, cozy ambiance, and outstanding service—a must-visit for anyone craving coffee with soul in Munich.

name: Café Blá
excerpt_short: Nordic coffee haven in Munich. Transparent sourcing, fruity notes, and a welcoming vibe.
excerpt_long: Nordic coffee haven in Munich. Café Blá: transparent sourcing, fruity roasts, and a welcoming vibe near the Isar. Experience coffee with heart.
summary: Munich's Nordic coffee haven. Café Blá: transparent sourcing, celebrating unique flavors. Light roasts, fruity notes, and a welcoming vibe near the Isar.
flavour_profile: Nordic-inspired, specialty coffee, fruity notes, transparent sourcing
about:
Café Blá: Munich’s Nordic Coffee Gem with Heart

Nestled just steps from the river Isar and the Deutsches Museum, Café Blá delivers a slice of Nordic-inspired specialty coffee culture in Munich’s vibrant Au-Haidhausen district. Founded by Jacob—also Head Roaster at Vits Coffee—this café’s soul lies in its dedication to transparent sourcing, celebrating the people behind each bean, and highlighting the unique flavors of different coffee regions and processing methods. With roast days twice a week and small batches crafted on their beloved Giesen WA15 drum roaster, every cup at Café Blá is brewed with meticulous care and a passion for complexity and character.

Café Blá’s menu spotlights light filter coffees and espresso roasts with a signature lean toward fruity notes and balanced acidity, appealing to those who appreciate brightness and nuance in their cup. The café also features a rotating array of brunch classics, fresh sandwiches, homemade cakes, and vegetarian or vegan options, all made daily in-house. While coffee is the undisputed star, guests can also enjoy craft beers, natural wines, and teas. This welcoming, walk-in-only spot is perfect for lingering over an expertly crafted flat white or grabbing something delicious for a stroll along the Isar—a true haven for coffee lovers seeking authenticity, community, and honest flavor in Munich.

name: ALRIGHTY Roastery and Coffee Shop
excerpt_short: Soulful specialty coffee, roasted on-site. Caretrade, supporting underdog farmers.
excerpt_long: ALRIGHTY: Munich's Werksviertel gem. Craft-roasted specialty coffee, sourced from "underdog" farmers. Taste the flavor, feel the impact.
summary: ALRIGHTY: Munich's Werksviertel gem. Craft-roasted specialty coffee, sourced ethically. Experience rich flavors, support "underdog" farmers, and a better world.
flavour_profile: Craft roasting, ethical sourcing, vibrant atmosphere, unique flavors
about:
ALRIGHTY Roastery & Coffee Shop: Soulful Coffee in Munich’s Werksviertel

ALRIGHTY Roastery & Coffee Shop radiates a unique spirit in the vibrant heart of Munich’s Werksviertel, marrying craft roasting with a cozy, modern café setting where transparency, flavor, and impact intertwine. Here, you’ll witness coffee roasted on-site—immersing yourself in aromas and the craft itself—before savoring your cup, expertly prepared with specialty coffees sourced exclusively from “underdog” farmers: young, female, or African growers who are redefining industry standards. The soul of ALRIGHTY beats with its Caretrade philosophy, a mission-backed commitment to fair, sustainable sourcing and social good, championed by environmental icon Jane Goodall, patron of ALRIGHTY’s cause. Every cup also supports reforestation projects in Ethiopia and the Jane Goodall Institute’s Roots & Shoots program in Tanzania.

The coffee portfolio features uncompromising specialty-grade beans, their signature ALRIGHTY House Blends, and an award-winning decaf that loyal fans describe as indistinguishable from regular coffee. Whether you’re an espresso aficionado, filter enthusiast, or seeking a top-tier decaf, ALRIGHTY’s range—always freshly roasted and meticulously sourced—delivers rich and complex flavors. Pair your coffee with thoughtfully curated pastries for the ultimate experience. For those curious about the craft, roasting tours offer a behind-the-scenes look at the process. Rated an outstanding 4.93 out of 5 by over 180 customers, ALRIGHTY isn’t just a coffee stop—it’s a movement for better coffee and a better world.

name: bean batter
excerpt_short: Westend's heart: Specialty coffee, comfort food, and a warm, creative vibe.
excerpt_long: Westend's heart for specialty coffee & comfort. Two curated coffee options, expertly brewed. Cozy, lively, and always delicious. Espresso & waffles await!
summary: Westend's coffee heartbeat. Bean Batter: specialty beans meet waffles. Two curated coffee options, expertly brewed. Cozy, creative, and always delicious.
flavour_profile: Specialty coffee, all-day brunch, cozy vibe, local gem
about:
Bean Batter: Westend’s Heartbeat for Specialty Coffee and Comfort Food

Tucked into Munich’s vibrant Westend, Bean Batter radiates a unique soul that instantly welcomes you—here, the aroma of freshly ground specialty beans mingles with the comforting scent of waffles and pastries. This is not just a café; it’s a community hub where expertly crafted coffee meets all-day brunch in an atmosphere buzzing with warmth and creativity. With a 4.6-star rating and a loyal local following, Bean Batter sets itself apart by featuring two curated coffee options at any given time, always brewed to highlight their bean’s origin and character. The menu boasts everything from velvety espresso and seasonal filter coffees to decaf and creative cold brew, each cup meticulously prepared by passionate baristas. Vegan options and plant-based milks broaden the café’s appeal, alongside signature baked treats and indulgent breakfast-lunch fare.

Cozy yet lively, Bean Batter is the perfect spot to recharge, socialize, or simply savor a slow moment. Their commitment to quality extends beyond their coffee—thoughtful brunch offerings, vibrant lunches, and an irresistible selection of cakes make it a must-visit for foodies and coffee lovers alike. Whether you’re grabbing a quick coffee to go, settling in with friends, or taking a midday break, Bean Batter’s character shines through: approachable, innovative, and always delicious. For the ultimate treat, don’t miss their house specialties—pair a freshly pulled espresso with a homemade waffle for the true Bean Batter experience.

name: stray coffee roasters
excerpt_short: Munich's bold coffee soul. Ethically sourced, light roasts. Community, conversation, and exceptional coffee.
excerpt_long: Munich's bold coffee soul. Ethically sourced, light-roasted single-origins. Bright, inclusive café. Where coffee, conversation, and curiosity meet.
summary: Bold roasters, ethically sourced beans. Light roasts honor each origin. Bright café, inclusive vibe. Coffee, conversation, community.
flavour_profile: Micro-roaster, light roasts, ethical sourcing, vibrant café, coffee education
about:
Stray Coffee Roasters: Munich’s Bold New Coffee Soul

Stray Coffee Roasters has rapidly carved out a unique space in Munich’s specialty coffee scene, blending creative vision with uncompromising quality. Founded by Feldi and Ilan—two coffee aficionados with richly diverse backgrounds in roasting, cuisine, and the arts—Stray opened its doors in 2023 after emerging as a standout micro-roaster since 2021. Their approach is fearless and transparent, championing ethically sourced, limited single-origin coffees, all roasted lightly to honor each bean’s distinctive character. The vibe in their Gollierstraße café is bright, open, and inclusive, drawing a community of enthusiasts, newcomers, and even four-legged companions. This is a place where conversation, curiosity, and a deep love of coffee meet.

Stray’s offerings are anchored by two espresso options and a batch brew that rotate with the seasons, while pour-over aficionados can often score a custom V60 prepared with real care. Coffee lovers will find beans roasted for both house use and notable local cafés, reflecting Stray’s influence beyond its own bar. The menu features thoughtfully selected Franzbrötchen and other pastries, with vegan and kid-friendly options rounding out the hospitality. Their ethos of transparency extends to direct trade sourcing and open education at every step, making Stray a must-visit for anyone seeking not just exceptional coffee, but a genuinely new perspective on what a coffee roastery and café can be.

name: Standl 20 - Da wo's an Kaffee gibt
excerpt_short: Munich's specialty coffee haven. JB Kaffee's soul, unique brews, and market charm.
excerpt_long: Munich's Standl 20: Specialty coffee gem at Elisabethmarkt. JB Kaffee's unique blends, creative brews, and welcoming vibe. A must-visit!
summary: Munich's Standl 20: a specialty coffee gem at Elisabethmarkt. JB Kaffee's roastery offers unique blends, single origins, and creative coffee delights. A must-visit!
flavour_profile: Specialty coffee, market charm, creative blends, expert baristas
about:
Standl 20: Munich’s Specialty Coffee Gem at Elisabethmarkt

Surrounded by the vibrant stalls of Elisabethmarkt in Schwabing, Standl 20 is the beating heart of Munich’s specialty coffee culture. This unassuming hut, infused with a welcoming vibe and a distinct sense of character, has garnered a loyal local following and international recognition. Established by renowned JB Kaffee roaster Johannes Bayer and his partner Toni, Standl 20 stands out not just for its charming, flower-adjacent setting but for its commitment to quality and creativity. Their nomination for the Fizzz Award as Germany’s most creative café concept reflects this unique soul, where each detail—from the striking Kees van der Westen Mirage espresso machine to the knowledgable, approachable staff—adds to the experience.

Coffee aficionados find themselves spoiled for choice, with Standl 20’s portfolio featuring exclusive JB Kaffee blends and a rotating selection of exceptional single origins, available via espresso, V60, Aeropress, and house-made cold brew. The custom Standl 20 espresso blend, crafted to balance fruitiness with body, gently introduces newcomers to the nuanced world of specialty coffee. Alongside their award-winning brews, highlights include homemade cakes, buttery croissants, and inventive specialties like the refreshing coffee lemonade or affogato. Whether you’re a seasoned coffee geek or a curious market wanderer, Standl 20’s effortless blend of expertise, hospitality, and playful inventiveness makes it a must-visit spot in Munich.

name: A Little Lost
excerpt_short: Vegan coffee haven. Indie vibes. Munich's best plant-based brews & treats. Relax, connect, and savor.
excerpt_long: Munich's indie vegan coffee haven. Relaxed vibe, vintage charm, and soulful community. Exceptional plant-based coffee & treats await.
summary: Indie vegan coffee haven near Munich's station. Relaxed vibe, vintage decor, and soulful community. Exceptional plant-based coffee & treats await.
flavour_profile: Vegan, indie charm, cozy retreat, specialty coffee, plant-based
about:
A Little Lost: Munich’s Indie Vegan Coffee Retreat

A Little Lost, nestled just steps from Munich’s central train station, radiates indie charm and a sense of soulful community. As the beloved sibling of Lost Weekend, this café leans into a relaxed, welcoming vibe with eclectic vintage decor, vine-bordered artwork, and a gentle hum of conversation. The space is laptop-friendly, perfect for solo thinkers, creative catch-ups, or a rainy-day retreat, while the ever-present aroma of freshly brewed coffee sets the mood. The atmosphere is always buzzing but never rushed, cultivating a friendly space where regulars and first-timers alike are greeted with warmth and attentiveness.

Specializing in 100% vegan delights, A Little Lost’s coffee portfolio stands out with rich espresso-based classics and alternative brews crafted with oat, soy, almond, or coconut milk. Signature lattes—like the much-raved coconut milk latte—anchor a drinks menu celebrated by locals as some of Munich’s best. On the food front, the café excels with savory sandwiches, avocado toast, and hummus bagels, alongside an impressive pastry case brimming with decadent cakes—lemon-blueberry, chocolate, and carrot among the favorites. While awards and international fame aren’t their focus, the dedication to creative, plant-based excellence, quality beans, and a uniquely inclusive spirit have quickly earned A Little Lost a devoted following in Munich’s specialty coffee landscape.

name: Kaffeerösterei Viktualienmarkt
excerpt_short: Artisan coffee, hand-roasted in Munich's Viktualienmarkt. Experience the soul of coffee.
excerpt_long: Artisan coffee haven in Munich's Viktualienmarkt. Hand-roasted beans, crafted with passion. Espresso, filter, and sweet treats await.
summary: Discover artisan coffee at Kaffeerösterei Viktualienmarkt. Hand-roasted beans, crafted with passion in Munich's heart. A market gem for coffee lovers.
flavour_profile: Artisan roasts, market charm, specialty brews, cozy vibe
about:
Kaffeerösterei Viktualienmarkt: Munich’s Market Gem for Artisan Coffee

Nestled in the heart of Munich’s historic Viktualienmarkt, Kaffeerösterei Viktualienmarkt is a beloved destination for coffee aficionados who crave authenticity and craftsmanship. Since opening its doors in 2014, this small, independent roastery has won fans with its dedication to hand-roasting specialty coffees using traditional drum roasting methods. The soul of the place radiates from meticulous baristas who craft each cup with passion, serving both espresso and filter blends that highlight beans from select origins. Regularly earning accolades and ranked in the top 10 cafés in Munich, Kaffeerösterei Viktualienmarkt is distinguished as a Tripadvisor Travelers’ Choice award winner, reflecting its reputation for quality and consistency.

Beyond the outstanding coffee, guests can indulge in handmade Florentines and other sweet treats that pair perfectly with their brew, creating a moment of “la dolce vita” right at the market. The menu caters to breakfast seekers and passes on the art of good coffee through barista courses and seminars for enthusiasts who want to deepen their appreciation. While the focus remains on the coffee—whether you prefer a classic flat white or a carefully brewed filter—the friendly, intimate setting and the aromas of fresh roasting beans make every visit memorable. If you’re navigating Munich’s market scene, a stop at Kaffeerösterei Viktualienmarkt promises a genuine specialty coffee experience with local charm.

name: FAUSTO KAFFEERÖSTEREI
excerpt_short: Munich's soul of specialty coffee. Sustainable beans, artisanal roasting, and ethical sourcing.
excerpt_long: Munich's specialty coffee soul. Freshly roasted, ethically sourced beans. Award-winning coffee, chocolate, and pastries. A must-visit for coffee lovers.
summary: Experience Munich's specialty coffee soul. Fausto Kaffeerösterei: ethically sourced, expertly roasted beans. Discover unique flavors, from espresso to pour-over.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, ethical sourcing, diverse flavors, cozy vibe
about:
Fausto Kaffeerösterei: Munich’s Sustainable Soul of Specialty Coffee

Step into Fausto Kaffeerösterei and you’re enveloped by the intoxicating aroma of freshly roasted beans—a true centerpiece of Munich’s third wave coffee movement. Founded by Klaus Wildmoser and his brother-in-law, Fausto stands as one of the city’s largest independent roasteries, turning out over 300 tonnes of coffee annually while preserving a hands-on, artisanal approach. For more than 15 years, the Wildmoser family has committed to direct and fair trade, sourcing sustainably grown beans—like the signature espresso direct-imported from Turrialba, Costa Rica—ensuring flavor and ethical responsibility in every cup. The café’s modern yet inviting space, with plenty of seating inside and out, makes it an ideal destination for both coffee purists and casual sippers.

Fausto’s coffee portfolio is a world tour for your senses: from chocolatey Paradiso and robust Simao blends to the fruity, standout Flor de Macala, there’s always something new to discover thanks to their rotating “coffee of the week.” Their Pura Vida line, crafted from traceable and ethically sourced beans and cocoa, exemplifies their dedication to transparency and quality. Beyond coffee, guests can indulge in rich dark chocolates and carefully selected pastries, cementing Fausto as a must-visit for anyone craving authentic, award-worthy specialty coffee with a conscience. For the best experience, try their house espresso or explore a pour-over to appreciate the diverse origins and the roaster's meticulous craftsmanship.

name: Sorry Johnny Kaffeebar
excerpt_short: Munich's soulful coffee haven. Craft, community, and character intertwine.
excerpt_long: Munich's soulful coffee haven. Craft, community, and character intertwine. Specialty beans, inventive food, and a vibrant, welcoming vibe.
summary: Munich's soulful coffee haven. Craft, community, and character intertwine. Enjoy specialty coffee, inventive food, and a vibrant, welcoming vibe.
flavour_profile: Specialty coffee, vibrant vibe, creative brunch, local gem
about:
Sorry Johnny Kaffeebar: Munich's Soulful Coffee Haven

Sorry Johnny Kaffeebar stands out in Munich’s specialty coffee scene as a vibrant, neighborhood gem where craft, community, and character intertwine. Founded by the energetic trio Katrin Brüggemann, Johannes Rühl, and Florian Vogt in 2021, this café exudes a personal touch—each founder brings distinct expertise: Johannes curates the inventive kitchen, Flo orchestrates the coffee experience, and Katrin ensures a warm, seamless guest journey. Housed in a cozy corner of Haidhausen, Sorry Johnny balances hip moosgreen interiors with down-to-earth hospitality, drawing regulars and newcomers alike for the genuine vibe and people-watching from their sunny, sidewalk seating.

Coffee here is a serious affair, featuring Merchant & Friends’ specialty beans crafted as velvety cappuccinos, expert pour-overs, smooth cold brews, and even decaf options. The breakfast spread is a local highlight: brioche French toast, creamy Bircher muesli, and signature avocado or creative sandwiches on Julius Brantner’s exceptional bread. For lunch, expect changing menus with inventive combos—think peach, fennel, and goat cheese sandwiches. Sweet offerings like homemade carrot cake and artisanal pastries make a perfect pairing. Dog-friendly, vegan-inclusive, and lauded for its attentive service, Sorry Johnny Kaffeebar is a must for coffee aficionados and brunch lovers seeking a spirited Munich spot that feels both fresh and familiar.

name: sweet spot kaffee – specialty coffee
excerpt_short: Munich's specialty coffee haven. World-class brews, curated beans, and a joyful coffee experience.
excerpt_long: Munich's Sweet Spot: a specialty coffee haven near Viktualienmarkt. Discover world-class brews, rotating beans, and a welcoming vibe.
summary: Munich's Sweet Spot Kaffee: a specialty coffee sanctuary near Viktualienmarkt. Discover world-class brews, rotating beans, and a welcoming coffee culture.
flavour_profile: Specialty coffee, global roasters, expert baristas, cozy vibe
about:
Sweet Spot Kaffee: Munich’s Specialty Coffee Sanctuary

Tucked steps from Viktualienmarkt, Sweet Spot Kaffee stands out as Munich’s bright temple for third-wave coffee lovers. This intimate coffee haven is celebrated for consistently delivering some of the best brews in the city, with aficionados and international visitors alike lauding its smooth flat whites and meticulously prepared espressos. The soul of Sweet Spot lies in its unwavering devotion to specialty coffee culture: every week, the team curates three new coffees from world-renowned roasters like La Cabra, SEY, Coffee Collective, NØMAD, and Tim Wendelboe, ensuring a dynamic rotation of origins, profiles, and innovative processing methods. Their portfolio features sought-after beans—from washed Camacho Pink Bourbon from Colombia to anaerobic Ecuadorian Gesha—often including hidden gems known to connoisseurs.

Sweet Spot’s passionate baristas create not just coffee, but a sense of connection and discovery, guided by a philosophy that each cup should inspire joy and curiosity. Their Oatly Barista oat milk is a staple for plant-based fans, while the house-baked banana bread—especially when dotted with raspberries—has become legendary among regulars. While not a large-scale roaster themselves, Sweet Spot’s curated subscription service lets fans receive surprise specialty coffees at home, showcasing their ever-evolving line-up. Warm, welcoming, and defined by genuine coffee expertise, Sweet Spot Kaffee is a must-visit for anyone seeking world-class coffee and a unique slice of Munich’s specialty scene.

name: gangundgäbe
excerpt_short: Munich's cozy coffee salon. Ethically sourced, in-house roasted beans. Timeless elegance, local soul.
excerpt_long: Munich's cozy coffee salon. Ethically sourced beans, in-house roasted. Timeless elegance meets local character. Sophisticated, inviting, and unforgettable.
summary: Munich's cozy coffee salon. Ethically sourced beans, in-house roasted. Timeless elegance meets local character. Sophisticated, inviting, and unforgettable.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, vintage charm, ethical sourcing, cozy salon
about:
gangundgäbe: Munich’s Cozy Coffee Salon with a Soul

gangundgäbe stands apart in Munich’s specialty coffee scene, blending timeless elegance with an unmistakable local character. While the name means “commonplace,” every detail here says otherwise: rounded vintage furniture, moody fin de siècle lighting, and mellow jazz create a salon-like atmosphere that feels both sophisticated and inviting. Set just a short stroll from Goetheplatz, large street-facing windows invite natural light, framing a space perfect for reading, working, or pure relaxation. A well-stocked magazine rack and the subtle hum of conversation add to the cafe’s grown-up yet creative vibe—a nod to New Objectivity artist Otto Dix even finds its way into the WiFi password.

The real star, however, is the coffee. gangundgäbe roasts ethically sourced beans in-house on a Giesen roaster, offering single-origin filter options from Ethiopia, Ecuador, Guatemala, and Honduras, alongside meticulously crafted espresso blends and both light and dark roasts. Beans are sourced via direct trade from importers like Quijote Kaffee, ensuring fair pricing for farmers and traceable, sustainable quality. Espresso drinks, especially the light roast, earn local acclaim, paired with friendly service, fresh pastries, and local milk. For connoisseurs and casual drinkers alike, gangundgäbe delivers an immersive specialty coffee experience rooted in both transparency and tradition.

name: The Visit Coffee & Eatery
excerpt_short: Berlin's soul in every cup. Sustainably sourced, expertly roasted specialty coffee. A true community.
excerpt_long: Berlin's soul in every cup. The Visit: sustainably sourced, expertly roasted specialty coffee. A vibrant gathering place for coffee lovers.
summary: Berlin's soul in a cup. The Visit: sustainably sourced, expertly roasted coffee. A vibrant gathering place for coffee lovers, offering exceptional experiences and genuine community.
flavour_profile: Berlin coffee culture, micro-roasted, sustainable, community hub
about:
The Visit Coffee & Eatery: Where Berlin’s Coffee Culture Finds Its Soul

Step inside The Visit Coffee & Eatery and you’ll immediately sense its distinct Berlin spirit—welcoming, vibrant, and committed to authenticity. Born from a passion for sustainably sourced, hand-picked coffee, The Visit stands out not just as a roastery, but as a gathering place for coffee enthusiasts and newcomers alike. Their approach is all about simplicity perfected: high-quality beans, expert roasting, and a team of attentive baristas who make every guest feel like a regular. With multiple locations across the city, including their charming spot at Nürnbergerstraße 17, the café’s open ambience attracts an eclectic mix from the academic elite to creative families, all drawn by the promise of exceptional coffee experiences and genuine community connection.

The Visit’s portfolio is shaped by micro-roasted single origins and house blends, available as espresso, batch brew, and pour-over—each cup reflecting their commitment to quality and sustainability. The eatery’s reputation extends to a varied and hearty brunch menu, fresh bagels, decadent cakes, and standout pastries like the unique black vegan croissant. Vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options ensure everyone has something to savor. While there’s no flashy awards shelf, The Visit earns recognition through consistently glowing reviews and a spot among Berlin’s must-visit specialty coffee destinations. For those seeking a pure, soulful Berlin coffee experience, The Visit delivers—one hand-crafted cup at a time.

name: AKKURAT Café
excerpt_short: Modern Kreuzberg coffee gem. Hand-brewed perfection, rotating beans, and a community vibe.
excerpt_long: Modern coffee haven in Kreuzberg. Hand-brewed perfection, rotating beans, and top-tier pastries. Dog-friendly, community vibe.
summary: Akkurat Café: Kreuzberg's modern coffee gem. Hand-brewed perfection, featuring beans from La Cabra. Enjoy a community vibe with brunch and pastries. Dog-friendly oasis.
flavour_profile: Specialty coffee, minimalist charm, brunch, craft focus, urban oasis
about:
Akkurat Café: Kreuzberg’s Modern Coffee Gem

Tucked away on Besselstraße, Akkurat Café has quickly become a celebrated name in Berlin’s specialty coffee scene since opening in 2021. The space radiates a bright, minimalist charm—a perfect backdrop for serious coffee lovers and casual brunch seekers alike. Akkurat’s dedication to quality is evident in their rotating menu of hand-brewed filter coffees and expertly pulled espresso drinks, featuring beans from esteemed roasters like La Cabra. Whether you’re savoring a silky Ethiopian espresso with notes of milk chocolate and stone fruit, or exploring a natural anaerobic El Salvador batch brew, every cup here reflects the café’s commitment to both craft and approachability. The environment is laptop-friendly during weekdays, inviting you to linger and savor the community vibe.

Beyond pour-over and espresso, Akkurat shines with its food program, offering top-tier pastries and an all-week brunch menu by @danieldoesfood. The café’s dog-friendly ethos, plant-based milk options, and sunny outdoor seating make it an inclusive urban oasis. While Akkurat hasn’t claimed Berlin’s biggest coffee awards just yet, its spot in local guides and glowing word-of-mouth speak volumes. Tip: Try a filter flight for a deeper dive into their bean selection, and don’t miss their pastries—many locals say they’re some of the best in the city.

name: Coffee Twins - Specialty coffee
excerpt_short: Munich's Coffee Twins: Specialty coffee, homemade treats, and a cozy vibe.
excerpt_long: Coffee Twins: Munich's cozy haven. Specialty coffee, homemade delights, and a welcoming vibe. Experience genuine connections and pure flavors.
summary: Coffee Twins: Munich's cozy haven. Specialty coffee, homemade delights, and a welcoming vibe. Experience authentic flavors and genuine connections.
flavour_profile: Specialty coffee, homemade pastries, cozy vibe, twin founders
about:
Coffee Twins: Munich’s Cozy Corner for Specialty Coffee and Homemade Delights

Step into Coffee Twins, a hidden gem in Munich’s Isarvorstadt, where the soul of specialty coffee shines through every detail. Founded by twin brothers Daniel and Jonas Fondaj—two young but seasoned professionals with over six years in the industry—Coffee Twins has built a loyal following since opening in 2022. Their welcoming, neighborhood vibe invites you to slow down and savor not only masterfully crafted espresso and pour-over V60s, but also genuine connections and conversation. The twins’ commitment to quality extends from their partnership with JB Kaffe Roastery, known for its high-grade, ethically sourced beans, to their passionate engagement in Munich’s tight-knit specialty coffee scene.

At Coffee Twins, coffee is just the beginning. Discover a curated portfolio featuring espresso, filter coffee, cold brew, and vegan-friendly milk options, all complemented by an impressive range of homemade cakes and pastries. Every baked good is crafted from scratch using 100% Dinkel (spelt) flour sourced locally, and fresh Heumilch (hay milk) that enhances every coffee experience. Their food lineup is a testament to transparency and sustainability, with no additives—just pure, honest flavors. Whether you’re craving the signature house espresso or a fresh-baked pastry, Coffee Twins is a must-visit for anyone seeking authentic specialty coffee, artisanal baking, and the warmth of a true community hub.

name: westberlin
excerpt_short: Berlin soul meets specialty coffee. Unpretentious, passionate, and unmistakably westberlin.
excerpt_long: Berlin's westberlin: Specialty coffee meets creative spirit. Unpretentious, passionate brews in a space that celebrates Berlin's pulse.
summary: Berlin's westberlin: Specialty coffee meets creative spirit. Enjoy expertly crafted brews, sourced beans, and a vibrant, welcoming atmosphere near Checkpoint Charlie.
flavour_profile: Berlin cafe, specialty coffee, creative space, magazines, culture
about:
westberlin: Where Coffee Culture Meets Creative Spirit in Berlin

Tucked just steps from Checkpoint Charlie, westberlin blends Berlin’s eclectic soul with an unfiltered passion for specialty coffee. Founded by Kai Bröer in 2012—whose vision was shaped by vibrant New York cafés—this welcoming spot feels like a living room for locals and travelers alike. The space is airy, dotted with mismatched furnishings and flooded with natural light, inviting you to linger over pages from their renowned international magazine selection. At westberlin, coffee is both ritual and creative spark: you’ll find expertly crafted espresso-based drinks, including a crowd-favorite flat white, alongside hand-brewed filter options that showcase carefully sourced beans from respected European roasters.

Beyond the coffee, westberlin’s homemade cakes and light lunch offerings have won loyal fans, all served in a relaxed, art-meets-media atmosphere. While westberlin has not claimed headline coffee awards like some peers, it remains a beloved destination cited by guides and specialty coffee aficionados for its meticulous standards and distinctive character. The true charm lies in its blend of curated culture, genuine hospitality, and a dedication to coffee that turns every visit into a small celebration of Berlin’s creative pulse. If you’re seeking a standout brew with a side of inspiration, westberlin is essential Berlin coffee culture—unpretentious, passionate, and unmistakably its own.

name: Kaffeekirsche
excerpt_short: Berlin's specialty coffee sanctuary. Community, quality, and innovation. Freshly roasted, expertly brewed.
excerpt_long: Berlin's specialty coffee sanctuary. Since 2014, Kaffeekirsche roasts daily, sourcing from Cauca. Experience community, quality, and innovation.
summary: Berlin's specialty coffee sanctuary. Since 2014, Kaffeekirsche roasts daily, sourcing from Colombia & beyond. Community, quality, and innovation in every cup.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, vibrant cafes, craft coffee, Berlin charm
about:
Kaffeekirsche Roastery: Berlin’s Specialty Coffee Sanctuary

Step into Kaffeekirsche Roastery and instantly sense the authentic heartbeat of Berlin’s specialty coffee scene. Founded in 2014, Kaffeekirsche has earned a devoted following with its trio of vibrant locations across the city, each embodying the spirit of community, quality, and innovation. The flagship roastery in Tempelhof serves as both a café and a showroom, where fresh batches of specialty coffee are drum-roasted daily, showcasing beans sourced from storied origins like Colombia’s Cauca region. Standouts like the Dark Side Espresso and Gran Galope—beloved for their full body and long-lasting sweetness—highlight expertly sourced and meticulously roasted single origins designed to perform beautifully across espresso and filter methods. Skilled baristas are at the core of the experience, curating every cup with genuine passion and expertise.

Kaffeekirsche’s embrace of both tradition and creativity is also reflected in its menu, where fresh breakfast plates, vegan options, and small-batch pastries from the in-house bakery delight alongside world-class coffee. The atmosphere is relaxed yet spirited, balancing Kreuzberg’s bohemian roots with a focus on sustainable, quality-driven practices. Whether you’re a local regular or a curious visitor, the team’s warmth and knowledge make every visit memorable. For anyone looking to savor Berlin’s best coffee in a place where craftsmanship meets community, Kaffeekirsche stands as a must-visit destination.

name: Milch Halle Berlin Coffee
excerpt_short: Berlin's heart of specialty coffee. Roasted on-site, crafted with passion. A true coffee experience.
excerpt_long: Berlin's Milch Halle: Specialty coffee, roasted on-site. A creative Mitte haven, where passion meets perfect espresso and artisan treats.
summary: Berlin's Milch Halle: Where specialty coffee meets creative soul. Roasted on-site, serving organic blends & single origins. A true Berlin coffee experience.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, creative vibe, local icon, specialty focus
about:
Milch Halle: The Heartbeat of Specialty Coffee in Berlin’s Creative Mitte

Tucked among the art galleries and design studios of Auguststraße, Milch Halle pulses with the character and warmth that defines Berlin’s third wave coffee scene. For nearly a decade, this café has drawn locals and travelers alike, offering a true meeting point where specialty coffee craftsmanship is celebrated every day. The team’s passion is evident in every cup—from their own “Milch Halle” blend of organic Arabica espresso to batch-brew singles like the vibrant Apu from Peru. Emphasizing sustainability, fair sourcing, and continuous barista training, Milch Halle stands apart by roasting on-site since 2020 and presenting a curated coffee portfolio that features both blends and standout single origins. Espresso drinks are expertly prepared on a La Marzocco, with oat and dairy options, always finished with flawless latte art courtesy of their international barista crew.

But Milch Halle’s appeal goes beyond the cup. The café’s artisanal cakes, homemade vegan and gluten-free treats, and hearty sandwiches invite guests to linger, whether soaking in the dynamic vibe indoors or basking in the sun-soaked terrace beside the park. Though the founders remain unsung heroes rather than celebrity names, their background in hospitality and commitment to specialty coffee have carved out a local icon. Milch Halle also adapts with the times, offering fresh beans for home brewing and continually innovating the guest experience. Recognized as a Travelers’ Choice favorite and lauded for its authentic soul, Milch Halle is where Berlin’s creative energy meets the elevated ritual of specialty coffee.

name: Story Coffee Rösterei P-Berg (Kaffeespezialitäten)
excerpt_short: Berlin's coffee story, brewed with passion. Ethically sourced, expertly roasted, and community-loved.
excerpt_long: Prenzlauer Berg's Story Coffee: ethically sourced beans, expertly roasted. Experience Berlin's vibrant coffee scene, one delicious cup at a time.
summary: Story Coffee: Prenzlauer Berg's heart. Ethically sourced beans, expertly roasted. Experience Berlin's vibrant coffee scene, one cup at a time.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, cozy ambiance, community hub, coffee passion
about:
Story Coffee Rösterei P-Berg: Where Berlin’s Coffee Narrative Comes to Life

Nestled in the heart of Prenzlauer Berg, Story Coffee Rösterei delivers a singular experience for specialty coffee lovers. With its bright, welcoming interior and unmistakable local vibe, this café roastery stands out for its passionate approach to coffee—from ethical sourcing to precise roasting and expert brewing. Guests are greeted with the scents of freshly roasted beans as friendly baristas guide them through an ever-evolving portfolio of espresso blends and single origins. Story Coffee’s commitment to quality and transparency places it among Berlin’s leading specialty roasters, earning recognition in guides like European Coffee Trip and being included in curated lists of top coffee shops in Berlin.

The menu showcases meticulously prepared classics—think velvety cappuccinos, nuanced americanos, and robust espressos—alongside hand-selected filter brews. Pastries and biscuits round out the offering, echoing the cafe’s dedication to simple indulgence done right. Story Coffee’s two locations (Kollwitzstraße and Eberswalder Str.) are neighborhood anchors, infusing each cup with a sense of community and care. For both connoisseurs and curious newcomers, it’s a haven to savor Berlin’s vibrant third wave coffee scene, where every visit writes a new chapter in your coffee journey.

name: FRIEDL Rösterei & Kekse
excerpt_short: Cozy Berlin coffee gem. Hand-roasted beans, homemade cookies, and a welcoming, personal touch.
excerpt_long: Cozy Berlin coffee haven. Family-run Friedl Rösterei roasts unique beans in-house. Enjoy fresh brews, homemade cookies, and a warm welcome.
summary: Berlin's cozy coffee gem. Friedl Rösterei & Kekse: meticulously roasted beans, homemade cookies, and a welcoming atmosphere. Exceptional coffee, crafted with heart.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, homemade cookies, cozy vibe, local gem
about:
Friedl Rösterei & Kekse: Berlin’s Cozy Coffee Gem

In the vibrant heart of Prenzlauer Berg, Friedl Rösterei & Kekse stands out as a specialty coffee oasis, radiating the warmth of a welcoming family business. The soul of Friedl is its inviting, unpretentious atmosphere—where locals and coffee aficionados alike savor meticulously roasted beans and homemade cookies at sunlit tables or outdoor seats. The team’s approach is refreshingly personal, curating a rotating selection of beans and blends that spotlight character and sustainability, rather than fleeting trends. Friedl offers a rare breadth of origins—from Ethiopian and Kenyan single origins to robust Brazilian and Colombian varieties (even a prized decaf, seldom found in Berlin’s specialty scene). Their handcrafted blends and signature “Dark Blend 50/50” capture both traditional and adventurous palates, always roasted in-house for peak freshness.

Beyond its standout coffee, Friedl’s homemade cookies and small pastry selection elevate the café experience, embodying the roastery’s “Kekse” namesake. Each brew is customizable: guests can select their preferred origin for espresso or filter preparations, a thoughtful touch cherished by regulars. It’s not just about the drink, but the neighborhood ritual—the friendly staff remember your favorite blend, and the aroma of fresh coffee is ever-present. Whether you’re stopping by solo, meeting friends, or seeking a cozy date spot, Friedl Rösterei & Kekse offers an authentic slice of Berlin’s specialty coffee culture with heart and extraordinary taste.

name: CEBE COFFEE ROASTERS coffeeshop berlin
excerpt_short: Berlin's soulful coffee haven. Ethically sourced, expertly roasted. Experience the perfect cup.
excerpt_long: Berlin's soulful coffee haven. Exceptional beans, ethically sourced. Experience coffee as an art. Passionate team, inviting vibes.
summary: Berlin's soulful coffee haven. CEBE: exceptional beans, ethically sourced. Experience the passion in every cup, from Brazil to Ethiopia. Sustainable, delicious, and inviting.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, ethical sourcing, cozy vibe, diverse brews
about:
CEBE COFFEE ROASTERS: Berlin’s Soulful Specialty Coffee Haven

Tucked away on Boxhagener Strasse, CEBE COFFEE ROASTERS radiates the vibrant spirit of Berlin’s specialty coffee scene. This coffee roastery and café is defined by its commitment to exceptional quality, ethical sourcing, and a sustainable future. The vibe blends contemporary minimalism with genuine warmth—every cup and conversation here is an invitation to discover coffee as an experience, not just a beverage. The team is the heart of CEBE: handpicked for passion and expertise, their dedication infuses every batch and brew, creating an inviting energy from first sip to last.

CEBE’s portfolio shines with meticulously sourced high-graded origins including Brazil Santa Catarina, Costa Rica Sonora, Ethiopia Danisa Guji, El Salvador Cuzcatleco, and Colombia Cauca Pink Bourbon. The café proudly crafts these beans using diverse methods—Aeropress, Chemex, French Press, and Pour Over—catering to aficionados and curious newcomers alike. Beyond the cup, guests praise the café’s perfectly brewed chai lattes and a menu inspired by Mediterranean and Italian fare, with standout pastries and brunch options. Sustainability is central, from recycled ocean plastic drinkware to eco-friendly packaging, making CEBE a must-visit for coffee lovers seeking both flavor and conscience.

name: Die Espressonisten | Store and Craft Coffeeshop
excerpt_short: Berlin's soulful coffee sanctuary. Craft, community, and exceptional brews await.
excerpt_long: Berlin's soulful coffee sanctuary. Die Espressonisten: where passion meets a distinctive vibe. Exceptional coffee, crafted with precision and care.
summary: Berlin's soulful coffee sanctuary. Die Espressonisten: where passion meets a distinctive vibe. Exceptional coffee, crafted with precision and care. A true destination.
flavour_profile: Specialty coffee, Italian-style, cozy vibe, expert baristas
about:
Die Espressonisten: Berlin’s Soulful Coffee Sanctuary

Tucked away on Zimmerstraße near Checkpoint Charlie, Die Espressonisten is a beloved haven where specialty coffee passion meets a distinctive, soulful vibe. Founded in 2009 by Patrick and Delia Grossmann, pioneers of Potsdam and Berlin’s specialty coffee movement, the café radiates a refined yet approachable charm. Enter and you’ll find a bright, airy space with thoughtfully selected equipment lining the shelves—a treasure trove for home baristas and industry professionals alike. Die Espressonisten consistently earns rave reviews for both atmosphere and quality, making it a Travelers’ Choice café and a standout in Berlin’s competitive coffee scene.

The coffee portfolio here is a thoughtful blend of Italian-style, medium-to-dark roasted beans, complemented increasingly by lighter roasts like those from Berlin’s Epitome Coffee. Whether you crave a perfectly pulled espresso, a velvety cappuccino, or a batch brew, every cup is crafted with precision and respect for its origin. Sweet pastries and treats offer delightful pairings, while advice on choosing professional-grade home machines or barista equipment is always close at hand. Die Espressonisten isn’t just a coffee stop—it’s a destination for those seeking both craft and community in every cup.

name: Maxway Coffee
excerpt_short: Berlin soul in every cup. Specialty coffee, crafted with passion. A true coffee haven.
excerpt_long: Berlin soul in every cup. Since 2007, a haven for coffee lovers. Espresso excellence, baked treats, and a welcoming vibe.
summary: Berlin's heartfelt café since 2007. Behind Hauptbahnhof, a tranquil haven for coffee lovers. Specialty coffee, baked goods, and a welcoming vibe.
flavour_profile: Berlin specialty coffee, cozy vibe, quality espresso, fresh pastries
about:
Maxway Coffee: Berlin’s Heartfelt Café for True Coffee Lovers

Maxway Coffee radiates authentic Berlin soul from its inviting Mitte location, tucked just behind the Hauptbahnhof with a tranquil outdoor terrace facing the Bundeskanzleramt. Since 2007, Maxway has been a cherished refuge for coffee aficionados seeking more than just caffeine—a meditative haven where thoughtful design and community spirit meet. Maxway stands out for embracing the essence of specialty coffee, highlighting the journey from producer to barista in every cup. Their espresso portfolio is rooted in consistency and excellence, sourced year-round from a trusted partner roastery to ensure each shot shines with balanced, nuanced flavors. Every drink, whether a classic espresso, velvety cortado, or iced creation for Berlin’s summer months, is meticulously crafted to honor the hard work and skill at each step of the coffee chain.

Maxway’s menu goes far beyond coffee: the café delights with daily baked pastries, oven-fresh and irresistible, as well as house-made savory bites like couscous salad with mint and pine nuts, robust soups, and fresh salads. The team’s warmth and attention to detail create a fuss-free, welcoming vibe—every guest, whether solo or with friends, is treated like a regular, and special requests (vegan milks, dietary needs) are met with genuine care. While Maxway has not clinched the latest Berlin coffee awards, its loyal following is proof of a quietly beloved neighborhood gem. A visit to Maxway is a nod to Berlin’s understated coffee culture—pure, passionate, and always delicious.

name: Blaue Bohne Rösterei
excerpt_short: Unpretentious coffee haven. Daily rotating selections. Genuine conversations. Everyone welcome.
excerpt_long: Berlin's unpretentious coffee gem. Blaue Bohne: exceptional coffee for everyone. Rotating selections, genuine conversations, and a welcoming vibe.
summary: Berlin's unpretentious coffee gem. Blaue Bohne: exceptional coffee for everyone. Rotating selections, genuine conversations, and a welcoming vibe. Find your perfect cup.
flavour_profile: Craft roasts, welcoming vibe, diverse origins, coffee dialogue
about:
Blaue Bohne Rösterei: Berlin’s Unpretentious Coffee Gem

Stepping into Blaue Bohne Rösterei in Friedrichshain is like dropping into a living room built for true coffee fans and curious locals alike. Their philosophy is clear: “Echt guter Kaffee. Für echt alle”—they believe outstanding coffee shouldn’t come with dogma or exclusivity. Blaue Bohne’s relaxed, welcoming vibe is matched by a passion for dialogue: with rotating daily selections on the grinders, their team sparks genuine conversations about origins, roasting profiles, and brewing methods—making newcomers and connoisseurs feel instantly at home. The café’s community focus is palpable, with plenty of vegan options, plant-based milks, and a reputation for guiding guests to their perfect cup.

Blaue Bohne’s portfolio is a celebration of craft and diversity. Signature blends like Bandido, Sumex, Berlin, and Classico headline their offerings, while limited seasonal single origins—such as Hacienda Claudina (Colombia), Yirgacheffe (Ethiopia), and El Puente (Honduras)—showcase their sourcing expertise. Each release is meticulously chosen to highlight the unique character of its origin, often available only for a brief window. Filter, espresso, cold brew, and decaf are all on the menu, and the café complements its brews with a small but thoughtful selection of pastries and vegan treats. Whether you’re seeking a daily favorite or a rare microlot, Blaue Bohne’s approachable style ensures every coffee, and every guest, is given center stage.

name: Distrikt coffee
excerpt_short: Berlin's industrial chic meets specialty coffee perfection. Crafted with passion, served with soul.
excerpt_long: Berlin's industrial chic meets specialty coffee. Distrikt Coffee: expertly crafted brews, inviting space, and a taste of Berlin's vibrant café culture.
summary: Berlin's industrial chic meets specialty coffee. Distrikt Coffee: expertly crafted brews, inviting atmosphere, and a taste of Berlin's vibrant café culture.
flavour_profile: Berlin specialty coffee, industrial-chic, expert brews, local vibe
about:
Distrikt Coffee: Where Berlin’s Industrial Chic Meets Specialty Coffee Perfection

Nestled on a quiet Mitte street, Distrikt Coffee radiates the soul of Berlin’s specialty coffee movement. Founded in December 2014 by Sophie Hardy—London native turned Berliner—and a dedicated team of international baristas, Distrikt has quickly become a destination for those seeking expertly crafted coffee in an inviting, industrial-chic setting. The exposed brick walls, cozy seating nooks, and subtle touches of Berlin’s urban history offer both warmth and character. Sophie’s vision was to build genuine rapport with local residents while creating a venue that attracts coffee lovers from across the globe. The welcoming vibe, paired with a steadfast commitment to quality and friendly service, means you’ll find both loyal regulars and curious newcomers savoring each visit.

Dive into a menu built on beans from Fjord—a celebrated Berlin roaster run in collaboration with Silo and Father Carpenter—as well as guest selections from leading European roasteries. Distrikt’s offerings showcase vibrant single origins, balanced espressos, and filter brews, all prepared with precision. Cooking up an all-day breakfast and lunch menu, the kitchen crafts homemade cakes and partners with local bakeries for standout pastries, while weekend brunches are so popular that there’s often a line out the door. For a true taste of Berlin’s buzzing café culture, don’t miss out on their signature pancakes or inventive daily specials. Whether you’re a filter devotee or espresso aficionado, Distrikt Coffee’s harmony of skill, style, and soulful atmosphere guarantees a memorable cup every time.

name: Refinery High End Coffee
excerpt_short: Berlin's coffee haven. Rotating roasters, custom brews, and a welcoming vibe.
excerpt_long: Berlin's coffee haven. Refinery: where craft meets soul. Rotating roasters, custom gear, and a passion for the perfect cup.
summary: Berlin's coffee haven. Refinery High End Coffee: where passion meets craft. Experience rotating roasters, unique origins, and a welcoming vibe.
flavour_profile: Specialty coffee, artisanal roasts, expert baristas, cozy vibe
about:
Refinery High End Coffee: Berlin’s Hub for Coffee Aficionados

Tucked away just steps from the Spree Canal in Berlin’s vibrant Mitte, Refinery High End Coffee is the city’s beating heart for true specialty coffee lovers. Founded in 2015 by Tansel and Bora Özbek, two passionate champions of coffee culture, Refinery quickly established itself as a destination with soul—where service, craft, and personal connection are as important as the cup itself. The shop’s minimalist, welcoming vibe draws in everyone from neighborhood regulars to international coffee pilgrims seeking a taste of Berlin’s finest. The Özbeks and their team of seasoned baristas are always eager to share their expertise, making Refinery not just a café, but a living gallery of coffee’s artistry and heritage.

Refinery’s lineup is a rotating showcase of Berlin’s top roasters—like Bonanza, The Barn, and Fjord—alongside international legends such as Tim Wendelboe. Each month features a special single origin, often a microlot from Africa or South America, selected for its unique flavor profile and perfect espresso potential. Extraction is dialed in with custom equipment: the hand-built “Spirit” espresso machine from Amsterdam and grinders by Mahlkönig and Mazzer ensure uncompromising quality. Complement your cup with their fresh, homemade food—think sandwiches, pies, vegan options, and standout pastries, all crafted from local, seasonal ingredients. Don’t miss the monthly single origin or ask for a mini-cupping at their Kreuzberg concept store, where curiosity and taste go hand in hand with every visit.

name: Populus Coffee Roasters / No coffee shop anymore
excerpt_short: Nordic heart, Berlin soul. Ethically sourced specialty coffee, roasted with care. Cozy vibes.
excerpt_long: Nordic heart, Berlin soul. Ethically sourced specialty coffee, roasted with care. Cozy vibes, Finnish treats, and canal-side charm await.
summary: Nordic heart, Berlin soul. Ethically sourced specialty coffee, roasted with Finnish expertise. Cozy vibes, community-driven, and unforgettable treats. A Berlin essential.
flavour_profile: Nordic roasts, ethical sourcing, Finnish flair, canal-side charm
about:
Populus Coffee: Nordic Heart, Berlin Soul

Tucked along the leafy Maybachufer in Berlin’s vibrant Kreuzkölln, Populus Coffee Roasters radiates a unique blend of Finnish warmth and cosmopolitan cool. Founded by Sari and Henrik Haavisto—whose roots in Finland and expertise from roasting at Oslo’s acclaimed Kaffa bring Nordic excellence to Berlin—Populus has become a local favorite for those who crave ethically-sourced, transparently roasted specialty coffees. Their focus on sustainability is evident in every cup, with carefully selected beans from trusted European suppliers and direct relationships with green coffee sources. Step inside and you’ll find a modern setup with top-notch brew gear: Nuova Simonelli Aurelia II espresso machines, V60 pour-overs, and EK43 grinders, ensuring every pour, from complex single origins to nuanced blends, is handled with precision and care.

Populus stands out not only for its coffee but for the cozy, community-driven vibe shaped by its founders. Guests rave about their Finnish-inspired menu, where open-faced sandwiches topped with fresh greens and specialty cheeses are crafted using Bread Station loaves. Don’t miss house-baked treats like the unforgettable lemon & Earl Grey tart or the renowned rosemary cookie—favorites among regulars and foodies alike. With vegetarian and vegan options, an inviting canal-side terrace, and a genuine commitment to both craft and hospitality, Populus Coffee is a Berlin essential for both specialty enthusiasts and anyone seeking soulful, memorable coffee moments.

name: Fjord Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Nordic precision meets Berlin soul. Exceptional specialty coffee, ethically sourced and expertly roasted.
excerpt_long: Nordic precision meets Berlin soul. Light roasts highlight unique origins. Ethical sourcing, exceptional coffee, and a distinct Berlin vibe.
summary: Berlin soul meets Nordic precision at Fjord Coffee. Light roasts highlight unique origins. Ethically sourced, exceptional coffee experience.
flavour_profile: Nordic precision, light roasts, ethical sourcing, Berlin vibe
about:
Fjord Coffee Roasters: Nordic Precision Meets Berlin Soul

Tucked away in the creative heart of Berlin’s Marzahn district, Fjord Coffee Roasters is more than a roastery—it’s a craft-driven hub founded by some of the city’s most influential specialty coffee pioneers. Helmed by Kresten Thøgersen (of Father Carpenter) and Morgan Love (of Silo Coffee), Fjord is a collaboration born from a shared dream to elevate Berlin's coffee culture. Their Nordic-inspired approach translates to meticulously light roasts, allowing each bean’s unique origin and terroir to shine.
