Recognized as a finalist for the prestigious Sprudgie Award for Notable Roaster, Fjord’s reputation for quality and innovation resonates far beyond Germany.

Fjord’s coffee portfolio is a journey through some of the world’s finest origins—expect single origins from Ethiopia, Peru, and Colombia, alongside carefully curated seasonal blends. The roastery’s commitment to ethical sourcing ensures growers are paid premium prices, while supporting local development projects at origin. House specialties like washed Peruvian lots and a rotating selection of espresso and filter coffees delight both purists and adventurous palates. While coffee is the star, guests can enjoy a thoughtful menu with pastries and café fare reminiscent of Berlin’s brunch icons. For niche coffee explorers and everyday coffee lovers alike, Fjord Coffee Roasters offers an exceptional experience infused with purpose, transparency, and a distinctly Berlin vibe.

name: Röststätte Berlin
excerpt_short: Berlin's heart of specialty coffee. Hand-roasted, ethically sourced, and passionately crafted.
excerpt_long: Berlin's Röststätte: Hand-roasted, ethically sourced specialty coffee since 2003. Experience unique flavors, crafted with passion and precision.
summary: Berlin's Röststätte: Since 2003, crafting specialty coffee with passion. Hand-roasted, fair-trade beans, unique flavors, and a commitment to quality. Experience coffee artistry.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, ethical sourcing, vibrant café culture
about:
Röststätte Berlin: Where Passion Meets Precision in Every Cup

Step into Röststätte Berlin and experience the true soul of specialty coffee in the heart of the city. Founded in 2003 and deeply rooted in Berlin’s third-wave coffee movement, Röststätte has built its reputation on a commitment to quality, sustainability, and innovation. Their coffees, exclusively 100% Arabica, are fair traded and hand-roasted in small batches, ensuring each cup tells the story of careful sourcing and artisanal craftsmanship. Led by a passionate team that includes renowned roaster Ivo, Röststätte stands out for its dedication to highlighting unique, seasonal origins and flavor profiles—each roast is tailored to enhance the distinct character of the beans. This approach, combined with their membership in the Coffee Speciality Association and baristas recognized among Berlin’s best, has made Röststätte an award-winning destination for discerning coffee lovers.

The café’s portfolio is a curated journey through the world’s leading coffee farms, featuring signature espresso blends, filter coffees, cold brew specialties, and even inventive creations like Cold Brew X coffee liqueur. Alongside impeccable coffee, guests can indulge in freshly baked croissants, homemade cakes, and a selection of gourmet sandwiches. Vegan and plant-based options abound, and the relaxed, design-forward space is perfect for everything from a quiet morning ritual to a lively coffee workshop. For a true taste of Berlin’s specialty scene—where ethical sourcing, expert roasting, and exceptional hospitality come together—Röststätte is a must-visit gem.

name: Five Elephant Kreuzberg
excerpt_short: Berlin's Five Elephant: Pioneering specialty coffee & legendary cheesecake. Taste the difference!
excerpt_long: Berlin's Five Elephant: Pioneering specialty coffee since 2010. Direct trade, in-house roasting, and legendary cheesecake. Experience coffee passion.
summary: Berlin's Five Elephant: Since 2010, roasting exceptional, direct-trade coffee. Enjoy seasonal single-origin brews and legendary cheesecake in a welcoming space.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, legendary cheesecake, cozy Kreuzberg vibe
about:
Five Elephant: Berlin's Pioneering Specialty Coffee Roaster and hidden Cake Gem

Nestled in the heart of Berlin's vibrant Kreuzberg district, Five Elephant has been a trailblazer in the city's specialty coffee scene since 2010. Founded by Kris and Sophie Schackman, this roastery, café, and bakery has earned a reputation for its unwavering commitment to quality and sustainability. Five Elephant's dedication to direct trade relationships with coffee producers and meticulous in-house roasting has positioned them as a leader in the third-wave coffee movement, not just in Berlin, but globally.

At their original Kreuzberg location on Reichenberger Straße 101, visitors can experience the essence of Five Elephant's philosophy. The café offers a rotating selection of single-origin espressos and filter coffees, all roasted nearby at their Glogauer Straße facility. Their coffee menu showcases a diverse range of flavors, typically featuring five espresso and five filter roasts that change with the seasons. But Five Elephant isn't just about exceptional coffee – their cheesecake has achieved near-legendary status among locals and tourists alike. The minimalist, welcoming atmosphere of the café, complete with street-side seating, invites coffee enthusiasts to engage in conversations about their shared passion while savoring expertly crafted beverages and irresistible baked goods.

name: Bonanza Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Berlin's coffee pioneer. Meticulously sourced, roasted with passion. Unnecessarily good coffee.
excerpt_long: Berlin's Bonanza: Pioneering specialty coffee since 2006. Minimalist vibe, exceptional quality, and a welcoming neighborhood spirit.
summary: Berlin's Bonanza: pioneering specialty coffee since 2006. Minimalist vibe, exceptional quality, and a welcoming neighborhood spirit. Experience coffee excellence.
flavour_profile: Specialty roasts, innovative blends, minimalist vibe, urban oasis
about:
The Pioneering Spirit of Bonanza Coffee Roasters

Bonanza Coffee Roasters stands as a beacon of Berlin’s specialty coffee movement—a place where innovation, quality, and artistic vision intersect with welcoming neighborhood energy. Founded in 2006 by Kiduk Reus and Yumi Choi, Bonanza was among the very first to bring meticulously sourced and roasted specialty coffee to Berlin. From humble beginnings in Prenzlauer Berg, the team has grown their distinct “unnecessarily good” philosophy into a citywide standard. The interior vibe is minimalist, yet warm; every detail, from the temperature-controlled machines to hand-measured espresso shots, reflects the founders’ obsession with excellence. Bonanza’s reputation has earned it international acclaim, including being named runner-up for Best Independent Coffee Shop in Europe at the 2024 European Coffee & Hospitality Awards.

The coffee portfolio at Bonanza features both signature blends and celebrated single origins, roasted in Kreuzberg and served with precision. Each location showcases two espresso options—a blend for milk-based drinks and a rotating single-origin for espresso aficionados—as well as multiple single-origin selections for batch brew. Retail shelves are always stocked with rare finds from Ethiopia, Colombia, and beyond, “transparent” in sourcing and flavor. To complement the coffee, a range of artisan cakes and pastries awaits. Regulars recommend grabbing a table in the leafy courtyard for a tranquil urban retreat, paired with a hand-poured filter coffee and a slice of decadent cake. With connections to Michelin-star restaurants and a reputation for trailblazing, Bonanza is not just a café—it’s a standard-bearer for Berlin’s new wave coffee culture.

name: The Barn Café
excerpt_short: Berlin's coffee pioneer. Single-origin, light roasts. Award-winning, meticulously crafted coffee experience.
excerpt_long: Berlin's coffee pioneer. The Barn roasts exquisite, traceable single-origin beans. Experience meticulously crafted coffee in a minimalist setting.
summary: Berlin's coffee pioneer since 2010. The Barn roasts the finest single-origin beans, light & clean, for a meticulously crafted coffee experience.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, farm-to-cup, minimalist vibe, flavor focus
about:
The Barn: Berlin's Specialty Coffee Pioneer

Nestled in the heart of Berlin's vibrant Mitte district, The Barn has been at the forefront of Europe's specialty coffee movement since 2010. Founded by Ralf Rüller, a visionary in the coffee world, The Barn has grown from a single café to a coffee empire with multiple locations across Berlin and beyond. Their commitment to quality and sustainability has earned them prestigious accolades, including the title of Best Independent European Coffee Shop in 2018 and Best Specialty Coffee Roaster in Europe & Middle East in 2019[1][6].

The Barn's philosophy revolves around sourcing and roasting the finest single-origin coffees, with a focus on traceability and direct relationships with farmers. Their roasting style is light and clean, designed to bring out the full flavor potential of each bean. Visitors to The Barn can expect a meticulously crafted coffee experience, with options ranging from pour-overs to espresso-based drinks, all prepared by highly skilled baristas. The minimalist aesthetic of their cafés creates a focused environment where coffee takes center stage, allowing customers to fully appreciate the nuanced flavors of their award-winning brews[3][5].

name: Flying Roasters
excerpt_short: Direct-trade coffee sanctuary. Ethically sourced, freshly roasted. Berlin's hidden gem for coffee lovers.
excerpt_long: Berlin's direct-trade coffee sanctuary. Ethically sourced beans, drum-roasted to perfection. Experience vibrant single origins and a welcoming vibe.
summary: Direct-trade coffee sanctuary in Berlin. Ethically sourced beans, drum-roasted to perfection. Experience vibrant single origins and a welcoming, unpretentious vibe.
flavour_profile: Direct-trade, artisanal roasts, ethical, cozy café, workshops
about:
Flying Roasters: Berlin’s Direct-Trade Coffee Sanctuary

Flying Roasters, tucked away on Hochstraße 34 in Berlin’s Wedding district, embodies the soul of specialty coffee with a clear conscience. This roastery is renowned for its unwavering commitment to direct trade: every bean is sourced straight from cooperatives, ensuring ethical practices and full transparency from farm to cup. The vibe inside the café is welcoming and unpretentious—a hidden gem favored by locals for its organic, fresh-roasted coffee. The team’s dedication shines through in every detail, from their hands-on drum roasting process to their popular coffee workshops that invite guests to deepen their appreciation for the craft.

The coffee portfolio here spans vibrant single origins from Africa, Latin America, and Asia, each carefully selected and roasted to highlight unique terroir and flavor. Only coffees scoring 84+ points make the cut, catering to aficionados who value both taste and traceability. Alongside espressos and filter brews, Flying Roasters’ café tempts guests with house-made cakes and pastries. Recognized for its quality and ethical sourcing, Flying Roasters has earned a loyal following in Berlin’s specialty scene—don’t miss their rich, aromatic espresso or a slice of cake on your next visit.

name: Garçon de Café - Specialty coffee shop - Kaffee
excerpt_short: Berlin's coffee haven. Specialty brews, warm vibes, steps from Hauptbahnhof. Soulful coffee experience.
excerpt_long: Berlin's coffee haven! Steps from Hauptbahnhof, Garçon de Café offers specialty brews, inviting vibes, and Tripadvisor's top 10% acclaim.
summary: Berlin's coffee haven! Steps from Hauptbahnhof, Garçon de Café offers specialty brews, inviting vibes, and Tripadvisor acclaim. A must-visit for coffee lovers.
flavour_profile: Berlin specialty coffee, cozy atmosphere, train station gem
about:
Garçon de Café: A Specialty Coffee Gem Steps from Berlin Hauptbahnhof

Garçon de Café radiates authentic Berlin charm just 160 meters from the city’s main train station, making it a haven for travelers and locals alike. This specialty coffee corner offers a warm, inviting space filled with natural light, an inviting terrace, and plenty of indoor seating—perfect for catching up with friends or unwinding between travels. As a proud recipient of Tripadvisor's Travelers’ Choice award, Garçon de Café sits among the top 10% of Berlin coffee spots, praised for its consistent excellence and welcoming energy.

The café showcases a passion for quality, serving expertly crafted espresso, filter coffee, cold brew, and decaf—all prepared using high-end espresso machines. Plant-based and vegan-friendly options make the menu inclusive, complemented by a tempting selection of brownies and house-made cakes. While Garçon de Café isn’t attached to a famous founder or a high-profile roasting pedigree, it’s lauded for its friendly baristas and unwavering commitment to top-tier specialty coffee. For a true taste of Berlin’s evolving coffee culture, Garçon de Café is a must—especially if you’re seeking character, soul, and specialty brewing at its best.

name: Beanmonger Coffee
excerpt_short: Brooklyn's soulful haven. Expertly crafted specialty coffee, warm vibes, and community spirit.
excerpt_long: Brooklyn's soulful haven. Beanmonger Coffee: cozy, kind, and serving expertly crafted specialty coffee. A true community retreat.
summary: Brooklyn's soulful haven. Beanmonger Coffee: cozy, kind, and serving expertly crafted specialty coffee. Experience the warmth, the community, and the exceptional Brooklynite Blend.
flavour_profile: Brooklyn soul, specialty blends, cozy retreat, inventive lattes
about:
Beanmonger Coffee: Brooklyn’s Soulful Specialty Haven

Step inside Beanmonger Coffee and you’ll discover more than just expertly crafted coffee—you’ll feel wrapped in the warmth and soul of Brooklyn. This intimate café at 620 Union St delivers a welcoming, home-like vibe, inviting locals and visitors alike to pause, connect, and savor. The space is cozy, with only a handful of tables and armchairs, making it a perfect retreat for a quiet moment or friendly chat. Beanmonger’s service radiates kindness, and the atmosphere is accented with tasteful music and the aroma of freshly roasted beans.

Beanmonger’s renowned Brooklynite Blend anchors their portfolio, a medium-to-dark roast featuring beans from Colombia, Brazil, and Guatemala, known for deep flavors with vibrant top notes. Coffee lovers can choose from espresso, filter drip, and cold brew, or explore standout specialty drinks like the Pistachio Cream Latte, Rose Cardamom Latte, and shop-favorite Thin Mint Mocha. Seasonal creations such as the Caramel Apple Pie Latte reflect Beanmonger’s playful, inventive spirit. Complement your cup with a rotating selection of pastries and sandwiches, and don’t miss house tips: the White Chocolate Matcha and Black Sesame Chai are local favorites. Though small in size, Beanmonger’s community-first ethos and soulful character make it a must-visit for any specialty coffee enthusiast.

name: Plowshares Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: West Harlem's coffee heart. Artisan roasts, community soul. Freshly brewed, expertly crafted.
excerpt_long: West Harlem's coffee heart since 2008. Witness the art of roasting on a vintage Probat. Community, quality, and exceptional coffee await.
summary: West Harlem's coffee heart. Plowshares: roasting since '08. Witness artistry on a vintage Probat. Fresh beans, expert brews, community vibes.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasting, community hub, vintage charm, quality brews
about:
Plowshares Coffee Roasters: West Harlem’s Heartbeat of Specialty Coffee

Plowshares Coffee Roasters, a cornerstone of New York’s specialty coffee scene since 2008, pulses with a unique soul in the vibrant West Harlem neighborhood. Housed in an airy, 3,000-square-foot space on Amsterdam Avenue, their roastery-café invites guests to witness coffee artistry firsthand—beans are roasted on a vintage 1940s Probat, visible behind large glass panes that blend transparency with tradition. The atmosphere is expansive yet welcoming, with seating for 55 and frequent community events like the monthly “Free Bread” music showcase, making it a true gathering place for artists, coffee lovers, and locals alike.

Plowshares’ dedication to quality and consistency shines through every cup. Their espresso-based drinks, praised for nutty, earthy complexity and expert foam, use beans roasted on-site for maximum freshness. Whether you crave a classic cappuccino, single-origin pour-over, or one of their signature blends, each offering reflects a meticulous approach to sourcing and roasting. The menu is rounded out with pastries and select food options—perfect accompaniments to their celebrated brews. Under the stewardship of founder Anthony Kurutz, Plowshares has earned a reputation as one of the city’s top roasters, continually pushing forward while honoring the relationships that sustain the specialty coffee journey.

name: Now or Never Coffee
excerpt_short: Soho's soul, specialty brews. Cozy vibes, creative sips. Now or Never Coffee: Your moment awaits.
excerpt_long: Soho's heart, specialty brewed. Now or Never Coffee: creativity, comfort, community. Seasonal delights, crafted with passion. Your "now or never" moment.
summary: Soho's heart, specialty soul. Now or Never Coffee: where creativity brews. Cozy vibes, seasonal delights, and community converge.
flavour_profile: Soho specialty coffee, creative brews, cozy industrial vibe
about:
Now or Never Coffee: Where Soho’s Spirit Meets Specialty Brewing

Now or Never Coffee, nestled in the heart of Soho at 30 Grand Street, embodies a unique blend of creativity, comfort, and community. Founded by Sehwan, whose journey from corporate finance to the specialty coffee scene began with a life-changing macchiato, this inviting spot has become a haven for coffee lovers seeking more than just a caffeine fix. The café’s industrial-chic, yet cozy, living-room vibe makes it the perfect backdrop for both slow mornings and creative bursts—a true reflection of their mission to celebrate “now or never moments” through every cup served.

The coffee portfolio here stands out for its seasonally inspired offerings and dedication to specialty standards. From signature drinks like the Honey Lavender Cappuccino and Toasted Coconut Latte to classic macchiatos influenced by Sehwan’s Blue Bottle roots, every beverage is crafted with precision and imagination. The food menu features small, comforting bites—think delicious pastries and breakfast favorites—that pair seamlessly with their specialty brews. Now or Never Coffee’s commitment to service, artistry, and community has made it a beloved Soho staple, earning glowing reviews and the coveted Travelers’ Choice award for its warm, welcoming atmosphere and quality offerings.

name: Merriweather Coffee + Kitchen
excerpt_short: West Village's Merriweather: Aussie vibes, specialty coffee, and vibrant flavors.
excerpt_long: West Village's Merriweather: Sydney's cafe spirit meets NYC. Exceptional coffee, vibrant food, and a community vibe. A true gem.
summary: West Village's Merriweather: Aussie vibes meet NYC. Specialty coffee, vibrant food, and a community heart. Experience the warmth!
flavour_profile: Australian-inspired, vibrant, specialty coffee, global cuisine
about:
Merriweather Coffee & Kitchen: Sunshine and Specialty in the West Village

Step into Merriweather Coffee & Kitchen and immediately feel transported by the vibrant spirit of Sydney’s buzzing café scene—right in the heart of the West Village. Founded by Peter Godhard, who left Wall Street to pursue his love of coffee and community, Merriweather exudes an inviting energy with its bright, modern design and countertop that brings baristas and guests eye-to-eye. True to its Australian roots, the café blends the culinary influences of the Middle East, Southeast Asia, and the Mediterranean, crafting a food experience as diverse as New York itself. The menu sings with made-from-scratch favorites like Avocado Toast, Merriweather Morning Sandwich, and Roasted Mushroom and Labne Toast, complemented by a pastry counter that always has something fresh and tempting.

Merriweather’s coffee program is revered among locals and travelers alike, thanks to meticulous barista skill and a dedication to sourcing only top-tier beans, including single origin guest roasters available for retail. Specialty drinks—from classic flat whites to creamy matcha lattes—showcase the team’s commitment to quality and creativity. The café’s energetic atmosphere, exceptional hospitality, and community focus have earned it the Tripadvisor Travelers’ Choice award, placing it among New York’s elite coffee destinations. Pop in for brunch, linger over expertly brewed coffee, and discover why Merriweather is a true gem for both coffee aficionados and food lovers seeking genuine warmth in the city.

name: Gasoline Alley Coffee
excerpt_short: Industrial charm meets espresso soul. Ethically sourced, expertly brewed specialty coffee.
excerpt_long: Industrial charm meets espresso soul. Gasoline Alley: NoHo's gem, serving ethically sourced, expertly crafted coffee since 2011.
summary: Industrial charm meets espresso soul. Gasoline Alley: NoHo's gem since 2011, serving ethically sourced beans and exceptional coffee. A local favorite.
flavour_profile: Industrial charm, espresso focus, ethical sourcing, local gem
about:
Gasoline Alley Coffee: NoHo’s Industrial Gem with an Espresso Soul

Gasoline Alley Coffee stands out in New York City’s specialty scene by blending industrial charm with a soulfully curated coffee experience. Established in 2011 and nestled on the wedge where Lafayette and Mulberry Streets merge, its narrow footprint and floor-to-ceiling windows create a sunlit oasis that welcomes a steady stream of regulars and coffee newcomers alike. The interior nods to the area’s automotive history with exposed brick, metal accents, and even a bicycle hung above the counter—a subtle tribute to its popularity among local cycling communities and team riders. Founders Nick (from England) and Neville (from South Africa) have poured their passion into every detail, from the consistently warm greetings at the counter to their devotion to sourcing ethically and directly traded beans, often making trips to origin farms themselves.

The heart of Gasoline Alley’s menu is Intelligentsia’s Black Cat seasonal espresso blend, expertly extracted on their La Marzocco machine and complemented by a rotating selection of batch brew offerings. Expect strong, smooth shots and milk drinks that regularly draw praise for their quality and balance. Pair your coffee with standout pastries, including cakes, savory treats, and the much-lauded gluten-free/vegan tahini chocolate chip cookie. While the shop doesn’t boast formal awards, it has cemented itself as a local favorite—named in guides and winning acclaim for both the energy of its baristas and the unwavering quality in every cup. For a taste of NoHo’s evolving spirit with a shot of specialty excellence, Gasoline Alley is indispensable.

name: Shared Roasting 1
excerpt_short: Brooklyn's collaborative coffee haven. Craft roasters, community, and exceptional coffee.
excerpt_long: Brooklyn's collaborative coffee haven. Shared Roasting: where craft roasters and coffee entrepreneurs unite, perfecting the art of the roast.
summary: Brooklyn's collaborative coffee haven. Shared Roasting: a community for craft roasters. Access top-tier equipment, hone your skills, and build your brand.
flavour_profile: Collaborative roasting, craft coffee hub, innovation incubator
about:
Shared Roasting: Brooklyn’s Collaborative Coffee Haven

Tucked away in Clinton Hill, Brooklyn, Shared Roasting isn’t your average specialty coffee shop—it’s the heart of a vibrant, collaborative coffee community. Founded by industry veterans Jeff Wong and Howard Chang, this unique space brings together passionate coffee entrepreneurs, craft roasters, and ambitious brands under one roof. The vibe is distinctly creative and communal; here, newcomers and established names alike can access state-of-the-art Loring and Mill City roasters, hone their craft in the cupping and espresso labs, and receive hands-on guidance from a knowledgeable team. Every detail, from preheated roasters to reserved parking, is thoughtfully managed to let coffee artisans focus on perfecting their roast and building their brand’s identity.

While Shared Roasting doesn’t tout a retail menu or house blend of its own, its portfolio is a living showcase of the city’s emerging roasters and their meticulously sourced single origins and signature blends. Members often experiment with a spectrum of origins—from Ethiopian heirlooms to bold Latin American lots—crafted via precise, small-batch methods. The space occasionally hosts cuppings, barista trainings, and tasting events, connecting the city’s coffee lovers with the freshest creations. Though food and pastries aren’t a centerpiece here, every visit is an immersion into the soul of New York’s specialty coffee scene—where innovation, expertise, and community spirit are always on tap.

name: Bird and Branch Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Heartfelt craft in Hell's Kitchen. Rare coffees, community-focused, exceptional quality.
excerpt_long: Heartfelt specialty coffee in Hell's Kitchen. Rare beans, like Golondrina Gesha, & Ippodo matcha. Community-focused, exceptional quality.
summary: Bird & Branch: Hell's Kitchen's heart. Rare coffees, like Bolivian Gesha, and Ippodo matcha. Community-focused, with exceptional quality and artistry in every cup.
flavour_profile: Specialty coffee, community focus, rare beans, creative drinks
about:
Bird & Branch: Heartfelt Craft in Hell’s Kitchen

Set just steps from Times Square in Hell’s Kitchen, Bird & Branch radiates the spirit of a true neighborhood specialty coffee shop. Founded by Brandon and Faith Lee in 2018, this independent roaster was conceived with both exquisite coffee and a deeper purpose at its core: restoring the city through community programs and job training for those facing employment barriers. Their mission pulses through the cozy space, making every visit feel welcoming and meaningful. Bird & Branch sets itself apart by carrying rare and acclaimed coffees, such as the prized Saint Frank Golondrina Gesha from Bolivia, and by being one of the select New York shops honored to serve Ippodo matcha. Every cup here reflects intentionality and exceptional quality, crafted by baristas trained with care and expertise.

The coffee portfolio at Bird & Branch showcases thoughtfully sourced single origins and limited-edition light roasts, along with inventive signature drinks like the burnt marshmallow latte and nut milk-based specialties. Pastries are far from ordinary: the matcha and hojicha squares, kabocha molasses loaf, and black sesame treats are beloved by regulars, while their housemade ricotta and miso hummus offer savory counterpoints. Whether you’re seeking a standout pour-over, a creative espresso drink, or a fresh-baked treat, Bird & Branch delivers with artistry and a sense of purpose that lingers long after your last sip.

name: Blue Bottle Coffee
excerpt_short: Precision meets artistry. Freshly roasted, ethically sourced specialty coffee. A sensory experience.
excerpt_long: Chelsea's Blue Bottle: minimalist haven. Freshly roasted, ethically sourced beans. Expert baristas craft each cup, a sensory experience.
summary: Precision meets artistry at Blue Bottle. Freshly roasted, ethically sourced beans crafted into sublime coffee experiences. A minimalist oasis for coffee lovers.
flavour_profile: Artisanal, fresh-roasted, ethical, minimalist, urban oasis
about:
The Soul of Blue Bottle Coffee: Where Precision Meets Artistry

Stepping into Blue Bottle Coffee's Chelsea outpost in New York is like entering a minimalist sanctuary for coffee lovers. Founded in 2002 by James Freeman—a former musician turned specialty coffee pioneer—Blue Bottle has garnered a cult following for its unwavering commitment to freshness, quality, and ethical sourcing. The vibe is unmistakably urban with a soulful elegance: the former Meatpacking District loading dock, now a light-filled, compact retreat, brings together New York’s creative spirit with a devotion to the craft of coffee. The staff are expertly trained baristas, handcrafting each drink with care, whether you order a classic espresso or a delicate pour-over. Attention to detail is everywhere—from the 32-second espresso pulls to the artfully poured latte art, making each cup an experience rather than just a beverage.

Blue Bottle’s coffee portfolio is a world tour for the palate, featuring seasonally rotating single origins alongside signature blends like the beloved Retrofit. Their beans are roasted in small batches and reach the café within 48 hours to maximize flavor, all certified USDA Organic and compliant with rigorous international standards. Award-winning for both its coffee and interior design, Blue Bottle’s cafes are minimalist oases where the focus rests on the sensory complexity of every cup. While grab-and-go is the norm due to limited seating, it’s well worth a detour for sublime coffees and carefully selected pastries. Pro tip: try a single-origin drip or their signature cold brew for a true taste of their meticulous craft—Blue Bottle delivers a memorable encounter for every coffee aficionado.

name: Oslo Coffee Roasters (West Village)
excerpt_short: Nordic roots meet NYC soul. Handcrafted specialty coffee, roasted in Brooklyn. Cozy West Village haven.
excerpt_long: West Village haven. Oslo Coffee Roasters: Nordic roots, NYC soul. Handcrafted perfection, bright space, community spirit. Award-worthy brew.
summary: West Village haven. Oslo Coffee Roasters: Nordic roots, NYC soul. Handcrafted perfection, bright space, community spirit. Award-worthy brew, fresh pastries.
flavour_profile: Nordic-inspired, artisanal roasts, cozy West Village vibe
about:
Oslo Coffee Roasters West Village: Nordic Roots, New York Soul

Situated in the heart of the West Village, Oslo Coffee Roasters is a haven for specialty coffee lovers seeking handcrafted perfection with a distinct sense of place. Oslo’s Williamsburg-roasted beans set the tone for every cup, blending Scandinavian heritage with Brooklyn’s artisanal energy. Their West 10th Street location exudes understated warmth—think bright, minimalist interiors and the gentle hum of regulars deep in conversation or quietly reading. Long-time fans and newcomers are greeted by friendly baristas who treat every espresso pull and pour-over as a craft, not just a job, infusing the space with genuine community spirit.

The coffee portfolio at Oslo is a celebration of careful sourcing and roasting. Signature blends like the seasonal Wild Huntsman bring complex, robust flavors that cater to the evolving palates of New York’s discerning coffee crowd. Single-origin offerings highlight unique terroirs, while expertly crafted espresso drinks and pour-overs underscore the roaster’s dedication to quality. House specialties are best paired with fresh pastries for a classic, satisfying experience. Whether you’re a local or exploring New York’s specialty scene, Oslo West Village delivers a soulful, award-worthy brew in a cozy, authentic setting.

name: St Kilda Coffee
excerpt_short: Melbourne soul, Manhattan vibe. Adventurous coffee, expertly roasted.
excerpt_long: Melbourne soul, Manhattan vibe. St Kilda Coffee: single-origin, Brooklyn-roasted, adventurous coffee. Discover your next favorite cup.
summary: Melbourne soul, Manhattan vibe. St Kilda Coffee: single-origin, Brooklyn-roasted, adventurous coffee. Discover new flavors, embrace the community.
flavour_profile: Melbourne-inspired, single-origin, rotating menu, psychedelic vibe
about:
St Kilda Coffee: Melbourne Soul, Manhattan Vibe

St Kilda Coffee brings the laid-back, quality-driven spirit of Melbourne’s coffee scene to the heart of New York’s Hell’s Kitchen, creating a haven for adventurous coffee lovers. Founded by two friends on a backpacking trip inspired by Australia’s legendary café culture, St Kilda’s journey began with a mission: source and serve the world’s best single-origin coffees, roasted in Brooklyn. With two cozy Manhattan locations, St Kilda is renowned for its ever-changing line-up of dynamic single origins and cutting-edge brewing methods—think espresso pulled from SEY beans, pour-overs via Kalita Wave, and guest roasts from industry luminaries like Montréal’s Traffic and Little Wolf. The café’s design and packaging take cues from psychedelic rock, echoing the creativity and free-spiritedness that pulses through every cup.

What sets St Kilda apart, beyond the meticulous sourcing and in-house roasting, is its community feel and commitment to continuous discovery. Every visit promises something new, whether it’s an exclusive micro-lot, a pastry from their curated selection, or a fresh batch of beans to take home. The ever-rotating menu and friendly baristas encourage patrons to expand their coffee horizons. Tips for a standout visit? Ask about the latest single-origin on espresso, treat yourself to a batch brew or pour-over, and don’t skip the pastries—the perfect complement to your cup. St Kilda Coffee isn’t just a café; it’s a vibrant slice of Melbourne, thoughtfully brewed for New York.

name: Ten Thousand Coffee
excerpt_short: NYC's Ten Thousand Coffee: Australian cafe culture meets specialty, crafted with passion.
excerpt_long: Born from Sydney, now in NYC. Ten Thousand Coffee: a decade of experience, crafting daily specialty coffee experiences with heart and precision.
summary: NYC's Ten Thousand Coffee: Australian café culture meets specialty. Decade-honed expertise crafts each cup. Community, quality, and ethically sourced beans.
flavour_profile: Specialty beans, Aussie influence, artisanal craftsmanship
about:
Ten Thousand Coffee: Crafting the Daily Specialty Experience in NYC

Ten Thousand Coffee stands out in New York City’s specialty coffee scene by channeling a decade’s worth of experience and Australian café culture into every cup. Born from Sydney and meticulously brought to the heart of Manhattan, Ten Thousand is built on the philosophy of investing 10,000 hours to perfect both coffee and customer connection. The serene, minimalistic interior encourages community and creativity, making each visit a memorable “daily specialty coffee experience,” not just a caffeine fix. Their uncompromising attention to detail is evident in every element: from the expertly hand-selected, specialty-grade beans to their rigorous, multi-stage cupping process, held at their local roasting facility in Brooklyn.

With a portfolio featuring the NYC, Sydney, and Decaf blends, every batch meets strict standards for quality, flavor, and ethical sourcing—boasting USDA organic certification, fair-trade beans, and a commitment to sustainability through compostable packaging and reduced energy use. The menu’s highlights include crowd-pleasers like the Einspänner, rich artisanal cream-topped coffees, and bakery favorites like pain au chocolat with Valrhona powder. Whether you crave classic espresso excellence or innovative specialty drinks, Ten Thousand delivers with both heart and precision, embodying a global standard for specialty coffee that resonates through every sip and every smile in their inviting space.

name: Artbean Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Artbean: Craft coffee meets art on Doyers St. Single-origin beans, local art, and creative vibes.
excerpt_long: Artbean Coffee: Chinatown's creative hub. Specialty coffee meets art on Doyers Street. Single-origin beans, unique drinks, and local art.
summary: Artbean Coffee: Specialty coffee meets art on Doyers Street. Founded by an animator & designer, we roast unique single-origin beans, showcasing local art.
flavour_profile: Artsy, innovative, community-focused, global flavors, NYC
about:
Artbean Coffee: Where Craft Coffee and Creativity Converge on Doyers Street

Nestled in the heart of NYC’s vibrant Chinatown, Artbean Coffee Roasters stands as a living testament to the marriage of specialty coffee and artistic innovation. Founded by Spencer Okada and Khanh Tran—an animator and interior designer, respectively—this bright, welcoming space on historic Doyers Street is more than just a café; it’s a community hub and art gallery. The couple’s journey began with an e-commerce coffee venture during the pandemic and blossomed into this brick-and-mortar spot where they now serve meticulously roasted single-origin beans from lesser-known regions, each batch adorned in packaging created by local artists. The exposed brick walls and thoughtfully designed interior honor both the neighborhood’s heritage and the founders’ creative vision, while rotating art exhibitions keep the atmosphere fresh and inspiring.

Artbean’s menu delights both classic aficionados and adventurous palates. Signature drinks like the soba latte and the vibrantly purple ube latte—best enjoyed with coconut milk—set Artbean apart, blending specialty coffee with global flavors. Guests can expect warm hospitality and expertly crafted espresso alongside pour-over options featuring unique origins and blends. Though not yet decked with major coffee awards, Artbean’s community-first ethos and collaboration with local artists have quickly earned them loyal fans. Don’t miss pairing your drink with one of their thoughtfully selected pastries while soaking in the gallery-like ambiance. For a taste of New York creativity in a cup, Artbean Coffee is the destination.

name: Brooklyn Roasting Company
excerpt_short: Brooklyn Roasting: Brooklyn-born, globally sourced. Coffee with heart, roasted with soul.
excerpt_long: Brooklyn Roasting: Brooklyn's coffee soul. Ethically sourced beans, expertly roasted. Experience the vibrant energy in every cup.
summary: Brooklyn Roasting: Brooklyn's coffee soul. Ethically sourced beans, expertly roasted. Experience the vibrant energy in every cup.
flavour_profile: Brooklyn coffee, artisanal roasts, vibrant atmosphere, ethical beans
about:
Brooklyn Roasting Company: A True Brooklyn Coffee Original

Brooklyn Roasting Company is woven into the fabric of New York’s coffee culture, celebrated not just for its top-tier beans but for the vibrant soul it brings to each cup. Founded in Williamsburg in 2009, this roaster has become synonymous with Brooklyn’s creative energy—its flagship DUMBO space pulses with communal buzz and the aroma of fresh-roasted coffee. Named “Best Coffee Shop” in Downtown Brooklyn, DUMBO & Brooklyn Heights by Time Out New York, BRC’s accolades are a testament to its local love and devotion to quality. The café prides itself on service excellence, with staff who embody a genuine passion for coffee, evidenced by their nomination for the Specialty Coffee Association’s Mose Drachman Award and a uniquely engaging presence at events like the New York Coffee Festival.

BRC’s coffee portfolio is a global journey: expect ethically sourced Fair Trade, Rainforest Alliance, and Organic certified beans from the Americas, East Africa, and Indonesia. Their 35kg Loring roaster is the heart of their operation, producing seasonal blends and single-origin delights—from nutty Latin American espressos to floral East African pour-overs. With four certified Q graders—true “coffee astrophysicists”—BRC ensures each batch is expertly curated. House-made pastries perfectly complement signature drinks like their creamy flat white or vibrant cold brew. Whether savoring a classic brew or a specialty espresso, Brooklyn Roasting Company invites you to experience coffee roasted with heart, in a space as dynamic as the borough itself.

name: Roasting Plant Coffee
excerpt_short: Tech-driven coffee. Micro-batch roasted. Fresh, flavorful, never bitter. Specialty beans from around the world.
excerpt_long: NYC's Roasting Plant: Tech-driven coffee. Freshly roasted, micro-batch beans. Explore global flavors, from Sumatra to Jamaica. Exceptional coffee experience.
summary: Experience coffee reimagined. Freshly roasted, single-origin beans, crafted with tech. Discover a world of flavor, never bitter, always smooth.
flavour_profile: Tech-driven roastery, fresh micro-batches, global beans
about:
Roasting Plant: A Tech-Driven Coffee Revolution in NYC's Lower East Side

Nestled in the heart of New York City's vibrant Lower East Side, Roasting Plant Coffee is not your average coffee shop. Founded by a group of passionate coffee enthusiasts, this innovative roastery has reimagined the coffee experience through cutting-edge technology. At the core of their operation is the patented Javabot™ system, a state-of-the-art fluid-bed air roaster that allows for precise, micro-batch roasting in every store. This commitment to freshness ensures that each cup of coffee is bursting with full flavor and smooth taste, never bitter or stale.

Roasting Plant's dedication to quality extends beyond their roasting process. Their Director of Coffee, Gen, meticulously sources the highest grade specialty beans from around the world, creating a diverse portfolio of single-origin coffees and unique blends. From the exotic Jamaica Blue Mountain Clifton Mount Estate Peaberry to the rich Sumatra Royal Badger Women Producers, coffee aficionados can explore a world of flavors. The company's innovative approach has garnered attention in the specialty coffee scene, with their expansion beyond New York City to locations like Detroit, showcasing their growing influence. For those seeking a truly exceptional coffee experience, Roasting Plant offers a perfect blend of technology, craftsmanship, and passion.

name: Black Fox Coffee
excerpt_short: Global coffee artistry meets community spirit. Exceptional beans, crafted with passion.
excerpt_long: Global beans, local heart. Black Fox Coffee: Manhattan's specialty haven. European flair meets community spirit, crafting exceptional coffee experiences.
summary: Black Fox Coffee: Manhattan's specialty coffee haven. Multi-roaster, curating world's finest beans. European-inspired spaces, fostering connection. Passion, excellence in every cup.
flavour_profile: Specialty multi-roaster, global flavors, elegant ambiance
about:
The Soul of Specialty: Black Fox Coffee

In the heart of Manhattan, Black Fox Coffee stands apart as a specialty coffee destination that masterfully blends global sophistication with local community spirit. Founded by Daniel Murphy and Gary Hardwick in 2016, Black Fox is one of New York City’s few multi-roasters, curating an ever-rotating selection of the world’s finest coffees. The vision here is clear: create a better café experience, where each cup is a tribute to both producer and customer. Their elegant cafés—found in the Financial District and Midtown—evoke European espresso bars, designed as warm, communal spaces that foster connection and conversation. Sleek interiors, high ceilings, and artful touches set the stage for a coffee experience that is as intentional as it is inviting.

Black Fox’s coffee program is renowned, featuring beans from acclaimed roasters like 49th Parallel, George Howell, and Australia’s Small Batch. Espresso and filter offerings rotate, with both signature blends and single origins providing an international “tour” for the palate. Their skilled baristas craft classics alongside specialties like the Butterscotch Latte, while filter options showcase nuanced, award-winning profiles. Housemade almond milk and customizable iced coffees cater to diverse tastes, and the Aussie-inspired food menu is stacked with brunch favorites, sandwiches, and pastries. At Black Fox, coffee is more than a beverage—it’s an experience rooted in passion, hospitality, and a relentless pursuit of excellence.

name: La Cabra Bakery
excerpt_short: Danish soul meets NYC vibe. Exceptional coffee, Scandi style, and craft baking.
excerpt_long: Danish soul meets NYC vibe. La Cabra: exceptional coffee, minimalist design, and world-class pastries. A true escape.
summary: Danish soul meets NYC vibe. La Cabra: Scandi style, exceptional coffee, and world-class pastries. Experience the best of both worlds.
flavour_profile: Danish coffee, Scandi design, artisanal pastries, bright roasts
about:
La Cabra East Village: Danish Soul, Scandi Style, Exceptional Coffee

La Cabra in the East Village is where Scandinavian coffee culture elegantly melds with New York’s vibrant energy. Founded by Esben Piper and globally acclaimed for its Danish roots, La Cabra has garnered recognition as one of Europe’s best independent coffee shops and is celebrated for its focus on clean, bright coffees and meticulous sourcing. The café’s minimalist interior—accented by Hans Wegner chairs and bespoke KH Würtz tiles—creates an inviting, refined atmosphere that highlights the heart of the experience: coffee and craft baking. Sourcing from over 250 trusted producers across Colombia, Guatemala, Panama, Ethiopia, and more, their coffee portfolio is ever-changing, with five unique brews available daily and a range of packages, including single origin and custom blends. Notably, La Cabra’s Cerro Azul coffee has powered championship wins on the international stage, cementing its reputation for world-class quality.

But La Cabra isn’t just about the coffee—the bakery offerings are a destination in themselves. Guests rave about naturally leavened sourdough, hand-laminated croissants, and inventive pastries, with the pillowy, lightly glazed cardamom bun standing out as an East Village must-try. Behind every creation is an ethos of ingredient-driven excellence, guided by head baker Jared Sexton and pastry chef Rachel Lowery. Whether you’re savoring a cup from their Brooklyn-roasted lineup or diving into the iconic pastries, La Cabra delivers a soulful, transportive escape—best enjoyed slowly amid the hum of the neighborhood or packed up for enjoyment on the go.

name: Coffee Project New York | East Village
excerpt_short: Inventive specialty coffee, ethically sourced. A vibrant community hub. Passionate craft.
excerpt_long: East Village gem: Specialty coffee, ethically sourced, roasted with care. Inventive drinks, community-focused, and a passion for the craft.
summary: East Village's Coffee Project: Soulful specialty coffee. Ethically sourced beans, inventive drinks, and a community-driven ethos. Experience craft, from farm to cup.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, innovative drinks, cozy vibe, global impact
about:
Coffee Project New York: Heartfelt Craft in the East Village

Coffee Project New York in the East Village radiates a unique soul, blending inventive specialty coffee with a mission-driven ethos. Founded in 2015 by celebrated coffee professionals Chi Sum Ngai, a Q grader and roasting championship competitor, and Kaleena Teoh, this minority women-owned café has grown into a vibrant community hub with a global impact. Their SCA-certified Premier Training Campus in Long Island City is the first of its kind in New York, reflecting their dedication to education, diversity, and specialty coffee excellence. Here, ethically sourced coffees—often from small cooperatives and family farms—take center stage, each batch roasted with painstaking care to highlight origin character and story.

Step inside and you're met with a cozy, brick-lined space buzzing with creative energy. The café is renowned for inventive drinks like the deconstructed latte and nitro cold brew, alongside a rotating portfolio of globally-sourced, socially-conscious coffees—some featured in competition lineups and available as small-batch exclusives. Guests can pair their cup with thoughtfully curated pastries and light fare, or dive deeper with classes at the in-house academy. Whether you're a neighborhood regular or specialty coffee devotee, Coffee Project New York stands out as a passionate, welcoming destination, where every detail honors craft, community, and the journey from farm to cup.

name: Intelligentsia Coffee Millennium Park Coffeebar
excerpt_short: Artisan coffee, roasted with passion. Chicago's coffee soul, alive in every cup.
excerpt_long: Chicago's coffee heart. Intelligentsia: artisanal craft meets art. Award-winning roasts, Black Cat blend, and rotating gems. A true coffee experience.
summary: Experience Chicago's coffee renaissance. Intelligentsia, a hub for award-winning specialty coffee, offers iconic blends and rotating single-origins. Art, soul, and exceptional brews await.
flavour_profile: Artisanal coffee, Third Wave, local art, urban vibe
about:
Intelligentsia Coffee Millennium Park Coffeebar: Where Chicago’s Coffee Renaissance Comes Alive

Just steps from the reflective beauty of Cloud Gate and the cultural buzz of Millennium Park, Intelligentsia’s Millennium Park Coffeebar stands as a vibrant hub for both locals and visitors. Established by Doug Zell and Emily Mange—luminaires who helped ignite the Third Wave Coffee Movement—Intelligentsia is woven into the fabric of Chicago’s specialty coffee scene. Award-winning, and frequently featured in national reviews, this location embodies the roaster’s ethos: coffee as an artisanal craft, not just a commodity. The open, industrial-inspired space mirrors the artistic pulse of its neighborhood, while rotating exhibitions from local artists add another dimension of creativity. The café’s atmosphere is always abuzz, fueled by a heady mix of business professionals, tourists, and passionate coffee devotees.

The menu is a showcase of Intelligentsia’s celebrated portfolio: iconic blends like Black Cat and rotating single-origin espressos, alongside daily changing pour-overs made with cutting-edge Poursteady automation. A highlight for coffee aficionados is their Ethiopia Kirite—a citrusy, light-roasted gem consistently praised by industry critics. Complementing the brews is a curated selection of cakes and savory treats, plus a wide range of Kilogram Teas for non-coffee drinkers. For regulars and first-timers alike, insider tips include timing a visit for $2-off Tuesdays or the Friday Roaster’s Special, and grabbing a seat by the art-lined walls to fully soak in the café’s unmistakable Chicago soul.

name: SEY Coffee
excerpt_short: Brooklyn's SEY Coffee: Scandinavian minimalism meets Bushwick's soul. Rare microlots, vibrant flavors.
excerpt_long: Bushwick's SEY Coffee: Scandinavian minimalism meets Brooklyn's soul. Ethically sourced, light-roasted, vibrant coffees. Experience flavor transparency.
summary: Bushwick's SEY Coffee: Scandinavian minimalism meets Brooklyn's soul. Ethically sourced, light-roasted beans create vibrant, complex cups. Experience coffee artistry.
flavour_profile: Light roasts, rare microlots, floral, complex, airy café, artisanal
about:
The Soul of Brooklyn’s Coffee: SEY Coffee

Tucked away in Bushwick, SEY Coffee stands as a beacon for true coffee lovers, blending Scandinavian minimalism with Brooklyn’s creative pulse. Founded by Lance Schnorenberg and Tobin Polk, SEY earned instant respect from the specialty scene, clinching Food & Wine’s “Best Coffee Shop in America” title in 2019. The airy, plant-filled café glows under a skylight, inviting visitors into a world driven by flavor transparency and sustainability. Every cup reflects their close, ethical relationships with experimental producers—particularly in Ethiopia and Latin America—yielding vibrant, clean, and remarkably complex coffees that regularly receive international acclaim.

SEY’s menu is a rotating gallery of rare microlots and meticulously sourced single origins, with standouts like floral Ethiopian lots, Panama Gesha, and offerings such as the 2025 Pepe Jijon TyOxy Mejorado from Ecuador—described as “lightning in a bottle” with dark berry and hibiscus notes. The team leans heavily into light roasting, letting each bean’s character shine. Alongside their celebrated coffees, SEY serves fresh pastries, but the highlight is always the brewing experience—the knowledgeable staff and occasional public cuppings foster community, curiosity, and a sense of discovery rare in New York’s coffee scene.

name: Devoción
excerpt_short: Colombian coffee sanctuary. Farm-fresh beans, roasted in days. Lush, vibrant, and deeply connected.
excerpt_long: Escape to Colombia. Devoción: farm-fresh coffee, roasted in days. Lush spaces, vibrant vibes. Experience the soul of coffee, direct from origin.
summary: Escape to Colombia. Devoción: farm-fresh coffee, roasted just 10 days after leaving origin. Lush spaces, vibrant vibes, and a deep connection to coffee's heart.
flavour_profile: Farm-fresh Colombian, lush cafes, sustainable, B Corp, terroir
about:
Devoción: New York’s Lush Sanctuary for True Farm-Fresh Coffee

Step into Devoción and you’re immediately transported from New York’s urban bustle to the verdant heart of Colombia. Housed in restored landmark buildings—each with its own personality—Devoción’s cafes burst with natural light, living greenery, and unmistakable soul. Whether you’re sipping beneath a two-story vertical jungle in Williamsburg or marveling at a living chandelier in Flatiron, the vibe is always lush, vibrant, and deeply connected to coffee’s origins. Every detail, from exposed brick to hand-selected plants, is designed to immerse you in a sensory journey that echoes the Colombian countryside.

Devoción isn’t just about aesthetics; it’s a pioneer in the specialty coffee world. As the only roaster delivering true farm-fresh Colombian beans—roasted just 10 days after leaving origin—their commitment to freshness is unrivaled. Their portfolio is a celebration of Colombian terroir, featuring year-round house blends, limited edition microlots, and single-estate coffees with unique varietals and processes. Awarded B Corp certification, Devoción upholds the highest standards of sustainability and direct trade, forming deep relationships with independent farmers. Expect expertly crafted espresso, pour-over, and cold brew offerings, alongside a selection of pastries designed to complement each nuanced cup. If you crave a coffee experience that’s as fresh as it is evocative, Devoción is an essential New York destination.

name: Bridgeport Coffeehouse
excerpt_short: Chicago's Bridgeport Coffee: Crafting exceptional coffee, building community since 2004.
excerpt_long: Chicago's Bridgeport Coffee: Since 2004, roasting & importing "Relationship Coffees." Ethical, fresh, and community-focused. A true South Side icon.
summary: Since 2004, Bridgeport Coffee roasts exceptional beans. Direct sourcing ensures quality and sustainability. Experience Chicago's coffee icon.
flavour_profile: Craft roasting, direct trade, Chicago charm, community hub
about:
Bridgeport Coffee Company: Craft, Community, and Chicago Character

Bridgeport Coffee Company stands as a true South Side icon, serving Chicago exceptional coffee since 2004. As both a roaster and importer, they take pride in sourcing beans directly from farmers with whom they’ve forged lasting relationships—ensuring remarkable sustainability, quality, and transparency in every cup. Their approach goes beyond organic and fair trade, focusing on “Relationship Coffees” to deliver rich, consistent flavor profiles that keep locals and visitors coming back. From their acclaimed Ethiopian Yirgacheffe to creative seasonal roasts, a passion for complexity, freshness, and ethical sourcing is evident throughout their menu.

Step inside their flagship on South Morgan Street and you’ll discover an airy, relaxed space full of Chicago history and hospitality. The atmosphere is casual yet inviting, with a beautifully restored period interior and a dedicated local following. Whether you’re savoring a killer espresso, unique teas, or indulging in fresh pastries and light savories, Bridgeport Coffee Company’s friendly staff and commitment to community shine through. It’s a beloved gathering spot to work, chat, or recharge—anchored by a love of coffee and the vibrant spirit of the Bridgeport neighborhood.

name: The Lost Hours
excerpt_short: Edgewater's haven. Family-owned, specialty coffee, local spirit. Award-winning beans, inviting escape.
excerpt_long: Edgewater's haven. Family-owned, celebrating community. Award-winning coffee, local treats, and a warm embrace. Your perfect escape awaits.
summary: Edgewater's haven. The Lost Hours: family-owned, celebrating Chicago's spirit. Award-winning coffee, local treats, and a welcoming embrace. Your perfect escape.
flavour_profile: Cozy local cafe, artisanal coffee, community hub, pastries
about:
The Lost Hours: Edgewater’s Inviting Coffee Escape

Step into The Lost Hours, nestled in Chicago’s Edgewater, and let time stand still. This family-owned coffee nook is more than a café—it’s a tribute to local spirit, born from the desire to revive the corner’s communal energy after the pandemic. Owners Tim and Mackenzie Wardyn have crafted a warm, welcoming space where every detail honors the neighborhood, from the art-adorned walls to the inviting aroma of expertly brewed coffee. The focus here is on true hospitality and celebration of Chicago’s local businesses, ensuring each visit feels like a gathering of friends old and new.

The Lost Hours is powered by the award-winning Happy Monday Coffee Roasters, offering meticulously sourced beans that shine in classic preparations—drip, lattes, mochas, and cappuccinos—made by passionate baristas. Partner bakeries like Sweet Rabbit, Phlour, Beacon Donuts, and Lefty’s Righteous Bagels stock the counter with irresistible treats, including gluten-free and vegan options. Guests rave about the ever-evolving menu and the serene atmosphere that invites you to linger. Whether you’re savoring a single-origin pour over or indulging in a fresh local pastry, The Lost Hours is a true oasis for Chicago’s specialty coffee lovers.

name: Standing Passengers
excerpt_short: Chicago's coffee soul. Artistic vibes, retro games, and Dark Matter beans. Good times guaranteed.
excerpt_long: Chicago's creative heart beats here. Standing Passengers: specialty coffee, retro games, and good vibes. Ethically sourced beans, local treats.
summary: Chicago's creative hub since 2016. Standing Passengers: coffee, community, and retro games. Ethically sourced Dark Matter Coffee, inventive drinks, and local treats.
flavour_profile: Chicago coffee, retro vibe, local roasts, creative space
about:
Standing Passengers: Where Chicago’s Coffee Soul Comes Alive

Standing Passengers Coffee Lounge, nestled at 1458 W Chicago Ave, has been serving Chicago’s creative community since 2016. This spot buzzes with a distinct neighborhood charm, offering a welcoming space where coffee lovers and locals gather amid a blend of artistic energy and nostalgic fun. The lounge’s retro video games and vibrant atmosphere invite you to linger, while their focus on community and creativity sets the tone—good vibes are always free here. The team partners with Chicago’s own Dark Matter Coffee, a respected name among specialty roasters, ensuring every cup is crafted from ethically sourced, small-batch beans renowned for their quality and adventurous flavor profiles.

The coffee menu is a celebration of espresso classics and inventive specialties: lattes, Americanos, mochas, and maple lattes come in double and quad-shot options to match your mood. Drip and cold brew options highlight the bold character of their beans, while a rainbow of flavored syrups lets you personalize your drink. For food, Standing Passengers keeps it accessible and delicious with breakfast tacos, fresh pastries, and donuts from Do-Rite Donuts, Bennison’s Bakery, and Cafe Tola—each bite a local delight. Whether you’re here for a morning mocha, an afternoon cold brew, or just the unmistakable energy of Chicago’s West Town, this lounge guarantees a standout coffee experience with soul.

name: The Avondale Coffee Club by Reprise Roasters
excerpt_short: Avondale's craft coffee haven. Award-winning beans, community vibes, and delicious drinks await!
excerpt_long: Avondale Coffee Club: Reprise Roasters' haven. Award-winning beans, craft drinks, and community vibes. Your new favorite Chicago coffee spot.
summary: Avondale Coffee Club: Reprise Roasters' haven. Award-winning beans, expertly crafted drinks, and a community vibe. Craft, care, and connection in every cup.
flavour_profile: Specialty coffee, community hub, unique flavors, ethical sourcing
about:
The Avondale Coffee Club by Reprise Roasters: Craft and Community in Every Cup

Nestled in Chicago’s vibrant Avondale neighborhood, The Avondale Coffee Club by Reprise Roasters is a standout destination for specialty coffee lovers seeking more than your average café experience. Situated at 3185 N Elston Ave, this welcoming spot opens its doors daily with a curated menu spanning classic drip coffee, expertly crafted espresso drinks, and innovative specialty beverages, all showcasing Reprise’s award-winning, ethically sourced beans. Whether you’re in the mood for a perfectly balanced pour-over, a honey or rosemary sea salt caramel latte, or something unique like a merlot caramel latte, the lineup is designed to delight and surprise. Tea lovers will appreciate a thoughtful selection of loose-leaf options, and house-made lemonades round out the drink menu for every palate.

The Avondale Coffee Club’s inviting atmosphere and dedication to quality are matched by its roots in sustainability and social impact. As a proud outpost of Reprise Roasters—a roaster decorated with multiple Golden Bean awards and committed to direct-trade sourcing—the café brings a mission-driven ethos to Chicago’s coffee scene. Guests are welcomed by knowledgeable baristas, a plant-filled interior, and a community-focused vibe perfect for lingering with a cup or picking up a bag of freshly roasted beans to brew at home. Whether you’re a specialty coffee connoisseur or simply looking for your new neighborhood favorite, The Avondale Coffee Club delivers craft, care, and connection in every visit.

name: Damn Fine Coffee Bar
excerpt_short: Exceptional coffee, rotating roasters. Vegan treats. A Logan Square coffee oasis.
excerpt_long: Discover Damn Fine Coffee Bar: Logan Square's oasis. Exceptional coffee, rotating roasters, vegan treats, and community vibes. Daily 7 AM - 5 PM.
summary: Discover Damn Fine Coffee Bar, a Logan Square oasis. Exceptional coffee, rotating roasters, and vegan treats await. A community hub for coffee lovers.
flavour_profile: Artisanal coffee, rotating roasters, vegan options, community hub
about:
Damn Fine Coffee Bar: A Coffee Oasis in Logan Square

Nestled in the southwest region of Chicago's Logan Square, Damn Fine Coffee Bar lives up to its name by offering a truly exceptional coffee experience. This charming establishment has become a beacon for coffee enthusiasts, featuring a rotating selection of unique roasters from around the country alongside their anchor roaster, Factotum. Their commitment to quality extends beyond coffee, with a curated selection of teas from Spirit Tea and daily deliveries of vegan donuts from Beacon and croissants from Phlour Bakery.

What sets Damn Fine Coffee Bar apart is their dedication to showcasing diverse coffee offerings. Each month, they feature a different roaster, currently highlighting Cooperative Coffee Roasters from Asheville, NC. This approach allows Chicago coffee lovers to explore flavors they might not otherwise encounter. The shop's emphasis on using vegan ingredients and providing dairy-free options demonstrates their commitment to inclusivity. Open daily from 7 AM to 5 PM, Damn Fine Coffee Bar has quickly become a vital part of the local community, filling a much-needed niche in what they describe as an "otherwise coffee desert" in their area of Logan Square.

name: FROTH
excerpt_short: West Loop's FROTH: Artful coffee, cocktail-inspired drinks, and a creative vibe.
excerpt_long: West Loop's FROTH: Artful coffee meets cocktail-inspired drinks. Housed in a stylish space, enjoy unique "Frothtails" & matcha, plus brunch. A community hub.
summary: West Loop's FROTH: Artful coffee meets cocktail-inspired drinks. Housed in a stylish space, enjoy unique "Frothtails," matcha, and brunch. A community hub for all.
flavour_profile: Artful coffee, cocktail-inspired, West Loop, community hub
about:
FROTH: Where Artful Coffee Meets Cocktail Inspiration in the West Loop

Step into FROTH, Chicago’s West Loop destination where coffee and creativity intertwine. Housed in the lobby of the historic Duncan Apartment Complex, this stylish café elevates your daily caffeine fix with a menu that’s equal parts inventive and approachable. FROTH’s signature “Frothtails”—cocktail-inspired coffee drinks—shine alongside familiar espresso favorites and a creative selection of matcha beverages. Standouts include the Dalgona Iced Latte with homemade Korean toffee crumbles, the zesty Espresso Tonic, and the vibrant Floating Hibiscus Matcha. Their seasonal menu also offers breakfast classics, fresh pastries like Japanese cheesecake, and savory options such as the roasted vegetable sandwich, all served in a sunlit, high-ceilinged space with both cozy indoor seating and a dog-friendly patio.

More than a coffee bar, FROTH is a community hub open daily with extended hours for those who want to work, catch up with friends, or just unwind over a curated beverage. The attentive staff, chic ambience, and attention to detail set FROTH apart—whether you’re grabbing a lavender latte to go or settling in for a leisurely brunch. FROTH isn’t just a coffee shop; it’s an essential experience for anyone craving something unexpected and unforgettable in Chicago’s West Loop.
address: 1515 W Monroe St Lobby, Chicago, IL 60607

name: Printer's Row Coffee Co.
excerpt_short: Small-batch, artisanal roasts. Experience the journey from bean to cup. Printer's Row Coffee Co.
excerpt_long: Printer's Row Coffee Co.: Small-batch, artisanal roasts. Experience the journey from bean to cup in our inviting café and roastery.
summary: PRCC: Handcrafting exceptional coffee in Printer's Row. Small-batch roasts, single-origin beans, and a passion for the perfect cup. Experience the journey.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, small-batch, specialty coffee, cozy café
about:
Printer's Row Coffee Co.: Artisanal Roasts in Small Batches

Nestled in the heart of Printer's Row, this specialty coffee roaster and café is a hidden gem for coffee enthusiasts. Printer's Row Coffee Co. (PRCC) takes pride in their meticulous approach to coffee, handcrafting each batch to bring out the unique characteristics of every bean. Their commitment to quality is evident in their carefully curated selection of single-origin coffees and blends.

Beyond their retail offerings, PRCC has established itself as a wholesale provider, sharing their passion for exceptional coffee with other businesses. The company's dedication to the craft extends to their physical space, which serves as both a café and roastery. This allows customers to experience the full journey of their coffee, from raw bean to finished cup, while also providing an inviting atmosphere for coffee lovers to gather, learn, and indulge in the rich flavors of PRCC's artisanal roasts.

name: Caffe Umbria
excerpt_short: Italian espresso, crafted with tradition. Experience the art of authentic coffee roasting.
excerpt_long: Experience authentic Italian espresso. Caffè Umbria: three generations of coffee artistry, blending tradition with modern roasting.
summary: Experience authentic Italian espresso. Caffè Umbria: three generations of coffee artistry, blending tradition with modern roasting. Discover unique, complex flavors.
flavour_profile: Italian espresso, artisanal blends, rich tradition, complex flavors
about:
Caffè Umbria: Authentic Italian Espresso Crafted with Tradition

Caffè Umbria is a specialty coffee roaster that brings the rich tradition of Italian espresso to the modern coffee scene. Founded by the Bizzarri family, who have been perfecting the art of coffee blending and roasting for three generations, Caffè Umbria offers a range of meticulously crafted coffee blends that capture the essence of the Italian caffè experience. Their approach combines the harmonious artistry of blending with the precise science of roasting, resulting in complex and sophisticated flavor profiles.

The roaster's lineup includes a variety of signature blends, each with its own unique character. From the milk-friendly Bizzarri Blend to the dark and caramelized Arco Etrusco, Caffè Umbria caters to diverse palates. They also offer organic and fair trade options like the Terra Sana Blend, showcasing their commitment to sustainability. With cafés in Seattle, Portland, Chicago, and Miami Beach, as well as a robust wholesale program, Caffè Umbria has established itself as a purveyor of authentic Italian espresso crafted with passion and expertise.
address: 346 N Clark St UNIT 4709, Chicago, IL 60654

name: Sawada Coffee
excerpt_short: Japanese precision meets American coffee culture. Expertly crafted specialty coffee.
excerpt_long: Japanese precision meets American coffee culture at Sawada Coffee. Experience expertly crafted coffee in a minimalist setting.
summary: Experience the fusion of Japanese precision and American coffee culture. Hiroshi Sawada's roastery offers expertly crafted specialty coffee in a minimalist setting.
flavour_profile: Japanese precision, artisanal coffee, urban fusion, latte art
about:
Sawada Coffee: A Fusion of Japanese Precision and American Coffee Culture

Sawada Coffee, with locations in both Chicago and New York, represents a unique blend of Japanese coffee craftsmanship and American coffee culture. Founded by renowned Japanese latte artist Hiroshi Sawada, this specialty coffee shop has quickly become a must-visit destination for coffee enthusiasts. The minimalist aesthetic of the cafes reflects the precision and attention to detail that goes into every cup, mirroring the founder's approach to coffee preparation.

While specific details about their coffee offerings are not provided in the given text, Sawada Coffee likely features a carefully curated selection of single-origin beans and expertly crafted espresso-based drinks. Their presence in two major U.S. cities suggests a commitment to bringing high-quality, artisanal coffee experiences to discerning urban customers. With options for online ordering and retail purchases, Sawada Coffee appears to be adapting to modern consumer preferences while maintaining the integrity of their specialty coffee roots.

name: Passion House Coffee
excerpt_short: Chicago's Passion House: Exceptional, diverse coffee. Experimental, Mainstream, Ambient. Taste the craft.
excerpt_long: Chicago's Passion House: Exceptional coffee, expertly roasted. Explore Experimental, Mainstream & Ambient blends. Find your perfect cup today!
summary: Chicago's Passion House: Exceptional coffee, expertly roasted. Explore Experimental, Mainstream, and Ambient blends. Discover your perfect cup.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, diverse profiles, Chicago charm, coffee genres
about:
Passion House Coffee: Crafting Exceptional Brews in Chicago

Passion House Coffee is a specialty coffee roaster based in Chicago, offering a diverse range of meticulously crafted coffees. Their lineup is thoughtfully categorized into three distinct genres: Experimental, Mainstream, and Ambient. The Experimental category promises limited, vibrant, and exceptional roasts for the adventurous coffee enthusiast. Mainstream offerings focus on sweet, smooth, and balanced flavors, while Ambient blends cater to those who prefer darker, forthright, and crowd-pleasing profiles.

With two locations in Chicago - a roastery in East Garfield Park and a café in Goose Island - Passion House Coffee is deeply rooted in the local community. They also offer a selection of exclusive collaborations designed to inspire, such as the intriguing "Beautiful Buzz" and "Dragonolia - Serenity Granted" blends. Their commitment to quality extends beyond their coffee, with a user-friendly website that allows customers to easily browse their offerings, sign up for subscriptions, and stay updated on the latest roasts through their newsletter. Passion House Coffee stands as a beacon for coffee lovers seeking a premium, artisanal coffee experience in the Windy City.
address: 1200 N North Branch St, Chicago, IL 60642

name: Backlot Coffee
excerpt_short: Cozy cafes, craft-roasted coffee, and community. Backlot: where connection and quality meet.
excerpt_long: Backlot Coffee: Evanston's heart. Community thrives with craft roasting, cozy vibes, and exceptional coffee. Your daily dose of warmth and connection.
summary: Backlot Coffee: Evanston & Chicago's north side hub. Cozy cafes, community vibes, and exceptional, award-winning coffee. Where quality meets connection.
flavour_profile: Community-focused, craft roasting, cozy ambiance, specialty blends
about:
Backlot Coffee: Where Community and Craft Roasting Thrive

Backlot Coffee, founded by John Kim and Isaac Bloom in 2016, has quickly become a cherished fixture in Evanston and Chicago’s north side. With three inviting cafes and an in-house roastery, Backlot’s soul is rooted in genuine community—think cozy nooks, friendly baristas who remember your name, and a welcoming space designed for connections, quiet work, or neighborhood catch-ups. The name itself is inspired by the “Backlot” community—shared backyard spaces in Evanston—evoking memories of belonging and organic gathering. This sense of warmth and togetherness radiates throughout their cafes, making Backlot not just a stop for coffee but a local hub where kindness and community surprise you daily.

Renowned for exceptional service and a coffee portfolio lauded by fans and critics alike, Backlot Coffee was a runner-up in Time Out’s "Love Chicago Awards 2018." Their roastery consistently draws acclaim for standout blends like Tabletop and Flying Squirrel, loved for their smooth profiles and nuanced flavors. Also celebrated is their Cardamom Rose Latte—dubbed "the best latte in Chicago" by discerning regulars. For food lovers, Backlot elevates the experience with pastries that outshine the average, freshly prepared oatmeal, and light fare perfect for any time of day. Whether you’re seeking meticulously roasted beans for your home setup or a friendly spot to linger with a specialty drink, Backlot’s commitment to quality and connection makes it a standout on Chicago’s specialty coffee scene.

name: Coffee Lab and Roasters Chicago
excerpt_short: Lakeview's coffee haven. Roasting art meets quality. Explore specialty coffee's depth.
excerpt_long: Lakeview's coffee haven. We roast exceptional beans, crafting the perfect cup. Join our community of coffee lovers.
summary: Lakeview's coffee haven. We roast exceptional beans, crafting the perfect cup. A community for coffee lovers, from bean to brew.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, lab-like ambiance, community hub, specialty
about:
Coffee Lab & Roasters: A Lakeview Gem for Coffee Enthusiasts

Nestled in the heart of Chicago's Lakeview neighborhood, Coffee Lab & Roasters stands out as a haven for coffee aficionados. This specialty coffee shop combines the art of roasting with a commitment to quality, offering a unique experience for those seeking the perfect cup. With its focus on both retail and wholesale, Coffee Lab & Roasters has established itself as a go-to destination for coffee lovers and aspiring baristas alike.

Beyond just serving exceptional coffee, Coffee Lab & Roasters fosters a sense of community through its various offerings. Customers can enjoy the convenience of order pickup, participate in a loyalty program, and even purchase e-gift cards for fellow coffee enthusiasts. For those unable to visit in person, the shop partners with BCBC Coffee Roasters to provide shipping options, ensuring that their carefully crafted beans can be enjoyed far beyond the confines of Lakeview. Whether you're a local regular or a curious visitor, Coffee Lab & Roasters invites you to explore the depth and complexity of specialty coffee in a welcoming, laboratory-like atmosphere.

name: Magnífico Coffee Roasters & Coffee Shop
excerpt_short: Colombian heart, Chicago soul. Family-roasted, fresh, and full of vibrant flavor.
excerpt_long: Colombian heart in Chicago. Family-owned Magnífico roasts fresh, small-batch beans. Experience soulful coffee, pastries, and community.
summary: Colombian heritage, family-owned. Magnífico Coffee Roasters: Avondale's heart, roasting fresh, small-batch beans. Experience Colombia in every cup.
flavour_profile: Colombian heritage, small-batch roasts, vibrant atmosphere, family-inspired
about:
Magnífico Coffee Roasters: Chicago’s Heartfelt Ode to Colombian Coffee

Nestled in Avondale, Magnífico Coffee Roasters radiates the vibrant spirit of Colombian heritage and family. Founded by the Acebedo family, this Colombian-owned roastery and coffee shop is a deeply personal project inspired by their abuelita, Viri, and brought to life through the collective vision of siblings Angelica and Ricardo Acebedo-Diaz and brother-in-law Adam Frint. The space is warm and inviting, celebrating connection and community in every detail—from the thoughtfully sourced art to the aroma of freshly roasted beans. Every batch is roasted small and fresh in-house, ensuring each cup sings with the soul of Colombia. Their dedication to quality and experience has earned Magnífico Coffee Roasters a nomination for “Best of Chicago Reader 2024” in three categories, cementing their place among Chicago’s specialty coffee elite.

Magnífico’s coffee portfolio showcases single-origin Colombian and Central American roasts, as well as blends like Familia Riojas, San Miguel, and House Espresso. Coffee lovers are treated to both classic brews and specialty drinks, alongside a selection of Colombian pastries—think pan de bono, almojabana, and churros—sourced from local artisanal bakeries. Bagged snacks and authentic sodas round out the menu, delivering a nostalgic nod to the founders’ childhoods. Whether you’re savoring a pour-over or grabbing a box of their signature pastries, Magnífico offers a soulful experience built on empathy, craftsmanship, and a genuine love for coffee. For the ultimate taste, don’t miss their award-nominated house blends or the unique treats that pay homage to their Colombian roots.

name: Tasa Coffee Roasters
excerpt_short: Humboldt Park soul meets specialty coffee. Ethically sourced, expertly roasted, and utterly delicious.
excerpt_long: Humboldt Park's heart meets specialty coffee. Tasa Coffee Roasters: ethically sourced beans, roasted fresh, supporting women-owned farms.
summary: Humboldt Park's heart meets specialty coffee at Tasa. Ethically sourced beans, roasted fresh. Experience a vibrant blend of flavor and community.
flavour_profile: Artisanal roasts, diverse flavors, vibrant community hub
about:
Tasa Coffee Roasters: Where Humboldt Park’s Heart Meets Specialty Coffee

Step inside Tasa Coffee Roasters and you’ll immediately sense a vibrant blend of neighborhood soul and specialty coffee excellence. Founded by Jackie Marquez, a skilled chef and proud daughter of Mexican immigrants, Tasa pulses with the energy of Chicago’s diverse Humboldt Park community. Jackie and her husband Pierre, having discovered their passion for coffee during the pandemic, built Tasa from a love of both culinary craft and the rich traditions surrounding coffee. Their journey through coffee’s global roots—from Mexico and Ethiopia to Colombia and Guatemala—fuels a menu that spotlights meticulously roasted beans, ethically sourced with a mission to support women-owned farms and ensure fair wages for producers.

Tasa isn’t just a coffee shop; it’s a movement for equity and extraordinary flavor. The coffee portfolio shines with single-origin offerings and artful blends, each roasted on-site for peak freshness. Their menu stands out with house-made empanadas and Cuban sandwiches, echoing the owners’ culinary roots and commitment to delicious, authentic fare.
